Reading Mode
This page keeps the whole session intact while making long transcripts easier to scan.
  • Messages stay in left/right conversation bubbles.
  • Tool calls and results are folded by default.
  • Reasoning steps remain visible without leaking encrypted content.
  • Context, task state, and token counters stay in the timeline for auditability.
219 dialog 829 tool traffic
Conversation Flow
Use the controls to focus on one slice of the session: human prompts, assistant output, tool traffic, reasoning markers, or system context. The raw structure is preserved without forcing everything into one flat blob.

Implement the following plan:

# Plan: MemoryTree Report v2 — Quartz 对标全功能升级

## Context

当前 memorytree report 已实现基础静态 HTML 报告，但缺少现代化体验。
用户确认目标：功能对标 Quartz（jackyzha0），面向全球用户，支持 GitHub Pages 部署。

---

## 已有基础（不需要重建）

| 文件 | 已有能力 |
|------|---------|
| src/report/render/css.ts | CSS 变量已定义（--bg, --text, --accent 等） |
| src/report/render/layout.ts | escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, clientBadge, slugifyName |
| src/report/render/links.ts | LinkGraph 已构建（backlinks + forwardLinks） |
| src/report/render/search.ts | 全文搜索 + 内联 JS 已实现 |
| src/report/render/charts.ts | 所有 SVG 图表已实现 |
| src/report/build.ts | 完整构建流程已实现 |
| src/types/transcript.ts | ManifestEntry 有 cwd / client / session_id / title 等 |

---

## 一期实现范围（本次 PR）

### 新增文件


src/report/
  i18n/
    index.ts          ← loadLocale(locale) → Translations 对象
    en.ts             ← 英文字符串（~80 条）
    zh-CN.ts          ← 中文字符串
  render/
    graph.ts          ← 知识图谱页面（内联 force-directed JS）
    projects.ts       ← 按项目分类页面
    todos.ts          ← Memory/02_todos/ 页面
    archive.ts        ← Memory/05_archive/ 页面
  deploy/
    github-pages.ts   ← gh-pages 分支推送逻辑
    webhook.ts        ← HTTP POST 通知（飞书/Telegram/Discord）

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| src/report/render/css.ts | 加亮色主题变量 + 侧边栏布局 + 响应式断点 |
| src/report/render/layout.ts | htmlShell 注入 i18n/主题 toggle JS；renderNav 改为侧边栏 |
| src/report/render/dashboard.ts | 传入 Translations |
| src/report/render/transcript-list.ts | 加 Client tab 筛选（纯 JS）；传入 Translations |
| src/report/render/transcript.ts | 传入 Translations；加 popover 预览 JS |
| src/report/render/knowledge.ts | 传入 Translations |
| src/report/render/goals.ts | 传入 Translations |
| src/report/build.ts | 加 todos/archive/projects/graph 页生成；调用 deploy+webhook |
| src/types/report.ts | 扩展 BuildReportOptions（locale, ghPagesBranch, cname, webhookUrl） |
| src/heartbeat/config.ts | 加 locale/gh_pages_branch/cname/webhook_url 字段 |
| src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts | 传新 config 字段给 buildReport() |

---

## 详细实现规格

### 1. i18n 系统（方案 A：构建时指定语言）


// src/report/i18n/index.ts
export interface Translations {
  nav: { dashboard: string; sessions: string; projects: string; graph: string
         goals: string; todos: string; knowledge: string; archive: string; search: string }
  dashboard: { title: string; subtitle: string; sessions: string; messages: string
               toolEvents: string; activeDays: string; recentSessions: string }
  sessions: { title: string; noSessions: string; client: string; date: string
              id: string; msgs: string; tools: string; all: string }
  transcript: { aiSummary: string; referencedBy: string; messages: string
                noMessages: string; client: string; sessionId: string
                branch: string; workingDir: string; sha256: string; toolEvents: string }
  graph: { title: string; subtitle: string; noData: string }
  projects: { title: string; noProjects: string; sessions: string }
  search: { title: string; placeholder: string; results: string; noResults: string }
  common: { loading: string; unknown: string }
}
export function loadLocale(locale: string): Translations
// 支持: 'en'（默认）、'zh-CN'
// 未知 locale → 回退到 'en'

config.toml：


locale = "zh-CN"   # 用户设置一次，构建时生效

---

### 2. 侧边栏导航 + 响应式

布局结构（替换 top nav）：


┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [☰] MemoryTree          [☀/☾] [搜索]   │  ← 移动端顶栏
├──────────┬──────────────────────────────┤
│  Main    │                              │
│  Dashboard│     主内容区                 │
│  Sessions │     max-width: 900px        │
│  Projects │                             │
│  Graph   │                              │
│          │                              │
│  Memory  │                              │
│  Goals   │                              │
│  Todos   │                              │
│  Knowledge│                             │
│  Archive │                              │
│          │                              │
│  Tools   │                              │
│  Search  │                              │
│  ────    │                              │
│  ☀ Light │                              │
└──────────┴──────────────────────────────┘

响应式断点：
- > 1024px：侧边栏固定 240px，主内容自动左移
- < 768px：侧边栏隐藏，hamburger ☰，点击从左侧滑出 + 遮罩层

JS（内联，约 40 行）：
- hamburger click → sidebar.classList.toggle('open')
- overlay click → 关闭 sidebar
- theme toggle → data-theme 切换 + localStorage.setItem('mt-theme', ...)
- 初始化读取 localStorage.getItem('mt-theme') 默认 dark

---

### 3. 暗色 / 亮色切换


/* 亮色主题覆盖（加入 css.ts） */
[data-theme="light"] {
  --bg: #ffffff;
  --bg-secondary: #f6f8fa;
  --bg-card: #ffffff;
  --border: #d0d7de;
  --text: #1f2328;
  --text-muted: #636c76;
  --accent: #0969da;
  --accent-hover: #0550ae;
  --user-bg: #ddf4ff;
  --user-border: #54aeff44;
  --assistant-bg: #f6f8fa;
  --assistant-border: #d0d7de;
  --code-bg: #f6f8fa;
}

---

### 4. 知识图谱（graph.html）

数据源： LinkGraph（已有）+ ManifestEntry[] + MarkdownFile[]

节点类型：
- session → 圆形，按 client 着色（蓝/紫/绿）
- knowledge → 菱形，黄色
- goal → 六边形，橙色

渲染： <canvas> + 内联 vanilla JS force simulation（~250 行，无 CDN）


// force simulation 核心逻辑（内联）
const GRAPH_DATA = { nodes: [...], edges: [...] }
// 每帧：斥力（所有节点对）+ 引力（有连线的节点对）+ 中心引力 + 阻尼
// 交互：hover 高亮 + tooltip；click 跳转；scroll zoom；drag pan

节点上限： 超过 500 个时取最近 500 个（按 started_at）

---

### 5. 按 Client 分类（Sessions 页 tab 筛选）

transcripts/index.html 顶部加 tab bar，纯 JS 筛选（data-client 属性）：


[ All (84) ]  [ Claude (42) ]  [ Codex (31) ]  [ Gemini (11) ]

---

### 6. 按 Project 分类（projects/index.html）


// src/report/render/projects.ts
function extractProject(cwd: string): string {
  return cwd.split(/[/\\]/).filter(Boolean).at(-1) ?? 'unknown'
}
// 按项目分组 manifests → 卡片列表（项目名、session 数、最后活跃、使用的 clients）

---

### 7. 新增 Memory 分类页面

- Memory/02_todos/ → todos/index.html（复用 goals.ts 模式）
- Memory/05_archive/ → archive/index.html（复用 goals.ts 模式）
- Memory/03_chat_logs/→ 有内容则加入导航，否则隐藏

---

### 8. Popover 预览

session 链接 hover 时显示摘要卡片（summary 数据嵌在 data-* 属性，无需 HTTP 请求）：


<a href="..." data-summary="..." data-meta="Claude · 2026-03-16 · 18 msgs">Session Title</a>

JS 监听 mouseover → 创建/定位 .popover div → mouseleave 隐藏

---

### 9. GitHub Pages 部署

config.toml 新字段：


gh_pages_branch = "gh-pages"    # 留空则不部署
cname = "memory.yourdomain.com" # 留空则不生成 CNAME 文件

src/report/deploy/github-pages.ts：


// 步骤：
// 1. 如果 cname 非空 → 写 outputDir/CNAME
// 2. git subtree push --prefix Memory/07_reports origin {branch}
//    （branch 不存在则先 git checkout --orphan {branch} 并推空提交）
// 3. 失败 → logger.warn，不抛出

---

### 10. Webhook 通知

config.toml 新字段：


webhook_url = "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/bot/v2/hook/xxx"

src/report/deploy/webhook.ts：


// 平台自动识别（通过 URL 特征）：
//   feishu / telegram / discord / slack / generic
// 飞书：发卡片消息（标题 + 会话数 + 跳转按钮）
// Telegram：sendMessage API
// Discord/Slack：{ content: "..." }
// 失败 → warn，不抛出

---

### 11. 新增 Config 字段


// src/heartbeat/config.ts
readonly locale: string              // 默认: 'en'
readonly gh_pages_branch: string     // 默认: ''（不部署）
readonly cname: string               // 默认: ''
readonly webhook_url: string         // 默认: ''

### 12. 扩展 BuildReportOptions


// src/types/report.ts
locale?: string           // 默认 'en'
ghPagesBranch?: string    // 默认 ''
cname?: string            // 默认 ''
webhookUrl?: string       // 默认 ''
newSessionIds?: string[]  // 本次新增的 session（webhook 用）

---

## 输出目录结构（更新后）


Memory/07_reports/
  index.html              ← Dashboard（更新布局）
  graph.html              ← 知识图谱（新增）
  projects/
    index.html            ← 项目列表（新增）
  transcripts/
    index.html            ← Sessions（加 Client tab）
    claude/...
    codex/...
    gemini/...
  goals/index.html
  todos/index.html        ← 新增
  knowledge/index.html
  archive/index.html      ← 新增
  search.html
  CNAME                   ← 新增（if cname 配置了）

---

## 测试计划

| 测试文件 | 覆盖内容 |
|---------|---------|
| tests/report/i18n.test.ts | en/zh-CN 所有 key 存在；未知 locale 回退 en |
| tests/report/render/projects.test.ts | extractProject()；空 cwd；按项目分组 |
| tests/report/render/graph.test.ts | 节点/边生成；>500 节点截断；空图处理 |
| tests/report/deploy/github-pages.test.ts | CNAME 文件；空 branch 跳过；git 命令正确 |
| tests/report/deploy/webhook.test.ts | 平台识别；网络失败不抛出；payload 格式 |
| tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts | 新增 4 个字段的读取/默认值/round-trip |

---

## 实现顺序

1. i18n 系统（src/report/i18n/）+ 测试
2. CSS 重构（侧边栏 + 亮色主题 + 响应式）
3. layout.ts 升级（htmlShell 新结构；renderNav 改侧边栏）
4. config.ts + types/report.ts 加新字段
5. todos.ts + archive.ts（复用 goals 模式）
6. projects.ts（新页面）
7. graph.ts（知识图谱）
8. transcript-list.ts（Client tab 筛选）
9. 所有渲染函数传入 Translations
10. deploy/github-pages.ts + webhook.ts + 测试
11. build.ts 整合所有新页面 + deploy + webhook
12. heartbeat.ts 传新 config 字段
13. 全量构建 + 测试

---

## 二期待做（记录存档，本次不实现）

- [ ] 文章目录 TOC（Knowledge / Goals 页面内锚点）
- [ ] Breadcrumbs 导航路径
- [ ] Reader Mode（专注阅读模式）
- [ ] RSS Feed（feed.xml）
- [ ] Mermaid 图表渲染
- [ ] SPA 客户端路由（history.pushState，避免整页刷新）
- [ ] Callouts 样式（> [!note]、> [!warning]）
- [ ] Social Preview Cards（Open Graph meta 标签）
- [ ] 方案 B i18n（多语言并存 + 浏览器自动识别）
- [ ] 搜索支持 client/project 过滤
- [ ] 侧边栏折叠状态记忆（localStorage）
- [ ] 会话 tag 系统（AI 自动提取关键词）
- [ ] 侧边栏图标模式（768–1024px 窄版）

---

## 验证步骤


cd C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow

# 1. 构建
npm run build

# 2. 全量测试（目标 550+ 通过，0 失败）
npm test

# 3. 生成报告（中文，不启用 AI）
node dist/cli.js report build --root D:/demo1/openmnemo --no-ai

# 4. 启动预览
node dist/cli.js report serve --dir D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/07_reports --port 4321

# 5. 验证清单
# ✅ http://localhost:4321/              → 侧边栏，中文 UI
# ✅ 点击 ☀/☾                          → 亮/暗切换，刷新保留
# ✅ 手机模式（<768px）                  → hamburger 显示，点击侧边栏滑出
# ✅ /graph.html                        → 节点可见，hover 高亮，click 跳转
# ✅ /projects/index.html               → 按 cwd 分组项目列表
# ✅ /transcripts/index.html            → Client tab 筛选正常
# ✅ /todos/index.html, /archive/       → 正常渲染（或空状态）
# ✅ CNAME 文件（if cname 配置）
# ✅ Webhook 通知（if webhook_url 配置）

Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * GitHub Dark-inspired CSS for the report website.
     3→ * Self-contained — no external CDN dependencies.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→export const REPORT_CSS = `
     7→:root {
     8→  --bg: #0d1117;
     9→  --bg-secondary: #161b22;
    10→  --bg-card: #21262d;
    11→  --border: #30363d;
    12→  --text: #e6edf3;
    13→  --text-muted: #8b949e;
    14→  --accent: #58a6ff;
    15→  --accent-hover: #79b8ff;
    16→  --green-0: #161b22;
    17→  --green-1: #0e4429;
    18→  --green-2: #006d32;
    19→  --green-3: #26a641;
    20→  --green-4: #39d353;
    21→  --user-bg: #1c2d3e;
    22→  --user-border: #388bfd44;
    23→  --assistant-bg: #1c1c1c;
    24→  --assistant-border: #30363d;
    25→  --code-bg: #161b22;
    26→  --badge-codex: #1f6feb;
    27→  --badge-claude: #6e40c9;
    28→  --badge-gemini: #1a7f37;
    29→  --danger: #f85149;
    30→  --warning: #d29922;
    31→  --success: #3fb950;
    32→  --font-mono: 'SF Mono', 'Consolas', 'Liberation Mono', 'Menlo', monospace;
    33→}
    34→
    35→*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    36→
    37→html { font-size: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    38→
    39→body {
    40→  background: var(--bg);
    41→  color: var(--text);
    42→  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;
    43→  line-height: 1.6;
    44→  min-height: 100vh;
    45→}
    46→
    47→a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; }
    48→a:hover { color: var(--accent-hover); text-decoration: underline; }
    49→
    50→code {
    51→  font-family: var(--font-mono);
    52→  font-size: 0.875em;
    53→  background: var(--code-bg);
    54→  padding: 0.15em 0.4em;
    55→  border-radius: 4px;
    56→  border: 1px solid var(--border);
    57→}
    58→
    59→pre {
    60→  background: var(--code-bg);
    61→  border: 1px solid var(--border);
    62→  border-radius: 8px;
    63→  padding: 1rem;
    64→  overflow-x: auto;
    65→  margin: 0.75rem 0;
    66→}
    67→
    68→pre code {
    69→  background: none;
    70→  border: none;
    71→  padding: 0;
    72→  font-size: 0.875rem;
    73→}
    74→
    75→h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
    76→  color: var(--text);
    77→  line-height: 1.3;
    78→  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    79→}
    80→
    81→h1 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
    82→h2 { font-size: 1.375rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
    83→h3 { font-size: 1.125rem; }
    84→
    85→p { margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
    86→
    87→ul, ol { padding-left: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
    88→li { margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
    89→
    90→table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.9rem; }
    91→th, td { padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
    92→th { color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; background: var(--bg-secondary); }
    93→tr:hover td { background: var(--bg-secondary); }
    94→
    95→/* ── Nav ── */
    96→.nav {
    97→  background: var(--bg-secondary);
    98→  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    99→  padding: 0 1.5rem;
   100→  display: flex;
   101→  align-items: center;
   102→  gap: 0;
   103→  position: sticky;
   104→  top: 0;
   105→  z-index: 100;
   106→}
   107→
   108→.nav-brand {
   109→  font-weight: 700;
   110→  font-size: 1rem;
   111→  color: var(--text);
   112→  padding: 0.75rem 1rem 0.75rem 0;
   113→  margin-right: 0.5rem;
   114→  border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
   115→}
   116→
   117→.nav-link {
   118→  display: inline-block;
   119→  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
   120→  color: var(--text-muted);
   121→  font-size: 0.9rem;
   122→  transition: color 0.15s;
   123→}
   124→
   125→.nav-link:hover { color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; }
   126→.nav-link.active { color: var(--text); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent); }
   127→
   128→/* ── Layout ── */
   129→.container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 1.5rem; }
   130→
   131→.page-header { margin-bottom: 2rem; }
   132→.page-header h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; }
   133→.page-header .subtitle { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 0.25rem; }
   134→
   135→/* ── Cards ── */
   136→.card {
   137→  background: var(--bg-card);
   138→  border: 1px solid var(--border);
   139→  border-radius: 8px;
   140→  padding: 1.25rem;
   141→  margin-bottom: 1rem;
   142→}
   143→
   144→.card-title {
   145→  font-size: 0.8rem;
   146→  font-weight: 600;
   147→  text-transform: uppercase;
   148→  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
   149→  color: var(--text-muted);
   150→  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
   151→}
   152→
   153→.stat-value {
   154→  font-size: 2rem;
   155→  font-weight: 700;
   156→  color: var(--text);
   157→  line-height: 1;
   158→}
   159→
   160→.stat-label { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 0.25rem; }
   161→
   162→.stats-grid {
   163→  display: grid;
   164→  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr));
   165→  gap: 1rem;
   166→  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
   167→}
   168→
   169→/* ── Charts ── */
   170→.chart-grid {
   171→  display: grid;
   172→  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
   173→  gap: 1rem;
   174→  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
   175→}
   176→
   177→@media (max-width: 900px) {
   178→  .chart-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
   179→}
   180→
   181→.chart-card {
   182→  background: var(--bg-card);
   183→  border: 1px solid var(--border);
   184→  border-radius: 8px;
   185→  padding: 1.25rem;
   186→}
   187→
   188→.chart-title {
   189→  font-size: 0.85rem;
   190→  font-weight: 600;
   191→  color: var(--text-muted);
   192→  margin-bottom: 1rem;
   193→}
   194→
   195→.chart-card svg { display: block; width: 100%; overflow: visible; }
   196→.chart-card.full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
   197→
   198→/* ── Badge ── */
   199→.badge {
   200→  display: inline-block;
   201→  padding: 0.2em 0.6em;
   202→  border-radius: 12px;
   203→  font-size: 0.75rem;
   204→  font-weight: 600;
   205→  text-transform: uppercase;
   206→  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
   207→}
   208→
   209→.badge-codex { background: #1f6feb33; color: #58a6ff; border: 1px solid #1f6feb66; }
   210→.badge-claude { background: #6e40c933; color: #bc8cff; border: 1px solid #6e40c966; }
   211→.badge-gemini { background: #1a7f3733; color: #3fb950; border: 1px solid #1a7f3766; }
   212→.badge-unknown { background: #30363d33; color: #8b949e; border: 1px solid #30363d66; }
   213→
   214→/* ── Messages ── */
   215→.messages { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 1rem; }
   216→
   217→.message {
   218→  border-radius: 8px;
   219→  padding: 1rem;
   220→  border: 1px solid;
   221→  max-width: 100%;
   222→}
   223→
   224→.message-user {
   225→  background: var(--user-bg);
   226→  border-color: var(--user-border);
   227→  align-self: flex-start;
   228→}
   229→
   230→.message-assistant {
   231→  background: var(--assistant-bg);
   232→  border-color: var(--assistant-border);
   233→}
   234→
   235→.message-header {
   236→  display: flex;
   237→  align-items: center;
   238→  gap: 0.5rem;
   239→  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
   240→  font-size: 0.8rem;
   241→  color: var(--text-muted);
   242→}
   243→
   244→.message-role {
   245→  font-weight: 600;
   246→  font-size: 0.8rem;
   247→  text-transform: capitalize;
   248→}
   249→
   250→.message-user .message-role { color: #58a6ff; }
   251→.message-assistant .message-role { color: #8b949e; }
   252→
   253→.message-body { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; word-break: break-word; }
   254→.message-body p { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
   255→.message-body p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
   256→
   257→/* ── Summary card ── */
   258→.summary-card {
   259→  background: #161b22;
   260→  border: 1px solid #30363d;
   261→  border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
   262→  border-radius: 6px;
   263→  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
   264→  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
   265→  font-size: 0.9rem;
   266→  color: var(--text-muted);
   267→}
   268→
   269→.summary-card .summary-label {
   270→  font-size: 0.75rem;
   271→  font-weight: 600;
   272→  text-transform: uppercase;
   273→  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
   274→  color: var(--accent);
   275→  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
   276→}
   277→
   278→/* ── Metadata table ── */
   279→.meta-table { font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }
   280→.meta-table td:first-child { color: var(--text-muted); width: 140px; font-weight: 500; }
   281→
   282→/* ── Backlinks ── */
   283→.backlinks {
   284→  background: var(--bg-secondary);
   285→  border: 1px solid var(--border);
   286→  border-radius: 6px;
   287→  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
   288→  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
   289→  font-size: 0.85rem;
   290→}
   291→
   292→.backlinks-title { font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; }
   293→.backlinks ul { padding-left: 1rem; }
   294→
   295→/* ── Search ── */
   296→.search-box {
   297→  width: 100%;
   298→  background: var(--bg-card);
   299→  border: 1px solid var(--border);
   300→  border-radius: 8px;
   301→  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
   302→  color: var(--text);
   303→  font-size: 1rem;
   304→  font-family: inherit;
   305→  margin-bottom: 1rem;
   306→  outline: none;
   307→  transition: border-color 0.15s;
   308→}
   309→
   310→.search-box:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }
   311→
   312→.search-results { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; }
   313→
   314→.search-result {
   315→  background: var(--bg-card);
   316→  border: 1px solid var(--border);
   317→  border-radius: 8px;
   318→  padding: 1rem;
   319→  transition: border-color 0.15s;
   320→}
   321→
   322→.search-result:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
   323→.search-result-title { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
   324→.search-result-meta { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
   325→.search-result-snippet { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); }
   326→.search-result mark { background: #3d3000; color: var(--warning); border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 0.1em; }
   327→#search-count { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
   328→
   329→/* ── Heatmap legend ── */
   330→.heatmap-legend {
   331→  display: flex;
   332→  align-items: center;
   333→  gap: 0.4rem;
   334→  font-size: 0.75rem;
   335→  color: var(--text-muted);
   336→  margin-top: 0.5rem;
   337→  justify-content: flex-end;
   338→}
   339→
   340→/* ── Responsive ── */
   341→@media (max-width: 600px) {
   342→  .nav { padding: 0 0.75rem; }
   343→  .container { padding: 1rem 0.75rem; }
   344→  .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
   345→}
   346→`
   347→

Tool Result #24 Read tooluse_qrSQrDRcjNFQ7U7SDIwEfN 12:35:06
Read output=1→/** 2→ * HTML layout helpers: shell, navigation, and HTML escaping. 3→ */ 4→ 5→import { basename } from 'node:path' 6→ 7→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transc...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * HTML layout helpers: shell, navigation, and HTML escaping.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import { basename } from 'node:path'
     6→
     7→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     8→import { REPORT_CSS } from './css.js'
     9→
    10→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    11→// HTML escaping
    12→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    13→
    14→export function escHtml(text: string): string {
    15→  return text
    16→    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
    17→    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
    18→    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
    19→    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
    20→    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;')
    21→}
    22→
    23→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    24→// Navigation
    25→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    26→
    27→export type NavPage = 'dashboard' | 'transcripts' | 'goals' | 'knowledge' | 'search'
    28→
    29→const NAV_ITEMS: Array<{ id: NavPage; label: string; href: string }> = [
    30→  { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', href: '../index.html' },
    31→  { id: 'transcripts', label: 'Transcripts', href: '../transcripts/index.html' },
    32→  { id: 'goals', label: 'Goals', href: '../goals/index.html' },
    33→  { id: 'knowledge', label: 'Knowledge', href: '../knowledge/index.html' },
    34→  { id: 'search', label: 'Search', href: '../search.html' },
    35→]
    36→
    37→/** Nav items for root-level pages (index.html, search.html) use relative paths */
    38→const NAV_ITEMS_ROOT: Array<{ id: NavPage; label: string; href: string }> = [
    39→  { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', href: 'index.html' },
    40→  { id: 'transcripts', label: 'Transcripts', href: 'transcripts/index.html' },
    41→  { id: 'goals', label: 'Goals', href: 'goals/index.html' },
    42→  { id: 'knowledge', label: 'Knowledge', href: 'knowledge/index.html' },
    43→  { id: 'search', label: 'Search', href: 'search.html' },
    44→]
    45→
    46→export function renderNav(current: NavPage, rootLevel = false): string {
    47→  const items = rootLevel ? NAV_ITEMS_ROOT : NAV_ITEMS
    48→  const links = items
    49→    .map(item => {
    50→      const cls = item.id === current ? 'nav-link active' : 'nav-link'
    51→      return `<a href="${escHtml(item.href)}" class="${cls}">${escHtml(item.label)}</a>`
    52→    })
    53→    .join('')
    54→  return `<nav class="nav"><span class="nav-brand">MemoryTree</span>${links}</nav>`
    55→}
    56→
    57→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    58→// HTML shell
    59→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    60→
    61→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    62→// Transcript URL helpers (single canonical implementation)
    63→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    64→
    65→/**
    66→ * Compute the stem (filename without .md) for a manifest's clean path.
    67→ * Falls back to session_id.
    68→ */
    69→export function manifestStem(m: ManifestEntry): string {
    70→  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
    71→  return cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
    72→}
    73→
    74→/**
    75→ * URL to a transcript page relative to the **root** of the report output dir.
    76→ * Use this from index.html and transcripts/index.html.
    77→ */
    78→export function transcriptUrlFromRoot(m: ManifestEntry): string {
    79→  return `transcripts/${m.client}/${manifestStem(m)}.html`
    80→}
    81→
    82→/**
    83→ * URL to a transcript page relative to **another transcript** page.
    84→ * Use this from individual transcript pages.
    85→ */
    86→export function transcriptUrlFromTranscript(m: ManifestEntry): string {
    87→  return `../${m.client}/${manifestStem(m)}.html`
    88→}
    89→
    90→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    91→// Client badge (allowlisted CSS class)
    92→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    93→
    94→const KNOWN_CLIENTS = new Set(['codex', 'claude', 'gemini'])
    95→
    96→/** Render a coloured client badge. CSS class is allowlisted to prevent injection. */
    97→export function clientBadge(client: string): string {
    98→  const safeClass = KNOWN_CLIENTS.has(client) ? client : 'unknown'
    99→  return `<span class="badge badge-${safeClass}">${escHtml(client)}</span>`
   100→}
   101→
   102→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   103→// Shared MarkdownFile type and slug helper
   104→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   105→
   106→export interface MarkdownFile {
   107→  filename: string
   108→  title: string
   109→  content: string
   110→}
   111→
   112→export function slugifyName(name: string): string {
   113→  return name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
   114→}
   115→
   116→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   117→// HTML shell
   118→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   119→
   120→export function htmlShell(title: string, content: string, nav: string, extraHead = ''): string {
   121→  return `<!DOCTYPE html>
   122→<html lang="en">
   123→<head>
   124→<meta charset="UTF-8">
   125→<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   126→<title>${escHtml(title)} — MemoryTree</title>
   127→<style>${REPORT_CSS}</style>
   128→${extraHead}
   129→</head>
   130→<body>
   131→${nav}
   132→<div class="container">
   133→${content}
   134→</div>
   135→</body>
   136→</html>`
   137→}
   138→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
Tool Result #25 Read tooluse_nMUOTC55n1FnbiDwDBrQg5 12:35:06
Read output=1→/** 2→ * Type definitions for the report generation subsystem. 3→ */ 4→ 5→export interface ReportStats { 6→ totalSessions: number 7→ totalMessages: number 8→ totalToolEvents: ...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Type definitions for the report generation subsystem.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→export interface ReportStats {
     6→  totalSessions: number
     7→  totalMessages: number
     8→  totalToolEvents: number
     9→  activeDays: number
    10→  dateRange: { from: string; to: string }
    11→  clientCounts: Record<string, number>
    12→  /** 'YYYY-MM-DD' → session count */
    13→  dayBuckets: Record<string, number>
    14→  /** 'YYYY-WNN' → message count */
    15→  weekBuckets: Record<string, number>
    16→  /** tool name → invocation count */
    17→  toolCounts: Record<string, number>
    18→}
    19→
    20→export interface SummaryCache {
    21→  sha256: string
    22→  summary: string
    23→  generated_at: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→export interface LinkGraph {
    27→  /** session_id → list of session_ids that reference it */
    28→  backlinks: Record<string, string[]>
    29→  /** session_id → list of session_ids it references */
    30→  forwardLinks: Record<string, string[]>
    31→}
    32→
    33→export interface SearchIndexEntry {
    34→  url: string
    35→  title: string
    36→  client: string
    37→  date: string
    38→  snippet: string
    39→}
    40→
    41→export interface BuildReportOptions {
    42→  root: string
    43→  output: string
    44→  noAi?: boolean
    45→  model?: string
    46→}
    47→

Tool Result #29 Read tooluse_kJUrmVUweLDr9d2v3OrsqJ 12:35:15
Read output=1→/** 2→ * Report build orchestrator. 3→ * Generates a self-contained multi-page HTML website in Memory/07_reports/. 4→ */ 5→ 6→import { 7→ existsSync, 8→ mkdirSync, 9→ readdirS...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Report build orchestrator.
     3→ * Generates a self-contained multi-page HTML website in Memory/07_reports/.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import {
     7→  existsSync,
     8→  mkdirSync,
     9→  readdirSync,
    10→  readFileSync,
    11→  writeFileSync,
    12→  appendFileSync,
    13→} from 'node:fs'
    14→import { basename, dirname, join, relative } from 'node:path'
    15→
    16→import type { BuildReportOptions } from '../types/report.js'
    17→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'
    18→import { computeStats, extractToolNames, accumulateToolCounts } from './stats.js'
    19→import { renderDashboard } from './render/dashboard.js'
    20→import { renderTranscriptList } from './render/transcript-list.js'
    21→import { renderTranscript } from './render/transcript.js'
    22→import type { RenderedMessage } from './render/transcript.js'
    23→import { renderKnowledge } from './render/knowledge.js'
    24→import type { KnowledgeFile } from './render/knowledge.js'
    25→import { renderGoals } from './render/goals.js'
    26→import type { GoalFile } from './render/goals.js'
    27→import { buildSearchIndex, renderSearchPage } from './render/search.js'
    28→import { buildLinkGraph } from './render/links.js'
    29→import { getSummary } from './summarize.js'
    30→import type { SummaryOptions } from './summarize.js'
    31→
    32→const DEFAULT_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
    33→
    34→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    35→// Main entry point
    36→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    37→
    38→export async function buildReport(options: BuildReportOptions): Promise<void> {
    39→  const { root, output } = options
    40→  const noAi = options.noAi ?? false
    41→  const model = options.model ?? DEFAULT_MODEL
    42→  // Cache lives outside the gitignored output dir so it survives rm -rf
    43→  const cacheDir = join(root, 'Memory', '.report-cache')
    44→
    45→  // Ensure output dirs exist
    46→  mkdirSync(output, { recursive: true })
    47→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'transcripts'), { recursive: true })
    48→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'goals'), { recursive: true })
    49→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'knowledge'), { recursive: true })
    50→  mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })
    51→
    52→  // Ensure Memory/07_reports is gitignored
    53→  ensureGitignore(root, 'Memory/07_reports/')
    54→
    55→  // Load all manifests
    56→  const manifests = loadManifests(root)
    57→
    58→  // Build link graph from clean markdown
    59→  const linkGraph = buildLinkGraph(manifests, root)
    60→
    61→  // Accumulate tool counts while processing transcripts
    62→  let toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {}
    63→
    64→  // Summary options
    65→  const summaryOptions: SummaryOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
    66→
    67→  // Process each transcript: parse → summarize → render → write → discard
    68→  const snippets: Record<string, string> = {}
    69→  const summaryPromises: Array<Promise<void>> = []
    70→
    71→  for (const m of manifests) {
    72→    const messages = parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m, root)
    73→
    74→    // Tool events from parsed transcript (try raw path)
    75→    const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)
    76→    if (rawPath && existsSync(rawPath)) {
    77→      try {
    78→        const toolSummaries = extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath, m.client)
    79→        const names = extractToolNames(toolSummaries)
    80→        toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, names)
    81→      } catch {
    82→        // Skip if raw parsing fails
    83→      }
    84→    }
    85→
    86→    // Search snippet from first message text
    87→    const firstMsg = messages[0]
    88→    snippets[m.session_id] = firstMsg ? firstMsg.text.slice(0, 300) : ''
    89→
    90→    // Summarize + render (deferred to allow parallel API calls)
    91→    const manifest = m
    92→    const msgs = messages
    93→    summaryPromises.push(
    94→      (async () => {
    95→        const summary = await getSummary(manifest.raw_sha256, msgs, summaryOptions)
    96→        const backlinkIds = linkGraph.backlinks[manifest.session_id] ?? []
    97→        const backlinkManifests = backlinkIds
    98→          .map(id => manifests.find(x => x.session_id === id))
    99→          .filter((x): x is ManifestEntry => x !== undefined)
   100→
   101→        const html = renderTranscript(msgs, manifest, summary, backlinkManifests)
   102→        const outPath = transcriptOutputPath(output, manifest)
   103→        mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true })
   104→        writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')
   105→      })(),
   106→    )
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  // Wait for all transcript renders (parallel, bounded by semaphore in summarize.ts)
   110→  await Promise.all(summaryPromises)
   111→
   112→  // Compute final stats with accumulated tool counts
   113→  const stats = computeStats(manifests, toolCounts)
   114→
   115→  // Dashboard
   116→  writeFileSync(join(output, 'index.html'), renderDashboard(stats, manifests), 'utf-8')
   117→
   118→  // Session list
   119→  writeFileSync(
   120→    join(output, 'transcripts', 'index.html'),
   121→    renderTranscriptList(manifests),
   122→    'utf-8',
   123→  )
   124→
   125→  // Goals page
   126→  const goalFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals'))
   127→  writeFileSync(
   128→    join(output, 'goals', 'index.html'),
   129→    renderGoals(goalFiles),
   130→    'utf-8',
   131→  )
   132→
   133→  // Knowledge page
   134→  const knowledgeFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '04_knowledge'))
   135→  writeFileSync(
   136→    join(output, 'knowledge', 'index.html'),
   137→    renderKnowledge(knowledgeFiles),
   138→    'utf-8',
   139→  )
   140→
   141→  // Search
   142→  const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(manifests, m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '')
   143→  writeFileSync(join(output, 'search.html'), renderSearchPage(searchIndex), 'utf-8')
   144→}
   145→
   146→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   147→// Manifest loading
   148→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   149→
   150→function loadManifests(root: string): ManifestEntry[] {
   151→  const manifestsDir = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts', 'manifests')
   152→  if (!existsSync(manifestsDir)) return []
   153→
   154→  const manifests: ManifestEntry[] = []
   155→  loadManifestsRecursive(manifestsDir, manifests)
   156→  return manifests
   157→}
   158→
   159→function loadManifestsRecursive(dir: string, out: ManifestEntry[]): void {
   160→  let entries: string[]
   161→  try {
   162→    entries = readdirSync(dir)
   163→  } catch {
   164→    return
   165→  }
   166→
   167→  for (const entry of entries) {
   168→    const fullPath = join(dir, entry)
   169→    if (entry.endsWith('.json')) {
   170→      try {
   171→        const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
   172→        const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as ManifestEntry
   173→        if (parsed.session_id && parsed.client) {
   174→          out.push(parsed)
   175→        }
   176→      } catch {
   177→        // Skip malformed manifests
   178→      }
   179→    } else {
   180→      // Recurse into subdirectories
   181→      loadManifestsRecursive(fullPath, out)
   182→    }
   183→  }
   184→}
   185→
   186→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   187→// Clean markdown message parsing
   188→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   189→
   190→/** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */
   191→export function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {
   192→  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path
   193→    ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path)
   194→    : m.global_clean_path
   195→  if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []
   196→
   197→  let content: string
   198→  try {
   199→    content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
   200→  } catch {
   201→    return []
   202→  }
   203→
   204→  return parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content)
   205→}
   206→
   207→/** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */
   208→export function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {
   209→  const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []
   210→
   211→  // Find ## Messages section
   212→  const msgSection = content.indexOf('\n## Messages')
   213→  if (msgSection === -1) return []
   214→
   215→  const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after "## Messages\n"
   216→
   217→  // Split on ### N. role headers
   218→  const msgRe = /^### \d+\.\s+(\w+)/gm
   219→  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
   220→  const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []
   221→
   222→  while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {
   223→    starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })
   224→  }
   225→
   226→  for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {
   227→    const start = starts[i]
   228→    if (!start) continue
   229→    const nextStart = starts[i + 1]
   230→    const chunk = nextStart
   231→      ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)
   232→      : body.slice(start.index)
   233→
   234→    const lines = chunk.split('\n')
   235→    // First line is the header, second may be timestamp
   236→    let timestamp = ''
   237→    const textLines: string[] = []
   238→    let pastHeader = false
   239→
   240→    for (const line of lines) {
   241→      if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {
   242→        pastHeader = true
   243→        continue
   244→      }
   245→      if (!pastHeader) continue
   246→      const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\s*`([^`]+)`/)
   247→      if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {
   248→        timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''
   249→        continue
   250→      }
   251→      textLines.push(line)
   252→    }
   253→
   254→    // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text
   255→    const text = textLines.join('\n').trim()
   256→    if (text || timestamp) {
   257→      messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })
   258→    }
   259→  }
   260→
   261→  return messages
   262→}
   263→
   264→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   265→// Raw transcript tool extraction
   266→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   267→
   268→/** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */
   269→function extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {
   270→  const summaries: string[] = []
   271→  let content: string
   272→  try {
   273→    content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')
   274→  } catch {
   275→    return []
   276→  }
   277→
   278→  for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
   279→    const trimmed = line.trim()
   280→    if (!trimmed) continue
   281→    try {
   282→      const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
   283→      // Codex: function_call type
   284→      const type = record['type'] as string | undefined
   285→      if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {
   286→        const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type
   287→        summaries.push(name)
   288→        continue
   289→      }
   290→      // Claude: tool_use content blocks
   291→      const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined
   292→      const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined
   293→      if (Array.isArray(content2)) {
   294→        for (const block of content2) {
   295→          if (
   296→            block !== null &&
   297→            typeof block === 'object' &&
   298→            (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'
   299→          ) {
   300→            const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'
   301→            summaries.push(name)
   302→          }
   303→        }
   304→      }
   305→    } catch {
   306→      // Skip malformed lines
   307→    }
   308→  }
   309→
   310→  return summaries
   311→}
   312→
   313→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   314→// Output path helpers
   315→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   316→
   317→function transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {
   318→  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
   319→  const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
   320→  return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)
   321→}
   322→
   323→function resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
   324→  if (m.repo_raw_path) {
   325→    return join(root, m.repo_raw_path)
   326→  }
   327→  if (m.global_raw_path) {
   328→    return m.global_raw_path
   329→  }
   330→  return null
   331→}
   332→
   333→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   334→// Markdown file loader (for goals/knowledge)
   335→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   336→
   337→function loadMarkdownFiles(dir: string): Array<{ filename: string; title: string; content: string }> {
   338→  if (!existsSync(dir)) return []
   339→
   340→  let entries: string[]
   341→  try {
   342→    entries = readdirSync(dir)
   343→  } catch {
   344→    return []
   345→  }
   346→
   347→  return entries
   348→    .filter(e => e.endsWith('.md'))
   349→    .sort()
   350→    .map(filename => {
   351→      const fullPath = join(dir, filename)
   352→      let content = ''
   353→      try {
   354→        content = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
   355→      } catch {
   356→        // empty
   357→      }
   358→      const title = extractMarkdownTitle(content) || basename(filename, '.md')
   359→      return { filename, title, content }
   360→    })
   361→}
   362→
   363→function extractMarkdownTitle(content: string): string {
   364→  const match = content.match(/^#\s+(.+)$/m)
   365→  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? ''
   366→}
   367→
   368→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   369→// .gitignore management
   370→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   371→
   372→export function ensureGitignore(root: string, entry: string): void {
   373→  const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
   374→  let existing = ''
   375→  if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
   376→    try {
   377→      existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
   378→    } catch {
   379→      return
   380→    }
   381→  }
   382→  // Check if already present (normalize line endings)
   383→  const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
   384→  if (lines.some(l => l.trim() === entry.trim())) return
   385→
   386→  // Append with trailing newline
   387→  const append = existing.endsWith('\n') ? entry + '\n' : '\n' + entry + '\n'
   388→  try {
   389→    appendFileSync(gitignorePath, append, 'utf-8')
   390→  } catch {
   391→    // Best-effort
   392→  }
   393→}
   394→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

Read output=1→/** 2→ * Goals page: renders markdown files from Memory/01_goals/. 3→ */ 4→ 5→import { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js' 6→import type { Markdown...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Goals page: renders markdown files from Memory/01_goals/.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js'
     6→import type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'
     7→import { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'
     8→
     9→export type GoalFile = MarkdownFile
    10→
    11→export function renderGoals(files: GoalFile[]): string {
    12→  const nav = renderNav('goals', false)
    13→
    14→  if (files.length === 0) {
    15→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
    16→  <h1>Goals</h1>
    17→  <p class="subtitle">No goal files found in Memory/01_goals/.</p>
    18→</div>`
    19→    return htmlShell('Goals', content, nav)
    20→  }
    21→
    22→  const sections = files
    23→    .map(f => {
    24→      const htmlContent = markdownToHtml(f.content)
    25→      return `<div class="card" id="${escHtml(slugifyName(f.filename))}">
    26→  <h2>${escHtml(f.title)}</h2>
    27→  <p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1rem">${escHtml(f.filename)}</p>
    28→  <div class="markdown-body">${htmlContent}</div>
    29→</div>`
    30→    })
    31→    .join('\n')
    32→
    33→  const content = `<div class="page-header">
    34→  <h1>Goals</h1>
    35→  <p class="subtitle">${files.length} goal file(s)</p>
    36→</div>
    37→${sections}`
    38→
    39→  return htmlShell('Goals', content, nav)
    40→}
    41→

Read output=1→/** 2→ * Load, validate, and manage ~/.memorytree/config.toml. 3→ * Port of scripts/_config_utils.py 4→ */ 5→ 6→import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } f...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Load, validate, and manage ~/.memorytree/config.toml.
     3→ * Port of scripts/_config_utils.py
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'
     7→import { homedir } from 'node:os'
     8→import { dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
     9→
    10→import { parse as parseToml } from 'smol-toml'
    11→
    12→import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    13→
    14→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    15→// Constants
    16→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17→
    18→const DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'
    19→const DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH = true
    20→const DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL = 'info'
    21→const DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT = false
    22→const DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
    23→const VALID_LOG_LEVELS: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['debug', 'info', 'warn', 'error'])
    24→
    25→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    26→// Types
    27→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    28→
    29→export interface ProjectEntry {
    30→  readonly path: string
    31→  readonly name: string
    32→}
    33→
    34→export interface Config {
    35→  readonly heartbeat_interval: string
    36→  readonly watch_dirs: readonly string[]
    37→  readonly projects: readonly ProjectEntry[]
    38→  readonly auto_push: boolean
    39→  readonly log_level: string
    40→  readonly generate_report: boolean
    41→  readonly ai_summary_model: string
    42→}
    43→
    44→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    45→// Path helpers
    46→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    47→
    48→export function memorytreeRoot(): string {
    49→  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree')
    50→}
    51→
    52→export function configPath(): string {
    53→  return resolve(memorytreeRoot(), 'config.toml')
    54→}
    55→
    56→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    57→// Load / Save
    58→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    59→
    60→export function loadConfig(): Config {
    61→  const path = configPath()
    62→  if (!existsSync(path)) {
    63→    return defaultConfig()
    64→  }
    65→  let raw: Record<string, unknown>
    66→  try {
    67→    const text = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
    68→    raw = parseToml(text) as Record<string, unknown>
    69→  } catch {
    70→    return defaultConfig()
    71→  }
    72→  return parseRaw(raw)
    73→}
    74→
    75→export function saveConfig(cfg: Config): void {
    76→  const path = configPath()
    77→  mkdirSync(dirname(path), { recursive: true })
    78→
    79→  const lines: string[] = [
    80→    `heartbeat_interval = ${tomlString(cfg.heartbeat_interval)}`,
    81→    `auto_push = ${cfg.auto_push ? 'true' : 'false'}`,
    82→    `log_level = ${tomlString(cfg.log_level)}`,
    83→    `generate_report = ${cfg.generate_report ? 'true' : 'false'}`,
    84→    `ai_summary_model = ${tomlString(cfg.ai_summary_model)}`,
    85→  ]
    86→
    87→  if (cfg.watch_dirs.length > 0) {
    88→    const items = cfg.watch_dirs.map(d => tomlString(d)).join(', ')
    89→    lines.push(`watch_dirs = [${items}]`)
    90→  } else {
    91→    lines.push('watch_dirs = []')
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  lines.push('')
    95→  for (const project of cfg.projects) {
    96→    lines.push('[[projects]]')
    97→    lines.push(`path = ${tomlString(project.path)}`)
    98→    if (project.name) {
    99→      lines.push(`name = ${tomlString(project.name)}`)
   100→    }
   101→    lines.push('')
   102→  }
   103→
   104→  writeFileSync(path, lines.join('\n') + '\n', 'utf-8')
   105→}
   106→
   107→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   108→// Interval parsing
   109→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   110→
   111→export function intervalToSeconds(interval: string): number {
   112→  const match = interval.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
   113→  if (!match) {
   114→    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
   115→  }
   116→  const value = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)
   117→  const unit = match[2]!
   118→  if (value <= 0) {
   119→    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
   120→  }
   121→  const multiplier: Record<string, number> = { s: 1, m: 60, h: 3600 }
   122→  return value * (multiplier[unit] ?? 60)
   123→}
   124→
   125→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   126→// Project registration
   127→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   128→
   129→export function registerProject(cfg: Config, repoPath: string): Config {
   130→  const resolved = toPosixPath(resolve(repoPath))
   131→  for (const entry of cfg.projects) {
   132→    if (toPosixPath(resolve(entry.path)) === resolved) {
   133→      return cfg
   134→    }
   135→  }
   136→  const name = resolved.split('/').pop() ?? ''
   137→  return {
   138→    ...cfg,
   139→    projects: [...cfg.projects, { path: resolved, name }],
   140→  }
   141→}
   142→
   143→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   144→// Internal helpers
   145→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   146→
   147→function defaultConfig(): Config {
   148→  return {
   149→    heartbeat_interval: DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL,
   150→    watch_dirs: [],
   151→    projects: [],
   152→    auto_push: DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH,
   153→    log_level: DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL,
   154→    generate_report: DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT,
   155→    ai_summary_model: DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL,
   156→  }
   157→}
   158→
   159→function parseRaw(raw: Record<string, unknown>): Config {
   160→  let interval = raw['heartbeat_interval']
   161→  if (typeof interval !== 'string' || !isValidInterval(interval)) {
   162→    interval = DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL
   163→  }
   164→
   165→  let autoPush = raw['auto_push']
   166→  if (typeof autoPush !== 'boolean') {
   167→    autoPush = DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH
   168→  }
   169→
   170→  let logLevel = raw['log_level']
   171→  if (typeof logLevel !== 'string' || !VALID_LOG_LEVELS.has(logLevel.toLowerCase())) {
   172→    logLevel = DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL
   173→  }
   174→  logLevel = (logLevel as string).toLowerCase()
   175→
   176→  const watchDirs: string[] = []
   177→  const rawDirs = raw['watch_dirs']
   178→  if (Array.isArray(rawDirs)) {
   179→    for (const d of rawDirs) {
   180→      if (typeof d === 'string') watchDirs.push(d)
   181→    }
   182→  }
   183→
   184→  const projects: ProjectEntry[] = []
   185→  const rawProjects = raw['projects']
   186→  if (Array.isArray(rawProjects)) {
   187→    for (const entry of rawProjects) {
   188→      if (entry !== null && typeof entry === 'object' && !Array.isArray(entry)) {
   189→        const rec = entry as Record<string, unknown>
   190→        if (typeof rec['path'] === 'string') {
   191→          projects.push({
   192→            path: rec['path'] as string,
   193→            name: String(rec['name'] ?? ''),
   194→          })
   195→        }
   196→      }
   197→    }
   198→  }
   199→
   200→  let generateReport = raw['generate_report']
   201→  if (typeof generateReport !== 'boolean') {
   202→    generateReport = DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT
   203→  }
   204→
   205→  let aiSummaryModel = raw['ai_summary_model']
   206→  if (typeof aiSummaryModel !== 'string' || !aiSummaryModel) {
   207→    aiSummaryModel = DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL
   208→  }
   209→
   210→  return {
   211→    heartbeat_interval: interval as string,
   212→    watch_dirs: watchDirs,
   213→    projects,
   214→    auto_push: autoPush as boolean,
   215→    log_level: logLevel as string,
   216→    generate_report: generateReport as boolean,
   217→    ai_summary_model: aiSummaryModel as string,
   218→  }
   219→}
   220→
   221→function isValidInterval(value: string): boolean {
   222→  const match = value.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
   223→  if (!match) return false
   224→  return parseInt(match[1]!, 10) > 0
   225→}
   226→
   227→function tomlString(value: string): string {
   228→  const escaped = value.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"')
   229→  return `"${escaped}"`
   230→}
   231→

1→/**
     2→ * Session list page: tabular index of all imported transcripts.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     6→import { clientBadge, escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, transcriptUrlFromRoot } from './layout.js'
     7→
     8→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
     9→// Transcript list
    10→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    11→
    12→export function renderTranscriptList(manifests: ManifestEntry[]): string {
    13→  const nav = renderNav('transcripts', false)
    14→
    15→  const sorted = [...manifests].sort((a, b) => b.started_at.localeCompare(a.started_at))
    16→
    17→  if (sorted.length === 0) {
    18→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
    19→  <h1>Sessions</h1>
    20→  <p class="subtitle">No sessions imported yet.</p>
    21→</div>`
    22→    return htmlShell('Sessions', content, nav)
    23→  }
    24→
    25→  const rows = sorted
    26→    .map(m => {
    27→      const url = transcriptHref(m)
    28→      const date = m.started_at.slice(0, 10)
    29→      const time = m.started_at.slice(11, 16)
    30→      const badge = clientBadge(m.client)
    31→      return `<tr>
    32→  <td>${badge}</td>
    33→  <td><a href="${escHtml(url)}">${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</a></td>
    34→  <td style="color:var(--text-muted)">${escHtml(date)} ${escHtml(time)}</td>
    35→  <td style="color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.8rem">${escHtml(m.session_id.slice(0, 8))}</td>
    36→  <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--text-muted)">${m.message_count}</td>
    37→  <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--text-muted)">${m.tool_event_count}</td>
    38→</tr>`
    39→    })
    40→    .join('')
    41→
    42→  const content = `<div class="page-header">
    43→  <h1>Sessions</h1>
    44→  <p class="subtitle">${sorted.length} session(s) imported</p>
    45→</div>
    46→<div class="card" style="padding:0;overflow:hidden">
    47→<table>
    48→<thead><tr>
    49→  <th>Client</th>
    50→  <th>Title</th>
    51→  <th>Date</th>
    52→  <th>ID</th>
    53→  <th style="text-align:right">Msgs</th>
    54→  <th style="text-align:right">Tools</th>
    55→</tr></thead>
    56→<tbody>${rows}</tbody>
    57→</table>
    58→</div>`
    59→
    60→  return htmlShell('Sessions', content, nav)
    61→}
    62→
    63→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    64→// Helper
    65→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    66→
    67→function transcriptHref(m: ManifestEntry): string {
    68→  // From transcripts/index.html, the URL is relative to the transcripts/ dir
    69→  // so we only need {client}/{stem}.html (no leading "transcripts/")
    70→  return transcriptUrlFromRoot(m).replace(/^transcripts\//, '')
    71→}
    72→

Read output=1→/** 2→ * MemoryTree heartbeat — single execution, stateless, idempotent. 3→ * Port of scripts/heartbeat.py 4→ */ 5→ 6→import type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcrip...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * MemoryTree heartbeat — single execution, stateless, idempotent.
     3→ * Port of scripts/heartbeat.py
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'
     7→import { discoverSourceFiles, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'
     8→import { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'
     9→import { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
    10→import { slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'
    11→import { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot } from '../transcript/discover.js'
    12→import type { Config } from './config.js'
    13→import { loadConfig } from './config.js'
    14→import { acquireLock, releaseLock } from './lock.js'
    15→import { resetFailureCount, writeAlert, writeAlertWithThreshold } from './alert.js'
    16→import type { LogLevel } from './log.js'
    17→import { getLogger, setupLogging } from './log.js'
    18→import { git } from '../utils/exec.js'
    19→import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    20→import { basename, join, resolve } from 'node:path'
    21→import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
    22→
    23→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    24→// Sensitive pattern detection
    25→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    26→
    27→const SENSITIVE_PATTERNS: readonly RegExp[] = [
    28→  /(?:api[_-]?key|apikey)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
    29→  /(?:password|passwd|pwd)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
    30→  /(?:secret|token)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
    31→  /(?:sk-|pk_live_|sk_live_|ghp_|gho_|glpat-)\S{10,}/,
    32→  /Bearer\s+\S{20,}/i,
    33→]
    34→
    35→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    36→// Main entry point
    37→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    38→
    39→export async function main(): Promise<number> {
    40→  const config = loadConfig()
    41→  setupLogging(config.log_level as LogLevel)
    42→  const logger = getLogger()
    43→
    44→  if (!acquireLock()) {
    45→    logger.info('Another heartbeat instance is running. Exiting.')
    46→    writeAlert('global', 'lock_held', 'Heartbeat exited: another instance held the lock.')
    47→    return 0
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  try {
    51→    return await runHeartbeat(config)
    52→  } finally {
    53→    releaseLock()
    54→  }
    55→}
    56→
    57→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    58→// Heartbeat orchestration
    59→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    60→
    61→export async function runHeartbeat(config: Config): Promise<number> {
    62→  const logger = getLogger()
    63→
    64→  if (config.projects.length === 0) {
    65→    logger.info('No projects registered in config.toml. Nothing to do.')
    66→    return 0
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  logger.info(`Heartbeat started. ${config.projects.length} project(s) registered.`)
    70→
    71→  for (const entry of config.projects) {
    72→    const projectPath = resolve(entry.path)
    73→    if (!existsSync(projectPath)) {
    74→      logger.warn(`Project path does not exist, skipping: ${projectPath}`)
    75→      continue
    76→    }
    77→    try {
    78→      await processProject(config, projectPath, entry.name || basename(projectPath))
    79→    } catch (err: unknown) {
    80→      logger.exception(`Error processing project: ${projectPath}`, err)
    81→      writeAlertWithThreshold(
    82→        toPosixPath(projectPath),
    83→        'push_failed',
    84→        `Heartbeat error for project: ${basename(projectPath)}`,
    85→      )
    86→    }
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  logger.info('Heartbeat finished.')
    90→  return 0
    91→}
    92→
    93→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    94→// Per-project processing
    95→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    96→
    97→export async function processProject(config: Config, projectPath: string, projectName: string): Promise<void> {
    98→  const logger = getLogger()
    99→  const repoSlug = slugify(projectName, 'project')
   100→  const globalRoot = defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
   101→
   102→  const discovered = discoverSourceFiles()
   103→  let importedCount = 0
   104→
   105→  for (const [client, source] of discovered) {
   106→    let parsed: ParsedTranscript
   107→    try {
   108→      parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
   109→    } catch {
   110→      logger.debug(`Failed to parse ${source}, skipping.`)
   111→      continue
   112→    }
   113→
   114→    if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) continue
   115→    if (!transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, projectPath, repoSlug)) continue
   116→
   117→    scanSensitive(parsed, projectPath)
   118→
   119→    try {
   120→      await importTranscript(parsed, projectPath, globalRoot, repoSlug, 'not-set', true)
   121→      importedCount++
   122→    } catch {
   123→      logger.exception(`Failed to import transcript: ${source}`)
   124→    }
   125→  }
   126→
   127→  if (importedCount === 0) {
   128→    logger.info(`[${projectName}] No new transcripts to import.`)
   129→    return
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  logger.info(`[${projectName}] Imported ${importedCount} transcript(s).`)
   133→  gitCommitAndPush(config, projectPath, projectName, importedCount)
   134→
   135→  if (config.generate_report) {
   136→    try {
   137→      const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')
   138→      await buildReport({
   139→        root: projectPath,
   140→        output: join(projectPath, 'Memory', '07_reports'),
   141→        noAi: !process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'],
   142→        model: config.ai_summary_model,
   143→      })
   144→      logger.info(`[${projectName}] Report generated.`)
   145→    } catch (err: unknown) {
   146→      logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Report generation failed: ${String(err)}`)
   147→      // Never propagate — report failure must not abort heartbeat cycle
   148→    }
   149→  }
   150→}
   151→
   152→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   153→// Sensitive pattern scanning
   154→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   155→
   156→export function scanSensitive(parsed: ParsedTranscript, projectPath: string): void {
   157→  const logger = getLogger()
   158→  for (const msg of parsed.messages) {
   159→    for (const pattern of SENSITIVE_PATTERNS) {
   160→      if (pattern.test(msg.text)) {
   161→        logger.warn(
   162→          `Sensitive pattern detected in transcript ${parsed.source_path} (project: ${basename(projectPath)}, role: ${msg.role})`,
   163→        )
   164→        writeAlert(
   165→          toPosixPath(projectPath),
   166→          'sensitive_match',
   167→          `Sensitive pattern in transcript: ${basename(parsed.source_path)}`,
   168→        )
   169→        return
   170→      }
   171→    }
   172→  }
   173→}
   174→
   175→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   176→// Git operations
   177→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   178→
   179→export function gitCommitAndPush(config: Config, projectPath: string, projectName: string, count: number): void {
   180→  const logger = getLogger()
   181→
   182→  const status = git(projectPath, 'status', '--porcelain', 'Memory/')
   183→  if (!status.trim()) {
   184→    logger.info(`[${projectName}] No git changes in Memory/.`)
   185→    return
   186→  }
   187→
   188→  git(projectPath, 'add', 'Memory/')
   189→  git(projectPath, 'commit', '-m', `memorytree(transcripts): import ${count} transcript(s)`)
   190→  logger.info(`[${projectName}] Committed ${count} transcript import(s).`)
   191→
   192→  if (!config.auto_push) {
   193→    logger.info(`[${projectName}] auto_push disabled, skipping push.`)
   194→    return
   195→  }
   196→
   197→  const remotes = git(projectPath, 'remote')
   198→  if (!remotes.trim()) {
   199→    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] No git remote configured, skipping push.`)
   200→    writeAlert(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'no_remote', 'Push skipped: no Git remote configured.')
   201→    return
   202→  }
   203→
   204→  if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
   205→    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Push failed, retrying once...`)
   206→    if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
   207→      logger.error(`[${projectName}] Push failed after retry.`)
   208→      writeAlertWithThreshold(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed', 'Push failed after retry.')
   209→      return
   210→    }
   211→  }
   212→
   213→  resetFailureCount(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed')
   214→}
   215→
   216→export function tryPush(projectPath: string, projectName: string): boolean {
   217→  try {
   218→    git(projectPath, 'push')
   219→    getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Pushed successfully.`)
   220→    return true
   221→  } catch {
   222→    return false
   223→  }
   224→}
   225→

1→// Types — ParsedTranscript, Message, ToolEvent interfaces
     2→// To be implemented in Phase 1
     3→
     4→export type Client = 'codex' | 'claude' | 'gemini'
     5→
     6→export interface TranscriptMessage {
     7→  role: string
     8→  text: string
     9→  timestamp: string | null
    10→}
    11→
    12→export interface TranscriptToolEvent {
    13→  summary: string
    14→  timestamp: string | null

    16→
    17→export interface ParsedTranscript {
    18→  client: Client
    19→  session_id: string
    20→  title: string
    21→  started_at: string
    22→  cwd: string
    23→  branch: string

    29→export interface ManifestEntry {

    33→  raw_sha256: string
    34→  title: string
    35→  started_at: string

    40→  raw_upload_permission: string
    41→  global_raw_path: string
    42→  global_clean_path: string
    43→  global_manifest_path: string
    44→  repo_raw_path: string
    45→  repo_clean_path: string
    46→  repo_manifest_path: string
    47→  message_count: number
    48→  tool_event_count: number
    49→  cleaning_mode: string
    50→  repo_mirror_enabled: boolean
    51→}

1→/**
     2→ * Dashboard page renderer: stat cards + SVG charts + recent sessions.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     6→import type { ReportStats } from '../../types/report.js'
     7→import { clientBadge, escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, transcriptUrlFromRoot } from './layout.js'
     8→import { renderHeatmap, renderClientDoughnut, renderWeeklyLine, renderToolBar } from './charts.js'
     9→
    10→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    11→// Dashboard
    12→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    13→
    14→export function renderDashboard(stats: ReportStats, manifests: ManifestEntry[]): string {
    15→  const nav = renderNav('dashboard', true)
    16→  const content = [
    17→    renderPageHeader(stats),
    18→    renderStatsCards(stats),
    19→    renderCharts(stats),
    20→    renderRecentSessions(manifests),
    21→  ].join('\n')
    22→
    23→  return htmlShell('Dashboard', content, nav)
    24→}
    25→
    26→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    27→// Internal renderers
    28→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    29→
    30→function renderPageHeader(stats: ReportStats): string {
    31→  const from = stats.dateRange.from.slice(0, 10) || '—'
    32→  const to = stats.dateRange.to.slice(0, 10) || '—'
    33→  return `<div class="page-header">
    34→  <h1>Memory Dashboard</h1>
    35→  <p class="subtitle">Activity from ${escHtml(from)} to ${escHtml(to)}</p>
    36→</div>`
    37→}
    38→
    39→function renderStatsCards(stats: ReportStats): string {
    40→  const cards = [
    41→    { value: fmtNum(stats.totalSessions), label: 'Sessions' },
    42→    { value: fmtNum(stats.totalMessages), label: 'Messages' },
    43→    { value: fmtNum(stats.totalToolEvents), label: 'Tool Events' },
    44→    { value: fmtNum(stats.activeDays), label: 'Active Days' },
    45→  ]
    46→
    47→  const html = cards
    48→    .map(
    49→      c => `<div class="card">
    50→  <div class="card-title">${c.label}</div>
    51→  <div class="stat-value">${c.value}</div>
    52→</div>`,
    53→    )
    54→    .join('')
    55→
    56→  return `<div class="stats-grid">${html}</div>`
    57→}
    58→
    59→function renderCharts(stats: ReportStats): string {
    60→  const heatmap = renderHeatmap(stats.dayBuckets)
    61→  const doughnut = renderClientDoughnut(stats.clientCounts)
    62→  const line = renderWeeklyLine(stats.weekBuckets)
    63→  const bar = renderToolBar(stats.toolCounts)
    64→
    65→  return `<div class="chart-grid">
    66→  <div class="chart-card full-width">
    67→    <div class="chart-title">Activity (last 365 days)</div>
    68→    ${heatmap}
    69→  </div>
    70→  <div class="chart-card">
    71→    <div class="chart-title">Client Distribution</div>
    72→    ${doughnut}
    73→  </div>
    74→  <div class="chart-card">
    75→    <div class="chart-title">Messages / Week (last 52 weeks)</div>
    76→    ${line}
    77→  </div>
    78→  <div class="chart-card full-width">
    79→    <div class="chart-title">Top 10 Tools</div>
    80→    ${bar}
    81→  </div>
    82→</div>`
    83→}
    84→
    85→function renderRecentSessions(manifests: ManifestEntry[]): string {
    86→  const recent = [...manifests]
    87→    .sort((a, b) => b.started_at.localeCompare(a.started_at))
    88→    .slice(0, 10)
    89→
    90→  if (recent.length === 0) {
    91→    return `<div class="card"><p style="color:var(--text-muted)">No sessions imported yet.</p></div>`
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  const rows = recent
    95→    .map(m => {
    96→      const url = transcriptHref(m)
    97→      const date = m.started_at.slice(0, 10)
    98→      const badge = clientBadge(m.client)
    99→      const msgs = m.message_count
   100→      const tools = m.tool_event_count
   101→      return `<tr>
   102→  <td>${badge}</td>
   103→  <td><a href="${escHtml(url)}">${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</a></td>
   104→  <td style="color:var(--text-muted)">${escHtml(date)}</td>
   105→  <td style="color:var(--text-muted);text-align:right">${msgs}</td>
   106→  <td style="color:var(--text-muted);text-align:right">${tools}</td>
   107→</tr>`
   108→    })
   109→    .join('')
   110→
   111→  return `<h2>Recent Sessions</h2>
   112→<div class="card" style="padding:0;overflow:hidden">
   113→<table>
   114→<thead><tr>
   115→  <th>Client</th><th>Title</th><th>Date</th>
   116→  <th style="text-align:right">Msgs</th>
   117→  <th style="text-align:right">Tools</th>
   118→</tr></thead>
   119→<tbody>${rows}</tbody>
   120→</table>
   121→</div>`
   122→}
   123→
   124→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   125→// Helpers
   126→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   127→
   128→function fmtNum(n: number): string {
   129→  return n.toLocaleString('en-US')
   130→}
   131→
   132→function transcriptHref(m: ManifestEntry): string {
   133→  return transcriptUrlFromRoot(m)
   134→}
   135→
   136→
