1→import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, afterEach, vi } from 'vitest'
     2→import { mkdtempSync, writeFileSync, readFileSync, rmSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'
     3→import { join } from 'node:path'
     4→import { tmpdir } from 'node:os'
     5→
     6→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
     7→// Mock homedir so all path helpers point to a temp directory
     8→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
     9→
    10→let tmpDir: string
    11→
    12→vi.mock('node:os', async () => {
    13→  const actual = await vi.importActual<typeof import('node:os')>('node:os')
    14→  return {
    15→    ...actual,
    16→    homedir: () => tmpDir,
    17→  }
    18→})
    19→
    20→// Import after mock setup so configPath() / memorytreeRoot() use the mock
    21→import {
    22→  loadConfig,
    23→  saveConfig,
    24→  intervalToSeconds,
    25→  registerProject,
    26→  configPath,
    27→  memorytreeRoot,
    28→} from '../../src/heartbeat/config.js'
    29→
    30→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    31→// Setup / Teardown
    32→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    33→
    34→beforeEach(() => {
    35→  tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'cfg-test-'))
    36→})
    37→
    38→afterEach(() => {
    39→  rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true })
    40→})
    41→
    42→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    43→// configPath / memorytreeRoot
    44→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    45→
    46→describe('configPath / memorytreeRoot', () => {
    47→  it('memorytreeRoot returns <home>/.memorytree', () => {
    48→    const root = memorytreeRoot()
    49→    expect(root).toContain('.memorytree')
    50→    expect(root.startsWith(tmpDir)).toBe(true)
    51→  })
    52→
    53→  it('configPath returns <home>/.memorytree/config.toml', () => {
    54→    const path = configPath()
    55→    expect(path).toContain('config.toml')
    56→    expect(path.startsWith(tmpDir)).toBe(true)
    57→  })
    58→})
    59→
    60→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61→// loadConfig
    62→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    63→
    64→describe('loadConfig', () => {
    65→  it('returns defaults when config file does not exist', () => {
    66→    const cfg = loadConfig()
    67→    expect(cfg.heartbeat_interval).toBe('5m')
    68→    expect(cfg.auto_push).toBe(true)
    69→    expect(cfg.log_level).toBe('info')
    70→    expect(cfg.watch_dirs).toEqual([])
    71→    expect(cfg.projects).toEqual([])
    72→  })
    73→
    74→  it('parses valid TOML file', () => {
    75→    const path = configPath()
    76→    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, '.memorytree'), { recursive: true })
    77→    writeFileSync(
    78→      path,
    79→      [
    80→        'heartbeat_interval = "10m"',
    81→        'auto_push = false',
    82→        'log_level = "debug"',
    83→        'watch_dirs = ["/home/user/repos"]',
    84→        '',
    85→        '[[projects]]',
    86→        'path = "/home/user/project-a"',
    87→        'name = "project-a"',
    88→        '',
    89→      ].join('\n'),
    90→    )
    91→
    92→    const cfg = loadConfig()
    93→    expect(cfg.heartbeat_interval).toBe('10m')
    94→    expect(cfg.auto_push).toBe(false)
    95→    expect(cfg.log_level).toBe('debug')
    96→    expect(cfg.watch_dirs).toEqual(['/home/user/repos'])
    97→    expect(cfg.projects).toHaveLength(1)
    98→    expect(cfg.projects[0]!.path).toBe('/home/user/project-a')
    99→    expect(cfg.projects[0]!.name).toBe('project-a')
   100→  })
   101→
   102→  it('returns defaults for invalid TOML', () => {
   103→    const path = configPath()
   104→    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, '.memorytree'), { recursive: true })
   105→    writeFileSync(path, '<<<not valid toml>>>')
   106→
   107→    const cfg = loadConfig()
   108→    expect(cfg.heartbeat_interval).toBe('5m')
   109→    expect(cfg.auto_push).toBe(true)
   110→  })
   111→
   112→  it('uses defaults for missing or invalid fields', () => {
   113→    const path = configPath()
   114→    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, '.memorytree'), { recursive: true })
   115→    // Only set heartbeat_interval; other fields should default
   116→    writeFileSync(path, 'heartbeat_interval = "1h"\n')
   117→
   118→    const cfg = loadConfig()
   119→    expect(cfg.heartbeat_interval).toBe('1h')
   120→    expect(cfg.auto_push).toBe(true)
   121→    expect(cfg.log_level).toBe('info')
   122→    expect(cfg.watch_dirs).toEqual([])
   123→    expect(cfg.projects).toEqual([])
   124→  })
   125→})
   126→
   127→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   128→// saveConfig
   129→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   130→
   131→describe('saveConfig', () => {
   132→  it('roundtrip: save then load yields equivalent config', () => {
   133→    const original = {
   134→      heartbeat_interval: '10m',
   135→      auto_push: false,
   136→      log_level: 'debug',
   137→      watch_dirs: ['/repos/a', '/repos/b'],
   138→      projects: [
   139→        { path: '/home/user/project-a', name: 'project-a' },
   140→        { path: '/home/user/project-b', name: 'project-b' },
   141→      ],
   142→      generate_report: true,
   143→      ai_summary_model: 'claude-opus-4-6',
   144→    } as const
   145→
   146→    saveConfig(original)
   147→    const loaded = loadConfig()
   148→
   149→    expect(loaded.heartbeat_interval).toBe(original.heartbeat_interval)
   150→    expect(loaded.auto_push).toBe(original.auto_push)
   151→    expect(loaded.log_level).toBe(original.log_level)
   152→    expect(loaded.watch_dirs).toEqual([...original.watch_dirs])
   153→    expect(loaded.projects).toHaveLength(2)
   154→    expect(loaded.projects[0]!.path).toBe(original.projects[0]!.path)
   155→    expect(loaded.projects[1]!.name).toBe(original.projects[1]!.name)
   156→    expect(loaded.generate_report).toBe(original.generate_report)
   157→    expect(loaded.ai_summary_model).toBe(original.ai_summary_model)
   158→  })
   159→
   160→  it('serializes empty projects list', () => {
   161→    const cfg = {
   162→      heartbeat_interval: '5m',
   163→      auto_push: true,
   164→      log_level: 'info',
   165→      watch_dirs: [],
   166→      projects: [],
   167→      generate_report: false,
   168→      ai_summary_model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
   169→    } as const
   170→
   171→    saveConfig(cfg)
   172→
   173→    const text = readFileSync(configPath(), 'utf-8')
   174→    expect(text).toContain('heartbeat_interval = "5m"')
   175→    expect(text).toContain('auto_push = true')
   176→    expect(text).not.toContain('[[projects]]')
   177→  })
   178→})
   179→
   180→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   181→// intervalToSeconds
   182→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   183→
   184→describe('intervalToSeconds', () => {
   185→  it('parses minutes: 5m -> 300', () => {
   186→    expect(intervalToSeconds('5m')).toBe(300)
   187→  })
   188→
   189→  it('parses hours: 1h -> 3600', () => {
   190→    expect(intervalToSeconds('1h')).toBe(3600)
   191→  })
   192→
   193→  it('parses seconds: 30s -> 30', () => {
   194→    expect(intervalToSeconds('30s')).toBe(30)
   195→  })
   196→
   197→  it('returns default (300) for invalid input', () => {
   198→    expect(intervalToSeconds('invalid')).toBe(300)
   199→  })
   200→
   201→  it('returns default (300) for zero value', () => {
   202→    expect(intervalToSeconds('0m')).toBe(300)
   203→  })
   204→
   205→  it('handles leading/trailing whitespace', () => {
   206→    expect(intervalToSeconds('  10m  ')).toBe(600)
   207→  })
   208→
   209→  it('is case-insensitive', () => {
   210→    expect(intervalToSeconds('2H')).toBe(7200)
   211→  })
   212→})
   213→
   214→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   215→// registerProject
   216→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   217→
   218→describe('registerProject', () => {
   219→  it('adds a new project to an empty list', () => {
   220→    const cfg = {
   221→      heartbeat_interval: '5m',
   222→      auto_push: true,
   223→      log_level: 'info',
   224→      watch_dirs: [],
   225→      projects: [],
   226→      generate_report: false,
   227→      ai_summary_model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
   228→    } as const
   229→
   230→    const updated = registerProject(cfg, tmpDir)
   231→    expect(updated.projects).toHaveLength(1)
   232→    expect(updated.projects[0]!.path).toBeTruthy()
   233→    // Name derived from last path segment
   234→    expect(updated.projects[0]!.name).toBeTruthy()
   235→  })
   236→
   237→  it('skips duplicate project (by resolved path)', () => {
   238→    const cfg = {
   239→      heartbeat_interval: '5m',
   240→      auto_push: true,
   241→      log_level: 'info',
   242→      watch_dirs: [],
   243→      projects: [],
   244→      generate_report: false,
   245→      ai_summary_model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
   246→    } as const
   247→
   248→    const updated1 = registerProject(cfg, tmpDir)
   249→    const updated2 = registerProject(updated1, tmpDir)
   250→    expect(updated2.projects).toHaveLength(1)
   251→  })
   252→
   253→  it('does not mutate the original config', () => {
   254→    const cfg = {
   255→      heartbeat_interval: '5m',
   256→      auto_push: true,
   257→      log_level: 'info',
   258→      watch_dirs: [],
   259→      projects: [],
   260→      generate_report: false,
   261→      ai_summary_model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
   262→    } as const
   263→
   264→    const updated = registerProject(cfg, tmpDir)
   265→    expect(cfg.projects).toHaveLength(0)
   266→    expect(updated.projects).toHaveLength(1)
   267→  })
   268→})
   269→
   270→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   271→// New fields: generate_report and ai_summary_model
   272→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   273→
   274→describe('generate_report and ai_summary_model fields', () => {
   275→  it('defaults to false and haiku model', () => {
   276→    const cfg = loadConfig()
   277→    expect(cfg.generate_report).toBe(false)
   278→    expect(cfg.ai_summary_model).toBe('claude-haiku-4-5-20251001')
   279→  })
   280→
   281→  it('parses generate_report from TOML', () => {
   282→    const path = configPath()
   283→    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, '.memorytree'), { recursive: true })
   284→    writeFileSync(
   285→      path,
   286→      ['generate_report = true', 'ai_summary_model = "claude-opus-4-6"', ''].join('\n'),
   287→    )
   288→    const cfg = loadConfig()
   289→    expect(cfg.generate_report).toBe(true)
   290→    expect(cfg.ai_summary_model).toBe('claude-opus-4-6')
   291→  })
   292→
   293→  it('defaults generate_report on invalid value', () => {
   294→    const path = configPath()
   295→    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, '.memorytree'), { recursive: true })
   296→    writeFileSync(path, 'generate_report = "yes"\n')
   297→    const cfg = loadConfig()
   298→    expect(cfg.generate_report).toBe(false)
   299→  })
   300→
   301→  it('defaults ai_summary_model on empty value', () => {
   302→    const path = configPath()
   303→    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, '.memorytree'), { recursive: true })
   304→    writeFileSync(path, 'ai_summary_model = ""\n')
   305→    const cfg = loadConfig()
   306→    expect(cfg.ai_summary_model).toBe('claude-haiku-4-5-20251001')
   307→  })
   308→
   309→  it('round-trips generate_report and ai_summary_model', () => {
   310→    const original = {
   311→      heartbeat_interval: '5m',
   312→      auto_push: true,
   313→      log_level: 'info',
   314→      watch_dirs: [],
   315→      projects: [],
   316→      generate_report: true,
   317→      ai_summary_model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
   318→    } as const
   319→
   320→    saveConfig(original)
   321→    const loaded = loadConfig()
   322→    expect(loaded.generate_report).toBe(true)
   323→    expect(loaded.ai_summary_model).toBe('claude-sonnet-4-6')
   324→  })
   325→})
   326→

Read output=1→import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, afterEach } from 'vitest' 2→import { 3→ mkdtempSync, 4→ mkdirSync, 5→ writeFileSync, 6→ readFileSync, 7→ rmSync, 8→ existsSync, 9→ r...

1→import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, afterEach } from 'vitest'
     2→import {
     3→  mkdtempSync,
     4→  mkdirSync,
     5→  writeFileSync,
     6→  readFileSync,
     7→  rmSync,
     8→  existsSync,
     9→  readdirSync,
    10→} from 'node:fs'
    11→import { join } from 'node:path'
    12→import { tmpdir } from 'node:os'
    13→import { buildReport, ensureGitignore, parseMessagesFromMarkdown } from '../../src/report/build.js'
    14→
    15→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16→// Setup
    17→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    18→
    19→let tmpDir: string
    20→
    21→beforeEach(() => {
    22→  tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'build-test-'))
    23→  delete process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY']
    24→})
    25→
    26→afterEach(() => {
    27→  rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true })
    28→  delete process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY']
    29→})
    30→
    31→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    32→// ensureGitignore
    33→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    34→
    35→describe('ensureGitignore', () => {
    36→  it('creates .gitignore with entry if missing', () => {
    37→    ensureGitignore(tmpDir, 'Memory/07_reports/')
    38→    const path = join(tmpDir, '.gitignore')
    39→    expect(existsSync(path)).toBe(true)
    40→    const content = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
    41→    expect(content).toContain('Memory/07_reports/')
    42→  })
    43→
    44→  it('appends to existing .gitignore', () => {
    45→    const path = join(tmpDir, '.gitignore')
    46→    writeFileSync(path, 'node_modules/\ndist/\n', 'utf-8')
    47→    ensureGitignore(tmpDir, 'Memory/07_reports/')
    48→    const content = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
    49→    expect(content).toContain('node_modules/')
    50→    expect(content).toContain('Memory/07_reports/')
    51→  })
    52→
    53→  it('does not add duplicate entry', () => {
    54→    const path = join(tmpDir, '.gitignore')
    55→    writeFileSync(path, 'Memory/07_reports/\n', 'utf-8')
    56→    ensureGitignore(tmpDir, 'Memory/07_reports/')
    57→    const content = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
    58→    const count = (content.match(/Memory\/07_reports\//g) ?? []).length
    59→    expect(count).toBe(1)
    60→  })

Write input={"content":"/**\n * i18n system: build-time locale loading.\n * Supported: 'en' (default), 'zh-CN'. Unknown locales fall back to 'en'.\n */\n\nexport interface Translations {\n ...
Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/i18n/index.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * i18n system: build-time locale loading.\n * Supported: 'en' (default), 'zh-CN'. Unknown locales fall back to 'en'.\n */\n\nexport interface Translations {\n  nav: {\n    dashboard: string\n    sessions: string\n    projects: string\n    graph: string\n    goals: string\n    todos: string\n    knowledge: string\n    archive: string\n    search: string\n  }\n  dashboard: {\n    title: string\n    subtitle: string\n    sessions: string\n    messages: string\n    toolEvents: string\n    activeDays: string\n    recentSessions: string\n  }\n  sessions: {\n    title: string\n    noSessions: string\n    client: string\n    date: string\n    id: string\n    msgs: string\n    tools: string\n    all: string\n  }\n  transcript: {\n    aiSummary: string\n    referencedBy: string\n    messages: string\n    noMessages: string\n    client: string\n    sessionId: string\n    branch: string\n    workingDir: string\n    sha256: string\n    toolEvents: string\n  }\n  graph: {\n    title: string\n    subtitle: string\n    noData: string\n  }\n  projects: {\n    title: string\n    noProjects: string\n    sessions: string\n  }\n  search: {\n    title: string\n    placeholder: string\n    results: string\n    noResults: string\n  }\n  common: {\n    loading: string\n    unknown: string\n  }\n}\n\nexport function loadLocale(locale: string): Translations {\n  if (locale === 'zh-CN') {\n    // Dynamic require-style import avoided: use static imports\n    return _zhCN()\n  }\n  return _en()\n}\n\n// Lazy loaders to avoid circular deps at module init time\nfunction _en(): Translations {\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-require-imports\n  return (require('./en.js') as { en: Translations }).en\n}\n\nfunction _zhCN(): Translations {\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-require-imports\n  return (require('./zh-CN.js') as { zhCN: Translations }).zhCN\n}\n"
}

  "content": "/**\n * i18n system: build-time locale loading.\n * Supported: 'en' (default), 'zh-CN'. Unknown locales fall back to 'en'.\n */\n\nexport interface Translations {\n  nav: {\n    dashboard: string\n    sessions: string\n    projects: string\n    graph: string\n    goals: string\n    todos: string\n    knowledge: string\n    archive: string\n    search: string\n  }\n  dashboard: {\n    title: string\n    subtitle: string\n    sessions: string\n    messages: string\n    toolEvents: string\n    activeDays: string\n    recentSessions: string\n  }\n  sessions: {\n    title: string\n    noSessions: string\n    client: string\n    date: string\n    id: string\n    msgs: string\n    tools: string\n    all: string\n  }\n  transcript: {\n    aiSummary: string\n    referencedBy: string\n    messages: string\n    noMessages: string\n    client: string\n    sessionId: string\n    branch: string\n    workingDir: string\n    sha256: string\n    toolEvents: string\n  }\n  graph: {\n    title: string\n    subtitle: string\n    noData: string\n  }\n  projects: {\n    title: string\n    noProjects: string\n    sessions: string\n  }\n  search: {\n    title: string\n    placeholder: string\n    results: string\n    noResults: string\n  }\n  common: {\n    loading: string\n    unknown: string\n  }\n}\n\nimport { en } from './en.js'\nimport { zhCN } from './zh-CN.js'\n\nconst LOCALES: Record<string, Translations> = {\n  'en': en,\n  'zh-CN': zhCN,\n}\n\nexport function loadLocale(locale: string): Translations {\n  return LOCALES[locale] ?? en\n}\n"
}

{\n  --bg: #ffffff;\n  --bg-secondary: #f6f8fa;\n  --bg-card: #ffffff;\n  --border: #d0d7de;\n  --text: #1f2328;\n  --text-muted: #636c76;\n  --accent: #0969da;\n  --accent-hover: #0550ae;\n  --user-bg: #ddf4ff;\n  --user-border: #54aeff44;\n  --assistant-bg: #f6f8fa;\n  --assistant-border: #d0d7de;\n  --code-bg: #f6f8fa;\n  --green-0: #f6f8fa;\n  --green-1: #acf2bd;\n  --green-2: #40c463;\n  --green-3: #30a14e;\n  --green-4: #216e39;\n}\n\n*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }\n\nhtml { font-size: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; }\n\nbody {\n  background: var(--bg);\n  color: var(--text);\n  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;\n  line-height: 1.6;\n  min-height: 100vh;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n}\n\na { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; }\na:hover { color: var(--accent-hover); text-decoration: underline; }\n\ncode {\n  font-family: var(--font-mono);\n  font-size: 0.875em;\n  background: var(--code-bg);\n  padding: 0.15em 0.4em;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n}\n\npre {\n  background: var(--code-bg);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  overflow-x: auto;\n  margin: 0.75rem 0;\n}\n\npre code {\n  background: none;\n  border: none;\n  padding: 0;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n}\n\nh1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {\n  color: var(--text);\n  line-height: 1.3;\n  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n}\n\nh1 { font-size: 1.75rem; }\nh2 { font-size: 1.375rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }\nh3 { font-size: 1.125rem; }\n\np { margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }\n\nul, ol { padding-left: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }\nli { margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }\n\ntable { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.9rem; }\nth, td { padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }\nth { color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; background: var(--bg-secondary); }\ntr:hover td { background: var(--bg-secondary); }\n\n/* ── Mobile topbar ── */\n.topbar {\n  display: none;\n  background: var(--bg-secondary);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\n  padding: 0 1rem;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.75rem;\n  height: 48px;\n  position: sticky;\n  top: 0;\n  z-index: 200;\n}\n\n.topbar-brand {\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-size: 0.95rem;\n  color: var(--text);\n  flex: 1;\n}\n\n.topbar-actions {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.hamburger, .theme-toggle-btn {\n  background: none;\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  color: var(--text);\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  font-size: 1rem;\n  line-height: 1;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n}\n\n.hamburger:hover, .theme-toggle-btn:hover {\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n}\n\n/* ── Sidebar ── */\n.sidebar {\n  width: var(--sidebar-width);\n  background: var(--bg-secondary);\n  border-right: 1px solid var(--border);\n  position: fixed;\n  top: 0;\n  left: 0;\n  bottom: 0;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  z-index: 150;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  transition: transform 0.2s ease;\n}\n\n.sidebar-header {\n  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.sidebar-brand {\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-size: 1rem;\n  color: var(--text);\n}\n\n.sidebar-nav {\n  flex: 1;\n  padding: 0.5rem 0;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n}\n\n.nav-section-label {\n  padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem 0.25rem;\n  font-size: 0.7rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.08em;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.nav-link {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.45rem 1.25rem;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n  transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s;\n  border-radius: 0;\n}\n\n.nav-link:hover {\n  color: var(--text);\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  text-decoration: none;\n}\n\n.nav-link.active {\n  color: var(--accent);\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);\n  padding-left: calc(1.25rem - 3px);\n}\n\n.sidebar-footer {\n  padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem;\n  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.sidebar-footer .theme-toggle-btn {\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n  padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem;\n  gap: 0.3rem;\n}\n\n/* ── Overlay (mobile) ── */\n.sidebar-overlay {\n  display: none;\n  position: fixed;\n  inset: 0;\n  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);\n  z-index: 140;\n}\n\n/* ── Main content ── */\n.main-content {\n  margin-left: var(--sidebar-width);\n  flex: 1;\n  min-height: 100vh;\n}\n\n.container {\n  max-width: 960px;\n  margin: 0 auto;\n  padding: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n.page-header { margin-bottom: 2rem; }\n.page-header h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; }\n.page-header .subtitle { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 0.25rem; }\n\n/* ── Cards ── */\n.card {\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1.25rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n}\n\n.card-title {\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.05em;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.stat-value {\n  font-size: 2rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  color: var(--text);\n  line-height: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-label { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 0.25rem; }\n\n.stats-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr));\n  gap: 1rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n/* ── Charts ── */\n.chart-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n  gap: 1rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 900px) {\n  .chart-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n}\n\n.chart-card {\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1.25rem;\n}\n\n.chart-title {\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n}\n\n.chart-card svg { display: block; width: 100%; overflow: visible; }\n.chart-card.full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; }\n\n/* ── Badge ── */\n.badge {\n  display: inline-block;\n  padding: 0.2em 0.6em;\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.04em;\n}\n\n.badge-codex { background: #1f6feb33; color: #58a6ff; border: 1px solid #1f6feb66; }\n.badge-claude { background: #6e40c933; color: #bc8cff; border: 1px solid #6e40c966; }\n.badge-gemini { background: #1a7f3733; color: #3fb950; border: 1px solid #1a7f3766; }\n.badge-unknown { background: #30363d33; color: #8b949e; border: 1px solid #30363d66; }\n\n/* ── Tab bar ── */\n.tab-bar {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 0.25rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.tab-btn {\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem;\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: all 0.15s;\n}\n\n.tab-btn:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: var(--accent); }\n.tab-btn.active { color: var(--accent); border-color: var(--accent); background: var(--bg-secondary); }\n\n/* ── Messages ── */\n.messages { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 1rem; }\n\n.message {\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  border: 1px solid;\n  max-width: 100%;\n}\n\n.message-user {\n  background: var(--user-bg);\n  border-color: var(--user-border);\n  align-self: flex-start;\n}\n\n.message-assistant {\n  background: var(--assistant-bg);\n  border-color: var(--assistant-border);\n}\n\n.message-header {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.message-role {\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  text-transform: capitalize;\n}\n\n.message-user .message-role { color: #58a6ff; }\n.message-assistant .message-role { color: #8b949e; }\n\n.message-body { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; word-break: break-word; }\n.message-body p { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }\n.message-body p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }\n\n/* ── Summary card ── */\n.summary-card {\n  background: #161b22;\n  border: 1px solid #30363d;\n  border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.summary-card .summary-label {\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.05em;\n  color: var(--accent);\n  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n/* ── Metadata table ── */\n.meta-table { font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }\n.meta-table td:first-child { color: var(--text-muted); width: 140px; font-weight: 500; }\n\n/* ── Backlinks ── */\n.backlinks {\n  background: var(--bg-secondary);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n}\n\n.backlinks-title { font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; }\n.backlinks ul { padding-left: 1rem; }\n\n/* ── Search ── */\n.search-box {\n  width: 100%;\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n  color: var(--text);\n  font-size: 1rem;\n  font-family: inherit;\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n  outline: none;\n  transition: border-color 0.15s;\n}\n\n.search-box:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }\n\n.search-results { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; }\n\n.search-result {\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  transition: border-color 0.15s;\n}\n\n.search-result:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }\n.search-result-title { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }\n.search-result-meta { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }\n.search-result-snippet { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); }\n.search-result mark { background: #3d3000; color: var(--warning); border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 0.1em; }\n#search-count { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }\n\n/* ── Heatmap legend ── */\n.heatmap-legend {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.4rem;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  margin-top: 0.5rem;\n  justify-content: flex-end;\n}\n\n/* ── Popover ── */\n.popover {\n  position: fixed;\n  z-index: 500;\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n  max-width: 320px;\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);\n  pointer-events: none;\n}\n\n.popover-meta { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.78rem; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }\n.popover-summary { color: var(--text); line-height: 1.5; }\n\n/* ── Graph canvas ── */\n#graph-canvas {\n  display: block;\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 600px;\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  background: var(--bg-secondary);\n  cursor: grab;\n}\n\n#graph-canvas:active { cursor: grabbing; }\n\n.graph-legend {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 1.25rem;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  margin-top: 0.75rem;\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.graph-legend-item {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n.graph-legend-dot {\n  width: 10px;\n  height: 10px;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n/* ── Project cards ── */\n.project-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));\n  gap: 1rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n.project-card {\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1.25rem;\n  transition: border-color 0.15s;\n}\n\n.project-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }\n.project-card-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }\n.project-card-meta { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-muted); }\n.project-card-clients { margin-top: 0.6rem; display: flex; gap: 0.35rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }\n\n/* ── Responsive: tablet (768-1024px) ── */\n@media (max-width: 1024px) and (min-width: 769px) {\n  :root { --sidebar-width: 200px; }\n}\n\n/* ── Responsive: mobile (<768px) ── */\n@media (max-width: 768px) {\n  .topbar { display: flex; }\n  .sidebar {\n    transform: translateX(-100%);\n    top: 48px;\n  }\n  .sidebar.open { transform: translateX(0); }\n  .sidebar-overlay.open { display: block; }\n  .main-content { margin-left: 0; }\n  .container { padding: 1rem 0.75rem; }\n  .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }\n  .project-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n}\n`\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/layout.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * HTML layout helpers: shell, navigation, and HTML escaping.\n */\n\nimport { basename } from 'node:path'\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'\nimport type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'\nimport { REPORT_CSS } from './css.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// HTML escaping\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function escHtml(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')\n    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')\n    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')\n    .replace(/\"/g, '&quot;')\n    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;')\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Navigation page IDs\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport type NavPage =\n  | 'dashboard'\n  | 'transcripts'\n  | 'projects'\n  | 'graph'\n  | 'goals'\n  | 'todos'\n  | 'knowledge'\n  | 'archive'\n  | 'search'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Sidebar navigation\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nconst SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS = `\n<script>\n(function() {\n  // Theme\n  var saved = localStorage.getItem('mt-theme') || 'dark';\n  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', saved);\n  function updateThemeBtn() {\n    var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');\n    if (btn) btn.textContent = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? '☀ Light' : '☾ Dark';\n  }\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n    updateThemeBtn();\n    var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');\n    if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', function() {\n      var next = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';\n      document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', next);\n      localStorage.setItem('mt-theme', next);\n      updateThemeBtn();\n    });\n    // Mobile hamburger\n    var hb = document.getElementById('hamburger');\n    var sb = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n    var ov = document.getElementById('sidebar-overlay');\n    function closeSidebar() {\n      if (sb) sb.classList.remove('open');\n      if (ov) ov.classList.remove('open');\n    }\n    if (hb) hb.addEventListener('click', function() {\n      if (sb) sb.classList.toggle('open');\n      if (ov) ov.classList.toggle('open');\n    });\n    if (ov) ov.addEventListener('click', closeSidebar);\n    // Popover preview\n    var popover = null;\n    document.querySelectorAll('a[data-summary]').forEach(function(el) {\n      el.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(e) {\n        var summary = el.getAttribute('data-summary') || '';\n        var meta = el.getAttribute('data-meta') || '';\n        if (!summary && !meta) return;\n        if (!popover) {\n          popover = document.createElement('div');\n          popover.className = 'popover';\n          document.body.appendChild(popover);\n        }\n        popover.innerHTML = (meta ? '<div class=\"popover-meta\">' + meta + '</div>' : '') +\n          (summary ? '<div class=\"popover-summary\">' + summary + '</div>' : '');\n        popover.style.display = 'block';\n        positionPopover(e);\n      });\n      el.addEventListener('mousemove', positionPopover);\n      el.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {\n        if (popover) popover.style.display = 'none';\n      });\n    });\n    function positionPopover(e) {\n      if (!popover) return;\n      var x = e.clientX + 12;\n      var y = e.clientY + 12;\n      var pw = popover.offsetWidth || 320;\n      var ph = popover.offsetHeight || 80;\n      if (x + pw > window.innerWidth - 8) x = e.clientX - pw - 12;\n      if (y + ph > window.innerHeight - 8) y = e.clientY - ph - 12;\n      popover.style.left = x + 'px';\n      popover.style.top = y + 'px';\n    }\n  });\n})();\n</script>`\n\ninterface NavItem {\n  id: NavPage\n  icon: string\n  labelKey: keyof Translations['nav']\n  href: string\n}\n\nfunction buildNavItems(rootLevel: boolean): NavItem[] {\n  const p = rootLevel ? '' : '../'\n  return [\n    { id: 'dashboard', icon: '◈', labelKey: 'dashboard', href: `${p}index.html` },\n    { id: 'transcripts', icon: '💬', labelKey: 'sessions', href: `${p}transcripts/index.html` },\n    { id: 'projects', icon: '📁', labelKey: 'projects', href: `${p}projects/index.html` },\n    { id: 'graph', icon: '⬡', labelKey: 'graph', href: `${p}graph.html` },\n    { id: 'goals', icon: '🎯', labelKey: 'goals', href: `${p}goals/index.html` },\n    { id: 'todos', icon: '✓', labelKey: 'todos', href: `${p}todos/index.html` },\n    { id: 'knowledge', icon: '📚', labelKey: 'knowledge', href: `${p}knowledge/index.html` },\n    { id: 'archive', icon: '🗄', labelKey: 'archive', href: `${p}archive/index.html` },\n    { id: 'search', icon: '🔍', labelKey: 'search', href: `${p}search.html` },\n  ]\n}\n\nexport function renderNav(current: NavPage, rootLevel: boolean, t?: Translations): string {\n  const items = buildNavItems(rootLevel)\n\n  // Labels for each nav item\n  const label = (item: NavItem): string => {\n    if (t) return t.nav[item.labelKey]\n    // Fallback English labels\n    const defaults: Record<string, string> = {\n      dashboard: 'Dashboard', sessions: 'Sessions', projects: 'Projects',\n      graph: 'Graph', goals: 'Goals', todos: 'Todos',\n      knowledge: 'Knowledge', archive: 'Archive', search: 'Search',\n    }\n    return defaults[item.labelKey] ?? item.labelKey\n  }\n\n  const themeLabel = '☀ Light'\n\n  const navLinks = items.map(item => {\n    const cls = item.id === current ? 'nav-link active' : 'nav-link'\n    return `<a href=\"${escHtml(item.href)}\" class=\"${cls}\">${escHtml(item.icon)} ${escHtml(label(item))}</a>`\n  }).join('\\n      ')\n\n  return `<aside class=\"sidebar\" id=\"sidebar\">\n  <div class=\"sidebar-header\">\n    <span class=\"sidebar-brand\">MemoryTree</span>\n  </div>\n  <nav class=\"sidebar-nav\">\n    ${navLinks}\n  </nav>\n  <div class=\"sidebar-footer\">\n    <button class=\"theme-toggle-btn\" id=\"theme-toggle\" type=\"button\">${escHtml(themeLabel)}</button>\n  </div>\n</aside>\n<div class=\"sidebar-overlay\" id=\"sidebar-overlay\"></div>`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// HTML shell\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Transcript URL helpers (single canonical implementation)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Compute the stem (filename without .md) for a manifest's clean path.\n * Falls back to session_id.\n */\nexport function manifestStem(m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''\n  return cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id\n}\n\n/**\n * URL to a transcript page relative to the **root** of the report output dir.\n * Use this from index.html and transcripts/index.html.\n */\nexport function transcriptUrlFromRoot(m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  return `transcripts/${m.client}/${manifestStem(m)}.html`\n}\n\n/**\n * URL to a transcript page relative to **another transcript** page.\n * Use this from individual transcript pages.\n */\nexport function transcriptUrlFromTranscript(m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  return `../${m.client}/${manifestStem(m)}.html`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Client badge (allowlisted CSS class)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nconst KNOWN_CLIENTS = new Set(['codex', 'claude', 'gemini'])\n\n/** Render a coloured client badge. CSS class is allowlisted to prevent injection. */\nexport function clientBadge(client: string): string {\n  const safeClass = KNOWN_CLIENTS.has(client) ? client : 'unknown'\n  return `<span class=\"badge badge-${safeClass}\">${escHtml(client)}</span>`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Shared MarkdownFile type and slug helper\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface MarkdownFile {\n  filename: string\n  title: string\n  content: string\n}\n\nexport function slugifyName(name: string): string {\n  return name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// HTML shell\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function htmlShell(title: string, content: string, nav: string, extraHead = '', lang = 'en'): string {\n  const topbar = `<header class=\"topbar\" id=\"topbar\">\n  <span class=\"topbar-brand\">MemoryTree</span>\n  <div class=\"topbar-actions\">\n    <button class=\"theme-toggle-btn\" id=\"theme-toggle-mobile\" type=\"button\">☀</button>\n    <button class=\"hamburger\" id=\"hamburger\" type=\"button\">☰</button>\n  </div>\n</header>`\n\n  return `<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"${escHtml(lang)}\" data-theme=\"dark\">\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n<title>${escHtml(title)} — MemoryTree</title>\n<style>${REPORT_CSS}</style>\n${extraHead}\n${SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS}\n</head>\n<body>\n${topbar}\n${nav}\n<div class=\"main-content\">\n  <div class=\"container\">\n${content}\n  </div>\n</div>\n</body>\n</html>`\n}\n"
}

Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/dashboard.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Dashboard page renderer: stat cards + SVG charts + recent sessions.\n */\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'\nimport type { ReportStats } from '../../types/report.js'\nimport type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'\nimport { clientBadge, escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, transcriptUrlFromRoot } from './layout.js'\nimport { renderHeatmap, renderClientDoughnut, renderWeeklyLine, renderToolBar } from './charts.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Dashboard\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderDashboard(stats: ReportStats, manifests: ManifestEntry[], t?: Translations): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('dashboard', true, t)\n  const content = [\n    renderPageHeader(stats, t),\n    renderStatsCards(stats, t),\n    renderCharts(stats),\n    renderRecentSessions(manifests, t),\n  ].join('\\n')\n\n  const lang = t ? detectLang(t) : 'en'\n  return htmlShell(t?.dashboard.title ?? 'Dashboard', content, nav, '', lang)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Internal renderers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction renderPageHeader(stats: ReportStats, t?: Translations): string {\n  const from = stats.dateRange.from.slice(0, 10) || '—'\n  const to = stats.dateRange.to.slice(0, 10) || '—'\n  const title = t?.dashboard.title ?? 'Memory Dashboard'\n  const subtitle = (t?.dashboard.subtitle ?? 'Activity from {from} to {to}')\n    .replace('{from}', from)\n    .replace('{to}', to)\n  return `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${escHtml(subtitle)}</p>\n</div>`\n}\n\nfunction renderStatsCards(stats: ReportStats, t?: Translations): string {\n  const cards = [\n    { value: fmtNum(stats.totalSessions), label: t?.dashboard.sessions ?? 'Sessions' },\n    { value: fmtNum(stats.totalMessages), label: t?.dashboard.messages ?? 'Messages' },\n    { value: fmtNum(stats.totalToolEvents), label: t?.dashboard.toolEvents ?? 'Tool Events' },\n    { value: fmtNum(stats.activeDays), label: t?.dashboard.activeDays ?? 'Active Days' },\n  ]\n\n  const html = cards\n    .map(\n      c => `<div class=\"card\">\n  <div class=\"card-title\">${escHtml(c.label)}</div>\n  <div class=\"stat-value\">${c.value}</div>\n</div>`,\n    )\n    .join('')\n\n  return `<div class=\"stats-grid\">${html}</div>`\n}\n\nfunction renderCharts(stats: ReportStats): string {\n  const heatmap = renderHeatmap(stats.dayBuckets)\n  const doughnut = renderClientDoughnut(stats.clientCounts)\n  const line = renderWeeklyLine(stats.weekBuckets)\n  const bar = renderToolBar(stats.toolCounts)\n\n  return `<div class=\"chart-grid\">\n  <div class=\"chart-card full-width\">\n    <div class=\"chart-title\">Activity (last 365 days)</div>\n    ${heatmap}\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"chart-card\">\n    <div class=\"chart-title\">Client Distribution</div>\n    ${doughnut}\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"chart-card\">\n    <div class=\"chart-title\">Messages / Week (last 52 weeks)</div>\n    ${line}\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"chart-card full-width\">\n    <div class=\"chart-title\">Top 10 Tools</div>\n    ${bar}\n  </div>\n</div>`\n}\n\nfunction renderRecentSessions(manifests: ManifestEntry[], t?: Translations): string {\n  const recent = [...manifests]\n    .sort((a, b) => b.started_at.localeCompare(a.started_at))\n    .slice(0, 10)\n\n  const heading = t?.dashboard.recentSessions ?? 'Recent Sessions'\n  const clientLabel = t?.sessions.client ?? 'Client'\n  const titleLabel = 'Title'\n  const dateLabel = t?.sessions.date ?? 'Date'\n  const msgsLabel = t?.sessions.msgs ?? 'Msgs'\n  const toolsLabel = t?.sessions.tools ?? 'Tools'\n\n  if (recent.length === 0) {\n    return `<div class=\"card\"><p style=\"color:var(--text-muted)\">${escHtml(t?.sessions.noSessions ?? 'No sessions imported yet.')}</p></div>`\n  }\n\n  const rows = recent\n    .map(m => {\n      const url = transcriptUrlFromRoot(m)\n      const date = m.started_at.slice(0, 10)\n      const badge = clientBadge(m.client)\n      const msgs = m.message_count\n      const tools = m.tool_event_count\n      const summary = ''\n      const meta = `${escHtml(m.client)} · ${escHtml(date)} · ${msgs} msgs`\n      return `<tr>\n  <td>${badge}</td>\n  <td><a href=\"${escHtml(url)}\" data-summary=\"${escHtml(summary)}\" data-meta=\"${escHtml(meta)}\">${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</a></td>\n  <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted)\">${escHtml(date)}</td>\n  <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted);text-align:right\">${msgs}</td>\n  <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted);text-align:right\">${tools}</td>\n</tr>`\n    })\n    .join('')\n\n  return `<h2>${escHtml(heading)}</h2>\n<div class=\"card\" style=\"padding:0;overflow:hidden\">\n<table>\n<thead><tr>\n  <th>${escHtml(clientLabel)}</th><th>Title</th><th>${escHtml(dateLabel)}</th>\n  <th style=\"text-align:right\">${escHtml(msgsLabel)}</th>\n  <th style=\"text-align:right\">${escHtml(toolsLabel)}</th>\n</tr></thead>\n<tbody>${rows}</tbody>\n</table>\n</div>`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Helpers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction fmtNum(n: number): string {\n  return n.toLocaleString('en-US')\n}\n\nfunction transcriptHref(m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  return transcriptUrlFromRoot(m)\n}\n\nfunction detectLang(t: Translations): string {\n  // Heuristic: check if nav.dashboard is Chinese\n  return /[\\u4e00-\\u9fff]/.test(t.nav.dashboard) ? 'zh-CN' : 'en'\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/transcript-list.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Session list page: tabular index of all imported transcripts, with client tab filtering.\n */\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'\nimport type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'\nimport { clientBadge, escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, transcriptUrlFromRoot } from './layout.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Transcript list\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderTranscriptList(manifests: ManifestEntry[], t?: Translations): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('transcripts', false, t)\n\n  const sorted = [...manifests].sort((a, b) => b.started_at.localeCompare(a.started_at))\n\n  const title = t?.sessions.title ?? 'Sessions'\n  const clientLabel = t?.sessions.client ?? 'Client'\n  const dateLabel = t?.sessions.date ?? 'Date'\n  const idLabel = t?.sessions.id ?? 'ID'\n  const msgsLabel = t?.sessions.msgs ?? 'Msgs'\n  const toolsLabel = t?.sessions.tools ?? 'Tools'\n  const allLabel = t?.sessions.all ?? 'All'\n\n  if (sorted.length === 0) {\n    const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${escHtml(t?.sessions.noSessions ?? 'No sessions imported yet.')}</p>\n</div>`\n    return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n  }\n\n  // Collect unique clients\n  const clientSet = new Set<string>()\n  for (const m of sorted) clientSet.add(m.client)\n  const clients = [...clientSet].sort()\n\n  // Tab bar\n  const tabBar = renderTabBar(allLabel, clients, sorted)\n\n  const rows = sorted\n    .map(m => {\n      const url = transcriptHref(m)\n      const date = m.started_at.slice(0, 10)\n      const time = m.started_at.slice(11, 16)\n      const badge = clientBadge(m.client)\n      const summary = ''\n      const meta = `${escHtml(m.client)} · ${escHtml(date)} · ${m.message_count} msgs`\n      return `<tr data-client=\"${escHtml(m.client)}\">\n  <td>${badge}</td>\n  <td><a href=\"${escHtml(url)}\" data-summary=\"${escHtml(summary)}\" data-meta=\"${escHtml(meta)}\">${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</a></td>\n  <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted)\">${escHtml(date)} ${escHtml(time)}</td>\n  <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.8rem\">${escHtml(m.session_id.slice(0, 8))}</td>\n  <td style=\"text-align:right;color:var(--text-muted)\">${m.message_count}</td>\n  <td style=\"text-align:right;color:var(--text-muted)\">${m.tool_event_count}</td>\n</tr>`\n    })\n    .join('')\n\n  const filterJs = `<script>\n(function() {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n    var tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn');\n    var rows = document.querySelectorAll('tr[data-client]');\n    tabs.forEach(function(btn) {\n      btn.addEventListener('click', function() {\n        tabs.forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });\n        btn.classList.add('active');\n        var filter = btn.getAttribute('data-filter');\n        rows.forEach(function(row) {\n          if (!filter || row.getAttribute('data-client') === filter) {\n            row.style.display = '';\n          } else {\n            row.style.display = 'none';\n          }\n        });\n      });\n    });\n  });\n})();\n</script>`\n\n  const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${sorted.length} session(s) imported</p>\n</div>\n${tabBar}\n<div class=\"card\" style=\"padding:0;overflow:hidden\">\n<table>\n<thead><tr>\n  <th>${escHtml(clientLabel)}</th>\n  <th>Title</th>\n  <th>${escHtml(dateLabel)}</th>\n  <th>${escHtml(idLabel)}</th>\n  <th style=\"text-align:right\">${escHtml(msgsLabel)}</th>\n  <th style=\"text-align:right\">${escHtml(toolsLabel)}</th>\n</tr></thead>\n<tbody>${rows}</tbody>\n</table>\n</div>`\n\n  return htmlShell(title, content, nav, filterJs)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tab bar\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction renderTabBar(allLabel: string, clients: string[], manifests: ManifestEntry[]): string {\n  const total = manifests.length\n  const tabs = [\n    `<button class=\"tab-btn active\" data-filter=\"\" type=\"button\">${escHtml(allLabel)} (${total})</button>`,\n    ...clients.map(client => {\n      const count = manifests.filter(m => m.client === client).length\n      return `<button class=\"tab-btn\" data-filter=\"${escHtml(client)}\" type=\"button\">${escHtml(client)} (${count})</button>`\n    }),\n  ]\n  return `<div class=\"tab-bar\">${tabs.join('')}</div>`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Helper\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction transcriptHref(m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  // From transcripts/index.html, the URL is relative to the transcripts/ dir\n  // so we only need {client}/{stem}.html (no leading \"transcripts/\")\n  return transcriptUrlFromRoot(m).replace(/^transcripts\\//, '')\n}\n"
}

Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Individual transcript page: metadata, AI summary, backlinks, messages.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     6→import { clientBadge, escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, transcriptUrlFromTranscript } from './layout.js'
     7→
     8→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
     9→// Parsed message for rendering
    10→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    11→
    12→export interface RenderedMessage {
    13→  role: string
    14→  timestamp: string
    15→  text: string
    16→}
    17→
    18→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    19→// Transcript page
    20→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    21→
    22→export function renderTranscript(
    23→  messages: RenderedMessage[],
    24→  manifest: ManifestEntry,
    25→  summary: string,
    26→  backlinks: ManifestEntry[],
    27→): string {
    28→  const nav = renderNav('transcripts', false)
    29→
    30→  const content = [
    31→    renderHeader(manifest),
    32→    summary ? renderSummaryCard(summary) : '',
    33→    backlinks.length > 0 ? renderBacklinks(backlinks) : '',
    34→    renderMessages(messages),
    35→  ]
    36→    .filter(Boolean)
    37→    .join('\n')
    38→
    39→  const title = manifest.title || manifest.session_id
    40→  return htmlShell(title, content, nav)
    41→}
    42→
    43→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44→// Sub-renderers
    45→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    46→
    47→function renderHeader(m: ManifestEntry): string {
    48→  const badge = clientBadge(m.client)
    49→  const date = m.started_at.slice(0, 10)
    50→  const time = m.started_at.slice(11, 19)
    51→
    52→  return `<div class="page-header">
    53→  <h1>${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</h1>
    54→</div>
    55→<table class="meta-table card">
    56→<tbody>
    57→  <tr><td>Client</td><td>${badge}</td></tr>
    58→  <tr><td>Date</td><td>${escHtml(date)} ${escHtml(time)}</td></tr>
    59→  <tr><td>Session ID</td><td><code>${escHtml(m.session_id)}</code></td></tr>
    60→  <tr><td>Messages</td><td>${m.message_count}</td></tr>
    61→  <tr><td>Tool Events</td><td>${m.tool_event_count}</td></tr>
    62→  <tr><td>Branch</td><td><code>${escHtml(m.branch || '—')}</code></td></tr>
    63→  <tr><td>Working Dir</td><td><code style="font-size:0.8rem">${escHtml(m.cwd || '—')}</code></td></tr>
    64→  <tr><td>SHA256</td><td><code style="font-size:0.75rem">${escHtml(m.raw_sha256.slice(0, 16))}…</code></td></tr>
    65→</tbody>
    66→</table>`
    67→}
    68→
    69→function renderSummaryCard(summary: string): string {
    70→  return `<div class="summary-card">
    71→  <div class="summary-label">AI Summary</div>
    72→  <div>${escHtml(summary)}</div>
    73→</div>`
    74→}
    75→
    76→function renderBacklinks(backlinks: ManifestEntry[]): string {
    77→  const items = backlinks
    78→    .map(m => {
    79→      const url = transcriptHref(m)
    80→      return `<li><a href="${escHtml(url)}">${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</a></li>`
    81→    })
    82→    .join('')
    83→  return `<div class="backlinks">
    84→  <div class="backlinks-title">Referenced by ${backlinks.length} session(s)</div>
    85→  <ul>${items}</ul>
    86→</div>`
    87→}
    88→
    89→function renderMessages(messages: RenderedMessage[]): string {
    90→  if (messages.length === 0) {
    91→    return `<div class="card" style="color:var(--text-muted)">No messages available for this session.</div>`
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  const rendered = messages
    95→    .map(msg => {
    96→      const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'message-user' : 'message-assistant'
    97→      const ts = msg.timestamp ? `<span style="margin-left:auto">${escHtml(msg.timestamp.slice(11, 19))}</span>` : ''
    98→      const body = renderMessageBody(msg.text)
    99→      return `<div class="message ${roleClass}">
   100→  <div class="message-header">
   101→    <span class="message-role">${escHtml(msg.role)}</span>${ts}
   102→  </div>
   103→  <div class="message-body">${body}</div>
   104→</div>`
   105→    })
   106→    .join('\n')
   107→
   108→  return `<h2 style="margin-top:1.5rem">Messages</h2>
   109→<div class="messages">${rendered}</div>`
   110→}
   111→
   112→/**
   113→ * Render message text to HTML with code block support.
   114→ * Input text is plain text from clean markdown.
   115→ */
   116→function renderMessageBody(text: string): string {
   117→  // Process code blocks first (they contain preformatted content)
   118→  const parts: string[] = []
   119→  const codeBlockRe = /```[\w]*\n?([\s\S]*?)```/g
   120→  let lastIndex = 0
   121→  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
   122→
   123→  while ((match = codeBlockRe.exec(text)) !== null) {
   124→    if (match.index > lastIndex) {
   125→      parts.push(renderInlineText(text.slice(lastIndex, match.index)))
   126→    }
   127→    const code = match[1] ?? ''
   128→    parts.push(`<pre><code>${escHtml(code)}</code></pre>`)
   129→    lastIndex = match.index + match[0].length
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  if (lastIndex < text.length) {
   133→    parts.push(renderInlineText(text.slice(lastIndex)))
   134→  }
   135→
   136→  return parts.join('')
   137→}
   138→
   139→/** Render inline text (paragraphs + inline formatting). */
   140→function renderInlineText(text: string): string {
   141→  const paragraphs = text.split(/\n{2,}/).filter(p => p.trim())
   142→  return paragraphs
   143→    .map(p => `<p>${applyInlineMarkdown(escHtml(p.trim()))}</p>`)
   144→    .join('')
   145→}
   146→
   147→/** Apply inline markdown to already-HTML-escaped text. */
   148→function applyInlineMarkdown(html: string): string {
   149→  return html
   150→    .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
   151→    .replace(/\*(.+?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
   152→    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')
   153→    .replace(/\n/g, '<br>')
   154→}
   155→
   156→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   157→// Helper
   158→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   159→
   160→function transcriptHref(m: ManifestEntry): string {
   161→  return transcriptUrlFromTranscript(m)
   162→}
   163→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

1→/**
     2→ * Knowledge page: renders markdown files from Memory/04_knowledge/.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js'
     6→import type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'
     7→import { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'
     8→
     9→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    10→// Knowledge page
    11→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    12→
    13→export type KnowledgeFile = MarkdownFile
    14→
    15→export function renderKnowledge(files: KnowledgeFile[]): string {
    16→  const nav = renderNav('knowledge', false)
    17→
    18→  const subtitle = `${files.length} knowledge file(s)`
    19→
    20→  if (files.length === 0) {
    21→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
    22→  <h1>Knowledge</h1>
    23→  <p class="subtitle">No knowledge files found in Memory/04_knowledge/.</p>
    24→</div>`
    25→    return htmlShell('Knowledge', content, nav)
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  const sections = files
    29→    .map(f => {
    30→      const htmlContent = markdownToHtml(f.content)
    31→      return `<div class="card" id="${escHtml(slugifyName(f.filename))}">
    32→  <h2>${escHtml(f.title)}</h2>
    33→  <p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1rem">${escHtml(f.filename)}</p>
    34→  <div class="markdown-body">${htmlContent}</div>
    35→</div>`
    36→    })
    37→    .join('\n')
    38→
    39→  const content = `<div class="page-header">
    40→  <h1>Knowledge</h1>
    41→  <p class="subtitle">${subtitle}</p>
    42→</div>
    43→${sections}`
    44→
    45→  return htmlShell('Knowledge', content, nav)
    46→}
    47→
    48→

  "new_string": "function renderHeader(m: ManifestEntry, t?: Translations): string {\n  const badge = clientBadge(m.client)\n  const date = m.started_at.slice(0, 10)\n  const time = m.started_at.slice(11, 19)\n  const clientLabel = t?.transcript.client ?? 'Client'\n  const sessionIdLabel = t?.transcript.sessionId ?? 'Session ID'\n  const msgsLabel = t?.transcript.messages ?? 'Messages'\n  const toolEventsLabel = t?.transcript.toolEvents ?? 'Tool Events'\n  const branchLabel = t?.transcript.branch ?? 'Branch'\n  const cwdLabel = t?.transcript.workingDir ?? 'Working Dir'\n  const shaLabel = t?.transcript.sha256 ?? 'SHA-256'\n\n  return `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</h1>\n</div>\n<table class=\"meta-table card\">\n<tbody>\n  <tr><td>${escHtml(clientLabel)}</td><td>${badge}</td></tr>\n  <tr><td>Date</td><td>${escHtml(date)} ${escHtml(time)}</td></tr>\n  <tr><td>${escHtml(sessionIdLabel)}</td><td><code>${escHtml(m.session_id)}</code></td></tr>\n  <tr><td>${escHtml(msgsLabel)}</td><td>${m.message_count}</td></tr>\n  <tr><td>${escHtml(toolEventsLabel)}</td><td>${m.tool_event_count}</td></tr>\n  <tr><td>${escHtml(branchLabel)}</td><td><code>${escHtml(m.branch || '—')}</code></td></tr>\n  <tr><td>${escHtml(cwdLabel)}</td><td><code style=\"font-size:0.8rem\">${escHtml(m.cwd || '—')}</code></td></tr>\n  <tr><td>${escHtml(shaLabel)}</td><td><code style=\"font-size:0.75rem\">${escHtml(m.raw_sha256.slice(0, 16))}…</code></td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>`\n}"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/knowledge.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Knowledge page: renders markdown files from Memory/04_knowledge/.\n */\n\nimport type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'\nimport { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js'\nimport type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'\nimport { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Knowledge page\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport type KnowledgeFile = MarkdownFile\n\nexport function renderKnowledge(files: KnowledgeFile[], t?: Translations): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('knowledge', false, t)\n  const title = t?.nav.knowledge ?? 'Knowledge'\n\n  if (files.length === 0) {\n    const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">No knowledge files found in Memory/04_knowledge/.</p>\n</div>`\n    return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n  }\n\n  const sections = files\n    .map(f => {\n      const htmlContent = markdownToHtml(f.content)\n      return `<div class=\"card\" id=\"${escHtml(slugifyName(f.filename))}\">\n  <h2>${escHtml(f.title)}</h2>\n  <p style=\"font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1rem\">${escHtml(f.filename)}</p>\n  <div class=\"markdown-body\">${htmlContent}</div>\n</div>`\n    })\n    .join('\\n')\n\n  const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${files.length} knowledge file(s)</p>\n</div>\n${sections}`\n\n  return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n}\n"
}

  "content": "/**\n * Goals page: renders markdown files from Memory/01_goals/.\n */\n\nimport type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'\nimport { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js'\nimport type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'\nimport { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'\n\nexport type GoalFile = MarkdownFile\n\nexport function renderGoals(files: GoalFile[], t?: Translations): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('goals', false, t)\n  const title = t?.nav.goals ?? 'Goals'\n\n  if (files.length === 0) {\n    const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">No goal files found in Memory/01_goals/.</p>\n</div>`\n    return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n  }\n\n  const sections = files\n    .map(f => {\n      const htmlContent = markdownToHtml(f.content)\n      return `<div class=\"card\" id=\"${escHtml(slugifyName(f.filename))}\">\n  <h2>${escHtml(f.title)}</h2>\n  <p style=\"font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1rem\">${escHtml(f.filename)}</p>\n  <div class=\"markdown-body\">${htmlContent}</div>\n</div>`\n    })\n    .join('\\n')\n\n  const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${files.length} goal file(s)</p>\n</div>\n${sections}`\n\n  return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n}\n"
}

Read output=1→/** 2→ * Full-text search: pre-built JSON index embedded as inline JS. 3→ * Vanilla JS substring search, no external library. 4→ */ 5→ 6→import type { ManifestEntry } from '.....
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Full-text search: pre-built JSON index embedded as inline JS.
     3→ * Vanilla JS substring search, no external library.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     7→import type { SearchIndexEntry } from '../../types/report.js'
     8→import { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, transcriptUrlFromRoot } from './layout.js'
     9→
    10→const MAX_INDEX_BYTES = 50_000
    11→const SNIPPET_LEN = 200
    12→
    13→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    14→// Index construction
    15→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16→
    17→export function buildSearchIndex(
    18→  manifests: ManifestEntry[],
    19→  getSnippet: (m: ManifestEntry) => string,
    20→): SearchIndexEntry[] {
    21→  const entries: SearchIndexEntry[] = []
    22→  let totalBytes = 0
    23→
    24→  for (const m of manifests) {
    25→    let snippet = getSnippet(m).slice(0, SNIPPET_LEN)
    26→    const entry: SearchIndexEntry = {
    27→      url: transcriptUrl(m),
    28→      title: m.title || m.session_id,
    29→      client: m.client,
    30→      date: m.started_at.slice(0, 10),
    31→      snippet,
    32→    }
    33→    const entryBytes = JSON.stringify(entry).length
    34→    if (totalBytes + entryBytes > MAX_INDEX_BYTES) {
    35→      // Truncate snippet to fit within budget
    36→      const remaining = MAX_INDEX_BYTES - totalBytes - (entryBytes - snippet.length) - 10
    37→      if (remaining < 20) break
    38→      snippet = snippet.slice(0, remaining)
    39→      entry.snippet = snippet
    40→    }
    41→    totalBytes += JSON.stringify(entry).length
    42→    entries.push(entry)
    43→  }
    44→
    45→  return entries
    46→}
    47→
    48→function transcriptUrl(m: ManifestEntry): string {
    49→  return transcriptUrlFromRoot(m)
    50→}
    51→
    52→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    53→// Search page renderer
    54→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    55→
    56→export function renderSearchPage(index: SearchIndexEntry[]): string {
    57→  // Escape </script> to prevent script-injection via manifest-controlled content
    58→  const indexJson = JSON.stringify(index).replace(/<\//g, '<\\/')
    59→  const nav = renderNav('search', true)
    60→
    61→  const extraHead = `<script>
    62→const SEARCH_INDEX = ${indexJson};
    63→</script>`
    64→
    65→  const content = `
    66→<div class="page-header">
    67→  <h1>Search</h1>
    68→  <p class="subtitle">Full-text search across all imported sessions</p>
    69→</div>
    70→
    71→<input
    72→  type="search"
    73→  id="search-input"
    74→  class="search-box"
    75→  placeholder="Search sessions, messages, and content..."
    76→  autofocus
    77→>
    78→<div id="search-count"></div>
    79→<div id="search-results" class="search-results"></div>
    80→
    81→<script>
    82→(function() {
    83→  const input = document.getElementById('search-input');
    84→  const resultsEl = document.getElementById('search-results');
    85→  const countEl = document.getElementById('search-count');
    86→
    87→  function highlight(text, query) {
    88→    if (!query) return escHtml(text);
    89→    const escaped = escHtml(text);
    90→    const escapedQ = escHtml(query);
    91→    const lower = escaped.toLowerCase();
    92→    const lowerQ = escapedQ.toLowerCase();
    93→    if (!lowerQ) return escaped;
    94→    let result = '';
    95→    let i = 0;
    96→    while (i < escaped.length) {
    97→      const idx = lower.indexOf(lowerQ, i);
    98→      if (idx === -1) { result += escaped.slice(i); break; }
    99→      result += escaped.slice(i, idx) + '<mark>' + escaped.slice(idx, idx + lowerQ.length) + '</mark>';
   100→      i = idx + lowerQ.length;
   101→    }
   102→    return result;
   103→  }
   104→
   105→  function escHtml(s) {
   106→    return s.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  function renderResults(query) {
   110→    const q = (query || '').toLowerCase().trim();
   111→    if (!q) {
   112→      resultsEl.innerHTML = '';
   113→      countEl.textContent = SEARCH_INDEX.length + ' session(s) indexed';
   114→      return;
   115→    }
   116→    const matches = SEARCH_INDEX.filter(function(e) {
   117→      return (e.title || '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   118→             (e.snippet || '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   119→             (e.client || '').toLowerCase().includes(q);
   120→    });
   121→    countEl.textContent = matches.length + ' result(s) for "' + escHtml(q) + '"';
   122→    resultsEl.innerHTML = matches.map(function(e) {
   123→      return '<div class="search-result">' +
   124→        '<div class="search-result-title"><a href="' + escHtml(e.url) + '">' + highlight(e.title, query) + '</a></div>' +
   125→        '<div class="search-result-meta"><span class="badge badge-' + escHtml(e.client) + '">' + escHtml(e.client) + '</span> &nbsp; ' + escHtml(e.date) + '</div>' +
   126→        '<div class="search-result-snippet">' + highlight(e.snippet, query) + '</div>' +
   127→        '</div>';
   128→    }).join('');
   129→  }
   130→
   131→  renderResults('');
   132→  input.addEventListener('input', function() { renderResults(input.value); });
   133→})();
   134→</script>`
   135→
   136→  return htmlShell('Search', content, nav, extraHead)
   137→}
   138→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/todos.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Todos page: renders markdown files from Memory/02_todos/.\n */\n\nimport type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'\nimport { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js'\nimport type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'\nimport { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'\n\nexport type TodoFile = MarkdownFile\n\nexport function renderTodos(files: TodoFile[], t?: Translations): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('todos', false, t)\n  const title = t?.nav.todos ?? 'Todos'\n\n  if (files.length === 0) {\n    const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">No todo files found in Memory/02_todos/.</p>\n</div>`\n    return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n  }\n\n  const sections = files\n    .map(f => {\n      const htmlContent = markdownToHtml(f.content)\n      return `<div class=\"card\" id=\"${escHtml(slugifyName(f.filename))}\">\n  <h2>${escHtml(f.title)}</h2>\n  <p style=\"font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1rem\">${escHtml(f.filename)}</p>\n  <div class=\"markdown-body\">${htmlContent}</div>\n</div>`\n    })\n    .join('\\n')\n\n  const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${files.length} todo file(s)</p>\n</div>\n${sections}`\n\n  return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n}\n"
}

  "content": "/**\n * Archive page: renders markdown files from Memory/05_archive/.\n */\n\nimport type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'\nimport { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js'\nimport type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'\nimport { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'\n\nexport type ArchiveFile = MarkdownFile\n\nexport function renderArchive(files: ArchiveFile[], t?: Translations): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('archive', false, t)\n  const title = t?.nav.archive ?? 'Archive'\n\n  if (files.length === 0) {\n    const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">No archive files found in Memory/05_archive/.</p>\n</div>`\n    return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n  }\n\n  const sections = files\n    .map(f => {\n      const htmlContent = markdownToHtml(f.content)\n      return `<div class=\"card\" id=\"${escHtml(slugifyName(f.filename))}\">\n  <h2>${escHtml(f.title)}</h2>\n  <p style=\"font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1rem\">${escHtml(f.filename)}</p>\n  <div class=\"markdown-body\">${htmlContent}</div>\n</div>`\n    })\n    .join('\\n')\n\n  const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${files.length} archive file(s)</p>\n</div>\n${sections}`\n\n  return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/projects.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Projects page: groups sessions by their working directory (last segment).\n */\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'\nimport type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'\nimport { clientBadge, escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav } from './layout.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Project extraction\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function extractProject(cwd: string): string {\n  if (!cwd) return 'unknown'\n  return cwd.split(/[/\\\\]/).filter(Boolean).at(-1) ?? 'unknown'\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Projects page\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderProjects(manifests: ManifestEntry[], t?: Translations): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('projects', false, t)\n  const title = t?.projects.title ?? 'Projects'\n\n  if (manifests.length === 0) {\n    const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${escHtml(t?.projects.noProjects ?? 'No projects found.')}</p>\n</div>`\n    return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n  }\n\n  // Group by project name\n  const projectMap = new Map<string, ManifestEntry[]>()\n  for (const m of manifests) {\n    const proj = extractProject(m.cwd)\n    const group = projectMap.get(proj)\n    if (group) {\n      group.push(m)\n    } else {\n      projectMap.set(proj, [m])\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Sort by session count desc\n  const sorted = [...projectMap.entries()].sort((a, b) => b[1].length - a[1].length)\n\n  const sessionLabel = t?.projects.sessions ?? 'sessions'\n\n  const cards = sorted.map(([name, sessions]) => {\n    const count = sessions.length\n    const lastActive = sessions\n      .map(s => s.started_at)\n      .sort()\n      .at(-1)\n      ?.slice(0, 10) ?? '—'\n\n    const clients = [...new Set(sessions.map(s => s.client))]\n    const badges = clients.map(c => clientBadge(c)).join(' ')\n\n    return `<div class=\"project-card\">\n  <div class=\"project-card-name\">${escHtml(name)}</div>\n  <div class=\"project-card-meta\">\n    ${count} ${escHtml(sessionLabel)} · last active ${escHtml(lastActive)}\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"project-card-clients\">${badges}</div>\n</div>`\n  }).join('\\n')\n\n  const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${sorted.length} project(s)</p>\n</div>\n<div class=\"project-grid\">\n${cards}\n</div>`\n\n  return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n}\n"
}
