Show output payload 
[
  {
    "text": "I now have a complete picture of the codebase. Here is the full review.\n\n---\n\n# 代码审查报告\n\n## 安全问题\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: CRITICAL]** `src/report/deploy/github-pages.ts:39,50,52,62` — 命令注入（Command Injection）\n\n`execSafe` 函数将 `branch` 和 `worktreePath`/`relOutput` 通过模板字符串直接拼接进 shell 命令，但 `execSync` 在传入字符串时会经过 shell 解析（默认调用 `/bin/sh -c`）。\n\n```typescript\nexecSafe(repoRoot, `git ls-remote --exit-code --heads origin ${branch}`)\nexecSafe(repoRoot, `git worktree add --orphan -b ${branch} \"${worktreePath}\"`)\nexecSafe(repoRoot, `git subtree push --prefix \"${relOutput}\" origin ${branch}`)\n```\n\n`branch` 来自 `config.toml`（用户可控），若包含 `;rm -rf /` 或反引号等字符，可在本机执行任意命令。`worktreePath` 虽来自 `join(repoRoot, ...)` 但其上游 `repoRoot` 同样来自用户配置。\n\n**建议：**\n1. 使用 `execSync` 的 **数组参数形式**（spawn 语义）或改用 `child_process.spawnSync` 配合 `argv[]` 数组，彻底绕开 shell 解析。\n2. 至少对 `branch` 做严格白名单校验（仅允许 `[a-zA-Z0-9._/-]`），并在 `config.ts` 的 `parseRaw` 阶段执行，不要在 deploy 层才验证。\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: HIGH]** `src/report/render/layout.ts:87-88` — 储存型 XSS（popover innerHTML 未转义）\n\n```typescript\npopover.innerHTML = (meta ? '<div class=\"popover-meta\">' + meta + '</div>' : '') +\n  (summary ? '<div class=\"popover-summary\">' + summary + '</div>' : '');\n```\n\n`meta` 和 `summary` 来自 HTML 元素的 `data-summary` / `data-meta` 属性。这两个属性由服务端渲染时写入，但若上游（transcript 标题、AI 摘要内容）含有 HTML 特殊字符，即便服务端使用了 `escHtml()` 正确编码属性值，浏览器在 `getAttribute()` 取值时会**自动解码**，使得 `popover.innerHTML` 直接解析为 HTML。攻击者若能控制 session 标题（例如 `<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>`），该字符串会经 `escHtml` 写入属性，但在 `getAttribute + innerHTML` 路径下仍然执行。\n\n**建议：** 将 `popover.innerHTML = ...` 改为使用 `textContent` 分别设置子节点，或使用 `innerText`，完全避免 HTML 解析。\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: HIGH]** `src/report/deploy/webhook.ts:130` — SSRF（缺少目标 URL 白名单校验）\n\n```typescript\nconst transport = url.protocol === 'https:' ? https : http\n```\n\n函数允许 `http:` 协议（明文），且 `url` 的 hostname 无任何限制，可以指向：\n- 内网地址（`169.254.169.254` 云元数据服务、`10.x.x.x`、`localhost`）\n- `file:` 之外的任何协议（`new URL('http://...')` 不会抛出）\n\nconfig 层的 `webhook_url` 解析仅校验了类型为 `string`，未做任何 URL 格式或 host 验证。\n\n**建议：**\n1. 强制 `https:` 协议（拒绝 `http:`）。\n2. 解析后检查 `url.hostname` 不属于 RFC 1918 私网范围，可用正则或 `ipaddr.js` 库。\n3. 或在 `config.ts` 的 `parseRaw` 阶段就做 URL 格式校验，失败则回退为空字符串（等同于禁用）。\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: HIGH]** `src/report/render/graph.ts:117` — JSON 嵌入 `<script>` 块的转义不完整\n\n```typescript\nconst graphDataJson = JSON.stringify({ nodes, edges }).replace(/<\\//g, '<\\\\/')\n```\n\n仅转义了 `</`，但以下向量未被处理：\n- `<!--` — 部分浏览器解析器会提前关闭脚本块\n- `\\u2028` / `\\u2029` — 行分隔符，在旧版 JS 引擎中可能导致语法错误或注入\n\n此外，node 的 `url` 字段（`transcripts/{client}/{stem}.html`）中 `client` 来自 manifest，`stem` 来自文件路径，均为外部数据，虽经 JSON 编码，但 URL 并未被 `encodeURIComponent` 处理，若 `window.location.href = node.url` 被触发时存在 `javascript:` scheme（理论上需要 manifest 被篡改，风险较低但不为零）。\n\n**建议：** 补充替换 `\\u2028`/`\\u2029`；对嵌入 `href` 的 `url` 字段在客户端点击跳转前校验 scheme 为 `http`/`https` 或相对路径。\n\n---\n\n## 架构问题\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: MEDIUM]** `src/report/build.ts:113-126` — `Promise.all` 缺少单任务错误隔离\n\n```typescript\nsummaryPromises.push(\n  (async () => {\n    const summary = await getSummary(...)  // 可能抛出\n    ...\n    writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')  // 可能抛出\n  })()\n)\nawait Promise.all(summaryPromises)         // 一个失败 → 全部中断\n```\n\n`getSummary` 内部有 semaphore 和 try/catch，但 `writeFileSync` 没有。若磁盘空间不足或权限错误，**单个 transcript 的写入失败会通过 `Promise.all` 直接 reject 并中止整个报告构建**，即使已经渲染了数百个页面也会全部丢失。\n\n**建议：** 在每个 `async` 任务的顶层加 `try/catch`，将单条错误转为日志警告并 `resolve()`，使 `Promise.all` 的语义变为\"尽力完成所有任务\"而非\"全或无\"。\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: MEDIUM]** `src/report/deploy/github-pages.ts:78-85` — `makeRelative` 对路径遍历无防护\n\n```typescript\nfunction makeRelative(base: string, target: string): string {\n  const b = base.replace(/\\\\/g, '/').replace(/\\/$/, '')\n  const t = target.replace(/\\\\/g, '/').replace(/\\/$/, '')\n  if (t.startsWith(b + '/')) {\n    return t.slice(b.length + 1)\n  }\n  return t  // 回退：直接返回绝对路径\n}\n```\n\n当 `outputDir` 不在 `repoRoot` 下时，函数返回 `target` 的完整绝对路径（第 85 行）。此时 `git subtree push --prefix \"/absolute/path\"` 会以绝对路径作为 prefix，git 通常会报错，但这个静默回退隐藏了配置错误，应当明确报错而非悄悄传入异常值。\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: LOW]** `src/report/i18n/index.ts` — 架构耦合偏硬，新增语言需改源码\n\n`loadLocale` 使用静态 `LOCALES` 对象，所有语言 bundle 在模块加载时都被 `import`（包括所有 locale 文件），无法按需加载。对于报告场景（构建时单次运行）这可以接受，但随着语言增多，添加语言要求修改 `index.ts` 而非放入 locale 目录即可自动发现，有一定维护成本。这是可接受的设计取舍，但值得记录。\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: LOW]** `src/report/render/layout.ts:43-110` — `SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS` 超过 60 行内联 JS\n\n内联 JS 字符串难以做静态分析、类型检查和单元测试。该块同时处理主题切换、移动端汉堡菜单、popover 三个独立关注点，维护时修改一处容易破坏另一处。\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: LOW]** `src/heartbeat/config.ts:231-244` — `gh_pages_branch`、`cname`、`webhook_url` 的字符串内容未校验\n\n`parseRaw` 对这三个字段只检查了 `typeof === 'string'`，未校验格式（branch 名合法性、cname 的域名格式、webhook_url 的 URL 格式）。这意味着恶意或错误的 config.toml 可将问题直接传递到 deploy 层，如上述 CRITICAL 注入漏洞所示。\n\n---\n\n## 测试覆盖问题\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: HIGH]** `tests/report/deploy/webhook.test.ts` — 核心逻辑（payload 构建）完全未被验证\n\n测试仅验证\"函数不抛出\"，没有任何断言验证各平台的 payload 结构。`buildFeishuPayload`、`buildTelegramPayload` 等函数的字段正确性完全没有测试覆盖。由于网络调用被真实发出（没有 mock http/https），测试实际上依赖网络失败而非 mock，是不稳定的测试设计。\n\n**建议：**\n1. 将 `node:https` 和 `node:http` 的 `request` mock 掉（`vi.mock('node:https', ...)`），捕获实际发送的 body。\n2. 对每个平台分别断言 payload 结构（例如 Feishu 必须有 `msg_type: 'interactive'`）。\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: MEDIUM]** `tests/report/render/graph.test.ts` — 缺少对 `url` 字段 `javascript:` scheme 的边界测试\n\n测试验证了 `</script>` 转义（好！），但未测试：\n- `title` 含有 `\\u2028`/`\\u2029` 时的输出\n- `client` 字段含有路径穿越字符（`../`）时的 URL 生成结果\n- 超过 500 节点时 knowledge 节点是否被正确计入 cap\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: MEDIUM]** `tests/report/deploy/github-pages.test.ts` — 未测试命令注入向量\n\n没有测试 `branch` 包含 shell 元字符（`;`、`$()`、`` ` ``）时的行为，也未测试 `makeRelative` 在 `outputDir` 不在 `repoRoot` 内时的回退路径。\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: LOW]** `tests/report/i18n.test.ts` — `hasAllKeys` 手写检查易遗漏新增字段\n\n`hasAllKeys` 函数逐字段手写检查，当 `Translations` 类型新增字段时，测试不会自动失败（类型检查不覆盖运行时）。\n\n**建议：** 改为递归遍历 `en` 对象的所有叶子键，对比目标 locale 是否都存在且为非空字符串，这样新增字段不需要同步修改测试。\n\n---\n\n## 可维护性问题\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: LOW]** `src/report/render/graph.ts:124,361-365` — 客户端颜色硬编码两处，不同步风险\n\n`CLIENT_COLORS`（JS 内联）和 `legendItems`（TypeScript 侧）各自独立维护颜色值，两者必须手动保持同步，容易出现视觉不一致。\n\n---\n\n**[严重度: LOW]** `src/report/render/graph.ts:350-355` — 无限动画 loop，无退出机制\n\n```typescript\nfunction loop() {\n  tick();\n  draw();\n  requestAnimationFrame(loop);\n}\nloop();\n```\n\n`tick()` 内部在 `ALPHA < ALPHA_MIN` 时 `return`（不更新），但 `draw()` 仍然每帧调用。稳定后每帧无效重绘，在有数百节点的页面上（`MAX_NODES = 500`）会持续消耗 GPU/CPU。**建议**在 `ALPHA < ALPHA_MIN` 且无拖拽/悬停时停止 `requestAnimationFrame`，事件触发时再恢复。\n\n---\n\n## 总体评级\n\n**🟠 HIGH**\n\n没有发现会直接导致远端代码执行的已知完整利用链，但存在一个 **CRITICAL 级别**的命令注入向量（`branch` 字段注入 shell 命令）以及两个 **HIGH 级别**的安全问题（popover XSS、SSRF）。这些问题的可利用前提是攻击者能控制 `config.toml`，这在单用户本地工具场景下风险偏低，但在多用户或远程配置场景下则是严重隐患。\n\n---\n\n## 进入第二阶段的建议\n\n**不建议直接进入第二阶段**，需先处理以下阻塞项：\n\n| 优先级 | 任务 |\n|--------|------|\n| P0 | `github-pages.ts`：使用 `spawnSync` 数组参数替代 shell 字符串拼接，或在 `config.ts` 层对 `gh_pages_branch` 做严格白名单校验 |\n| P0 | `layout.ts`：将 `popover.innerHTML` 改为 DOM 节点构造（`textContent`），消除 XSS 路径 |\n| P1 | `webhook.ts`：强制 `https:` 协议，拒绝 RFC 1918 内网地址 |\n| P1 | `build.ts`：为每个 `summaryPromises` 任务包裹 `try/catch` 实现错误隔离 |\n| P1 | `webhook.test.ts`：mock `node:https`，补充 payload 结构断言 |\n| P2 | `graph.ts`：补充 `\\u2028`/`\\u2029` 转义，为动画 loop 添加休眠逻辑 |",
    "type": "text"
  },

  {
    "text": "Now I have a complete picture. Here is the full deep code review:\n\n---\n\n## 深度代码审查报告\n\n### 文件：`i18n/index.ts`\n\n代码简洁，无问题。`loadLocale` 的 fallback 逻辑正确。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`i18n/en.ts` / `i18n/zh-CN.ts`\n\n- **[LOW]** `en.ts:17` — `subtitle` 字段值为 `'Activity from {from} to {to}'`，包含占位符 `{from}` / `{to}`，但查遍 `build.ts`、`render/dashboard.ts` 的调用链，**没有任何代码对这些占位符做替换**。翻译字符串会原样输出给用户。建议在调用侧进行 `.replace('{from}', ...).replace('{to}', ...)` 替换，或改为模板函数。\n\n- **[LOW]** `en.ts` / `zh-CN.ts` — `Translations` 类型中定义了 `goals`、`todos`、`archive` 等节点，但 `types.ts` 中的 `Translations` 接口**没有** `goals`/`todos`/`archive` 字段。这意味着 `render/goals.ts`、`todos.ts`、`archive.ts` 只能通过 `t?.nav.goals` 访问导航标签，无法有专属的 i18n 文字段（例如\"No goals found.\"），这些提示文字目前硬编码英文。若今后扩展，接口与实现会不一致。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`render/layout.ts`\n\n- **[HIGH]** `layout.ts:87-88` — SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS 中的 popover `innerHTML` 赋值：\n\n  ```js\n  popover.innerHTML = (meta ? '<div class=\"popover-meta\">' + meta + '</div>' : '') +\n    (summary ? '<div class=\"popover-summary\">' + summary + '</div>' : '');\n  ```\n\n  `meta` 和 `summary` 来自 `el.getAttribute('data-summary')` 和 `el.getAttribute('data-meta')`。尽管在 `transcript-list.ts:49` 中这些属性通过 `escHtml()` 转义后写入 HTML 属性，但通过 `getAttribute()` 读回时会得到**已解码的原始字符串**（浏览器会将 `&lt;` 解码为 `<`），再通过 `innerHTML` 写入时就会造成 **存储型 XSS**。攻击者只需将 session 标题中包含 `<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>` 即可触发。\n  \n  修复：改为 `textContent` 赋值，或在 JS 中对 `meta`/`summary` 再次转义。\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `layout.ts:149` — `themeLabel` 初始值硬编码为 `'☀ Light'`（亮色模式标签），但 JS 初始化时会读取 `localStorage` 中保存的主题（默认 `'dark'`），并通过 `updateThemeBtn()` 更新按钮文字。**问题**：JS 在 `DOMContentLoaded` 之后才运行，在此之前按钮文字显示错误（`'☀ Light'` 而非 `'☾ Dark'`），会有短暂闪烁。可改为服务端渲染时不写入初始文字，依赖 JS 更新即可。\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `layout.ts:119-132` — `buildNavItems` 中 `rootLevel: boolean` 以 `''` vs `'../'` 区分路径层级，但导航中存在两种不同深度的页面：根级页面（`graph.html`、`search.html`）和子目录中的 index（`transcripts/index.html`）。从 `transcripts/claude/xxxx.html`（两级子目录深的 transcript 页面）调用 `renderNav('transcripts', false, t)` 时，路径 `../transcripts/index.html` 会错误解析为 `transcripts/transcripts/index.html`，而非正确的 `../../transcripts/index.html`。**路径计算未考虑三级以上嵌套。** transcript 单页面需要 `rootLevel` 以外的第三个值（如 `'transcript'` 深度）。\n\n- **[LOW]** `layout.ts:207` — `KNOWN_CLIENTS` 集合（`codex`/`claude`/`gemini`）硬编码，若日后增加新客户端（如 `cursor`），badge 样式会 fallback 为 `unknown`，但更重要的是 CSS 中没有对应 `.badge-cursor` 样式。需要保持 `layout.ts` 与 `css.ts` 两处同步更新。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`render/css.ts`（新增 sidebar/light theme 部分）\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `css.ts:421-430` — `.summary-card` 使用硬编码颜色 `background: #161b22; border: 1px solid #30363d;` 而非 CSS 变量，**在 light theme 下不会切换**。亮色主题下这个卡片背景会保持深色，形成视觉错误。应改为 `var(--bg-secondary)` 和 `var(--border)`。\n\n- **[LOW]** `css.ts:489` — `.search-result mark { background: #3d3000; color: var(--warning); }` 同样是硬编码暗色背景，在亮色主题下高亮标记将不可见（深棕色背景叠加亮色页面）。应改为带主题变量的实现。\n\n- **[LOW]** `css.ts:413-414` — `.message-user .message-role { color: #58a6ff; }` 和 `.message-assistant .message-role { color: #8b949e; }` 均为硬编码颜色，在亮色主题下对比度不足（`#8b949e` 在白底上）。应使用 `var(--accent)` 和 `var(--text-muted)`。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`render/projects.ts`\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `projects.ts:53-57` — `lastActive` 计算：\n\n  ```ts\n  const lastActive = sessions\n    .map(s => s.started_at)\n    .sort()\n    .at(-1)\n    ?.slice(0, 10) ?? '—'\n  ```\n\n  `.sort()` 是字符串字典序排序，对 ISO8601 时间戳有效，但若 `started_at` 格式不一致（如部分带时区 `+08:00`，部分不带），字典序排序结果不可靠。建议显式使用 `.localeCompare()` 或将其转换为 `Date` 后排序，与 `transcript-list.ts:16` 的做法保持一致。\n\n- **[LOW]** `projects.ts:65` — `last active` 文字硬编码英文，未进行 i18n 处理。在 `zh-CN` locale 下会显示 `\"最近会话 · last active 2026-03-16\"`，语言不一致。\n\n- **[LOW]** `projects.ts:73` — `${sorted.length} project(s)` 同样硬编码英文，未走 i18n。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`render/graph.ts`\n\n- **[CRITICAL]** `graph.ts:117` — JSON 注入防御不完整：\n\n  ```ts\n  const graphDataJson = JSON.stringify({ nodes, edges }).replace(/<\\//g, '<\\\\/')\n  ```\n\n  `JSON.stringify` 的输出被直接插入 `<script>` 块内。只替换了 `</` 来防止 `</script>` 注入，但**没有处理 `<!--` 和 `]]>`** 等其他可以破坏 script 块的序列。更严重的是，**节点的 `label` 字段**来自 `m.title || m.session_id.slice(0, 8)`，而 `m.title` 来自 manifest JSON，若 manifest 被攻击者控制（例如通过恶意仓库），可以注入任意 JavaScript 字符串到 `GRAPH_DATA`，导致 script 注入（因为 `JSON.stringify` 本身不转义 Unicode 注入攻击向量如 `\\u2028`/`\\u2029` 在老浏览器中可导致 script 段落截断）。\n  \n  修复：使用 `JSON.stringify` + 更完整的替换（`/</g` → `\\u003c`），或通过 `<script type=\"application/json\" id=\"graph-data\">` 嵌入数据后在 JS 中解析，彻底隔离数据与代码。\n\n- **[HIGH]** `graph.ts:351-355` — 动画循环 `requestAnimationFrame(loop)` **永不停止**，即使 `ALPHA < ALPHA_MIN`（模拟收敛后），`draw()` 仍每帧都执行。在有大量节点（接近 MAX_NODES=500）的情况下，这将持续消耗 GPU/CPU，可能导致笔记本发热或页面卡顿。应在 `ALPHA < ALPHA_MIN` 且非交互状态时暂停动画循环，用户交互（拖拽/平移）时再重启。\n\n- **[HIGH]** `graph.ts:183-223` — 力导向模拟的 O(n²) 排斥计算（两重 for 循环遍历所有节点对）在节点数量接近 MAX_NODES=500 时，每个 tick 需要 `500*499/2 ≈ 125000` 次浮点运算，加上 60fps 动画，将导致严重性能问题。代码注释已标注 `// Repulsion (n^2, capped)` 但 MAX_NODES=500 对于 O(n²) 仍然过大。建议将 MAX_NODES 降至 100-200，或实现空间分区（四叉树）优化。\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `graph.ts:132-133` / `graph.ts:228` — `resize()` 函数更新了 canvas 的物理像素尺寸并调用 `ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)`，但**每次 resize 都累积 scale 变换**（没有 `ctx.resetTransform()` 或 `ctx.setTransform(1,0,0,1,0,0)`），多次 resize 后 DPI 缩放会叠加失真。`draw()` 中的 `ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H)` 使用的是 CSS 像素尺寸，而 canvas 物理像素尺寸是 `W*dpr`，会导致只清除部分画布。\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `graph.ts:271` — `var tooltip = document.getElementById('graph-tooltip');` 引用了一个不存在于 HTML 中的元素（content 字符串中无 `id=\"graph-tooltip\"` 的元素），`tooltip` 永远为 `null`，该变量声明无意义，是死代码。\n\n- **[LOW]** `graph.ts:76` — `linkGraph.forwardLinks` 的类型是 `Record<string, string[]>`，但 `forwardLinks` 值的元素可能是 knowledge 节点 ID（格式为 `knowledge:filename`），而 manifest session 节点的 ID 是纯 session UUID，两者格式不同。`nodeSet.has(targetId)` 需要 knowledge 节点已添加到 `nodeSet`，这依赖于 knowledge 节点在 manifest 节点之后处理，顺序正确，但整个逻辑缺乏显式注释，维护风险较高。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`render/todos.ts` / `render/archive.ts`\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `todos.ts:27` / `archive.ts:27` — `id=\"${escHtml(slugifyName(f.filename))}\"` 中 `slugifyName` 将文件名转为小写字母数字加连字符，如果两个文件名 slugify 后相同（如 `my-todo.md` 和 `MY TODO.md`），会产生重复 HTML id，导致锚点链接失效。应追加序号以保证唯一性。\n\n- **[LOW]** `todos.ts:19` — `\"No todo files found in Memory/02_todos/.\"` 硬编码英文路径和提示，未 i18n 化，在 `zh-CN` locale 下语言不一致。`archive.ts:19` 同理。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`render/transcript-list.ts`\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `transcript-list.ts:48` — `const summary = ''`，`data-summary` 属性始终为空字符串。在 `SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS` 的 popover 代码中，只有 `summary` 非空才显示 popover 内容，因此 transcript 列表中的会话链接**永远不会显示 popover**，这与预期的悬浮摘要功能矛盾。summaries 应该在 `buildReport` 阶段收集后传入此渲染函数，但目前 `renderTranscriptList` 签名中没有 `summaries` 参数。\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `transcript-list.ts:115` — `renderTabBar` 中计算每个 client 的 count：\n\n  ```ts\n  const count = manifests.filter(m => m.client === client).length\n  ```\n\n  这是 O(clients × manifests) 的计算，在 manifests 量大时（如 1000+ 会话）会有轻微性能损耗。应改为在上方的 `for` 循环中同时统计计数。\n\n- **[LOW]** `transcript-list.ts:92-100` — 表头 \"Title\" 列硬编码英文，未使用 i18n，在 `zh-CN` locale 下不一致。\n\n- **[LOW]** `transcript-list.ts:86` — `${sorted.length} session(s) imported` 硬编码英文。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`deploy/github-pages.ts`\n\n- **[CRITICAL]** `github-pages.ts:50-52` — Shell 注入漏洞：\n\n  ```ts\n  execSafe(repoRoot, `git worktree add --orphan -b ${branch} \"${worktreePath}\"`)\n  execSafe(repoRoot, `git push origin ${branch}`)\n  execSafe(repoRoot, `git subtree push --prefix \"${relOutput}\" origin ${branch}`)\n  ```\n\n  `branch` 变量来自用户配置（`config.toml` 的 `gh_pages_branch` 字段），未经任何验证就插入 shell 命令字符串。若用户配置为 `main; rm -rf /`，将执行任意 shell 命令。`relOutput` 也通过 `makeRelative` 处理，但该函数本身也不验证内容。\n  \n  修复：用 `execSync(cmd, { cwd, stdio: 'pipe' })` 的数组形式 `execFileSync('git', ['worktree', 'add', ...])`，彻底避免 shell 解析；或至少对 `branch` 进行 `/^[a-zA-Z0-9/_.-]+$/` 白名单校验。\n\n- **[HIGH]** `github-pages.ts:48` — `worktreePath` 使用 `.git/gh-pages-init-worktree` 作为路径：\n\n  ```ts\n  const worktreePath = join(repoRoot, '.git', 'gh-pages-init-worktree')\n  ```\n\n  `.git` 目录内部不是 git worktree 的合法位置（会干扰 git 内部结构）。标准做法是在 `.git/worktrees/` 之外的临时目录创建 worktree，例如 `os.tmpdir()`。另外，如果上次运行时 worktree remove 失败，此路径已存在，`git worktree add` 命令会报错。\n\n- **[HIGH]** `github-pages.ts:62` — `git subtree push` 是一个**极其缓慢**的操作，它会遍历整个 git 历史来提取子树。对于大型仓库或长历史，这可能耗时数分钟甚至更长，并且无超时控制（`execSync` 默认无超时）。应设置合理的超时，或改用 `git worktree` + `git push --force` 的方案。\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `github-pages.ts:78-86` — `makeRelative` 函数：\n\n  ```ts\n  function makeRelative(base: string, target: string): string {\n    const b = base.replace(/\\\\/g, '/').replace(/\\/$/, '')\n    const t = target.replace(/\\\\/g, '/').replace(/\\/$/, '')\n    if (t.startsWith(b + '/')) {\n      return t.slice(b.length + 1)\n    }\n    return t  // fallback: 返回绝对路径\n  }\n  ```\n\n  当 `target` 不以 `base + '/'` 开头时（例如 output 在仓库外部），fallback 返回**绝对路径**（可能包含 Windows 盘符如 `C:/...`），然后被传入 `git subtree push --prefix \"C:/...\"` 命令中，这必然失败，且错误信息难以调试。应明确检测此情况并提前抛出有意义的错误。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`deploy/webhook.ts`\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `webhook.ts:70-73` — Telegram payload 中的 `reportUrl` 被直接拼接进 Markdown 格式的消息字符串：\n\n  ```ts\n  if (reportUrl) text += `\\n[View Report](${reportUrl})`\n  return { text, parse_mode: 'Markdown' }\n  ```\n\n  若 `reportUrl` 包含 Markdown 特殊字符（如括号 `)`），会破坏消息格式或造成 Markdown 注入。应对 URL 进行 URL 编码，或改用 `parse_mode: 'MarkdownV2'` 并转义。\n\n- **[LOW]** `webhook.ts:134` — `port: url.port || (url.protocol === 'https:' ? 443 : 80)` — `url.port` 是字符串类型，空字符串在 `||` 条件下为 falsy，逻辑正确；但类型上 `port` 选项期望 `number`，传入字符串 `url.port`（如 `\"8080\"`）在 Node.js `http.request` 选项中能被接受但不够严谨，建议 `Number(url.port) || ...`。\n\n- **[LOW]** `webhook.ts:153` — `req.setTimeout(5000, ...)` 设置了超时后销毁请求，但 `reject(new Error('timeout'))` 会触发 outer `catch` 记录 warn，这是正确的。但 5 秒超时对部分 webhook（如 Feishu 在中国大陆 → 境外服务器）可能过短，建议使其可配置。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`report/build.ts`\n\n- **[HIGH]** `build.ts:194` — 闭包变量遮蔽（shadow）问题：\n\n  ```ts\n  const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(manifests, m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '')\n  ```\n\n  这里的参数 `m` 遮蔽了外层 `for (const m of manifests)` 循环结束后残留的 `m`（实际上 `for...of` 结束后 `m` 不在作用域内，但在 `summaryPromises` 的 IIFE 中有 `const manifest = m; const msgs = messages`）。在循环中存储 `manifest` 引用是正确的，但`m` 的命名在不同作用域多次出现（build.ts:90 的 for 循环变量 `m`，以及 searchIndex 回调的 `m`），增加阅读混淆风险。\n\n- **[HIGH]** `build.ts:90-127` — 所有 transcript 的解析（`parseCleanMarkdownMessages`）和 raw JSONL 的读取是**串行**的（在 `for` 循环中同步执行），只有 AI 摘要调用是并行的。对于大量 manifests（如 1000+ 个），同步 `readFileSync` 的 I/O 会成为瓶颈。但这是可接受的架构选择，不算 bug，仅标注。\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `build.ts:295` — `parseMessagesFromMarkdown` 中：\n\n  ```ts\n  const msgSection = content.indexOf('\\n## Messages')\n  if (msgSection === -1) return []\n  const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after \"## Messages\\n\"\n  ```\n\n  硬编码偏移量 `+ 12` 是 `'\\n## Messages\\n'` 的长度（1 + 11 + 1 = 13，而非 12）。`'\\n## Messages'` 是 12 个字符，`body` 的起始位置应是 `msgSection + 13`（跳过末尾换行符），或者 `msgSection + '\\n## Messages\\n'.length`。当前实现会将 `body` 起始于 `## Messages` 末尾字符（`s`）之后，而非换行符之后，如果 `## Messages` 后直接跟 `\\n`，body 实际上以 `\\n` 开头，对后续正则解析无影响，但若文件格式有变化（如无末尾换行），会导致偏移错误。这是一个隐藏的脆弱点（fragile magic number）。\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `build.ts:249-263` — `loadManifestsRecursive`：如果目录中存在同名（不同扩展名）文件，会被当作目录进行递归尝试（`readdirSync` 对普通文件会抛异常并被 catch 忽略），产生不必要的异常开销。应先用 `statSync` 或 `readdirSync` 的 `{ withFileTypes: true }` 选项区分文件和目录。\n\n- **[LOW]** `build.ts:207-209` — 当 `!ghPagesBranch` 但 `cname` 有值时，动态 import `node:fs` 的 `writeFileSync`：\n\n  ```ts\n  const { writeFileSync: wf } = await import('node:fs')\n  wf(join(output, 'CNAME'), cname + '\\n', 'utf-8')\n  ```\n\n  `node:fs` 的 `writeFileSync` 在文件顶部已经静态导入（第7行），此处重复动态导入是冗余代码，应直接使用顶部导入的 `writeFileSync`。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`heartbeat/config.ts`\n\n- **[MEDIUM]** `config.ts:93-96` — `saveConfig` 中对 `readonly` 字段使用了 `?? DEFAULT_*` 的可选链：\n\n  ```ts\n  `locale = ${tomlString(cfg.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE)}`,\n  ```\n\n  `Config` 接口中 `locale`、`gh_pages_branch`、`cname`、`webhook_url` 均为非可选的 `readonly string`，TypeScript 类型上这些字段不可能为 `undefined`，`?? DEFAULT_*` 是多余的（编译时有 `strictNullChecks`）。更深层的问题是：若传入的 `Config` 对象在运行时这些字段真的是 `undefined`（比如来自外部源），类型系统没有捕获，却被 `??` 静默处理。\n\n- **[LOW]** `config.ts:267-270` — `tomlString` 函数：\n\n  ```ts\n  function tomlString(value: string): string {\n    const escaped = value.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\\\\\\\').replace(/\"/g, '\\\\\"')\n    return `\"${escaped}\"`\n  }\n  ```\n\n  未转义 TOML 字符串中的其他特殊字符：换行符（`\\n`）、回车符（`\\r`）、制表符（`\\t`）。若用户的 `webhook_url` 或其他字段包含换行符（理论上不应该，但未在输入验证层阻止），生成的 TOML 文件会语法错误。\n\n- **[LOW]** `config.ts:148` — `registerProject` 中：\n\n  ```ts\n  const name = resolved.split('/').pop() ?? ''\n  ```\n\n  若 `resolved` 为根路径（`/`），`split('/').pop()` 返回空字符串 `''`，name 为空，这在 `saveConfig` 中会跳过 name 写入（`if (project.name)`），行为正确但 edge case 隐晦。\n\n---\n\n### 文件：`types/report.ts`\n\n- **[LOW]** `report.ts:10` — `dateRange: { from: string; to: string }` 中 `from` 和 `to` 的格式未在类型中约束（只是 `string`），使用方在 `dashboard.ts` 中 `subtitle.replace('{from}', stats.dateRange.from)` 时有隐式依赖，若 `from` 格式不是预期的 `YYYY-MM-DD` 则用户看到原始字符串。建议添加 JSDoc 注释说明期望格式。\n\n---\n\n## 汇总问题清单\n\n| 严重度 | 数量 | 主要问题 |\n|--------|------|----------|\n| CRITICAL | 2 | graph.ts JSON 注入、github-pages.ts shell 注入 |\n| HIGH | 5 | 动画永不停止、O(n²)性能、canvas DPI bug、gh-pages worktree路径、git subtree无超时 |\n| MEDIUM | 10 | popover XSS、nav路径深度bug、summary-card硬编码颜色、canvas clearRect bug、transcript摘要永空、markdown偏移量、loadManifests无类型判断等 |\n| LOW | 12 | i18n占位符未替换、硬编码英文文字、light theme颜色、tomlString不完整转义等 |\n\n---\n\n## 总体评级：🟠 HIGH\n\n两个 CRITICAL 问题（shell 注入和 script 注入）需要**立即修复**才能在受信任边界之外使用。canvas 动画和 O(n²) 性能问题在大数据集下将严重影响用户体验。popover XSS 依赖于 session 标题是否被攻击者控制，在纯本地使用场景风险较低，但在 GitHub Pages 公开部署场景下需修复。其余 MEDIUM/LOW 问题不影响核心功能但影响产品质量和可维护性。",
    "type": "text"
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "agentId: ab98df1f8deafd28a (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)\n<usage>total_tokens: 67216\ntool_uses: 19\nduration_ms: 193734</usage>"
  }
]

Expand full message

两轮 review 完成，结果高度一致。下面是汇总表，然后我来逐一修复。

---

## Review 汇总

### 安全问题

| 严重度 | 位置 | 问题 |
|--------|------|------|
| 🔴 CRITICAL | github-pages.ts:50-62 | Shell 注入：branch 未经校验直接拼入 execSync 字符串，用户可在 config.toml 写入 ;rm -rf / 执行任意命令 |
| 🟠 HIGH | layout.ts:87-88 | Popover XSS：getAttribute() 取回已解码字符串后通过 innerHTML 写入，escHtml 防护失效 |
| 🟠 HIGH | webhook.ts:130 | SSRF：允许 http:// 协议及内网地址（169.254.169.254 等），无任何 URL 校验 |
| 🟠 HIGH | graph.ts:117 | JSON 注入防御不完整：只转义了 </，未处理 \u2028/\u2029 |

### 功能/逻辑 Bug

| 严重度 | 位置 | 问题 |
|--------|------|------|
| 🟠 HIGH | build.ts:113-126 | Promise.all 无单任务错误隔离，一个 transcript 失败会中止整个构建 |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | transcript-list.ts:48 | data-summary 始终为空字符串，Popover 功能永远不显示 |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | layout.ts:119-132 | 三级深度路径错误：transcript 单页（transcripts/claude/xxx.html）的侧边栏链接层级计算错误 |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | graph.ts:271 | 引用了不存在的 #graph-tooltip 元素，死代码 |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | github-pages.ts:48 | worktree 路径在 .git/ 内部，不合法；且无超时控制 |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | build.ts:207-209 | node:fs 已静态导入，此处重复动态 import writeFileSync |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | css.ts | .summary-card、mark、message-role 颜色硬编码，亮色主题下显示异常 |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | i18n/en.ts:17 | subtitle 含 {from} {to} 占位符，但 dashboard.ts 中已有替换逻辑（✅已实现，两位 reviewer 误判，实际无问题） |

### 性能问题

| 严重度 | 位置 | 问题 |
|--------|------|------|
| 🟠 HIGH | graph.ts:350-355 | 动画 loop 永不停止，模拟收敛后仍每帧重绘（500节点持续耗 GPU） |
| 🟠 HIGH | graph.ts:183-223 | O(n²) 排斥计算，MAX_NODES=500 时每帧约 125,000 次浮点运算 |

### 测试不足

| 严重度 | 位置 | 问题 |
|--------|------|------|
| 🟠 HIGH | deploy/webhook.test.ts | HTTP 未被 mock，payload 结构完全未断言 |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | deploy/github-pages.test.ts | 未测试 branch 含 shell 元字符的行为 |

---

两位 reviewer 结论一致：🟠 HIGH — 有 2 个 P0 问题（Shell 注入 + Popover XSS）须修复后再进入第二阶段。

现在开始修复，按 P0 → P1 → P2 顺序进行？

Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * GitHub Pages deployment: push report output to gh-pages branch.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import { writeFileSync, existsSync } from 'node:fs'
     6→import { join } from 'node:path'
     7→import { execSync } from 'node:child_process'
     8→
     9→import { getLogger } from '../../heartbeat/log.js'
    10→
    11→export interface GithubPagesOptions {
    12→  /** Repository root (contains .git/) */
    13→  repoRoot: string
    14→  /** Report output directory (e.g. Memory/07_reports) */
    15→  outputDir: string
    16→  /** Branch name to push to (e.g. 'gh-pages'). Empty string = skip. */
    17→  branch: string
    18→  /** Custom domain (CNAME). Empty string = skip. */
    19→  cname: string
    20→}
    21→
    22→export async function deployGithubPages(options: GithubPagesOptions): Promise<void> {
    23→  const { repoRoot, outputDir, branch, cname } = options
    24→  const logger = getLogger()
    25→
    26→  if (!branch) return
    27→
    28→  try {
    29→    // 1. Write CNAME file if configured
    30→    if (cname) {
    31→      const cnamePath = join(outputDir, 'CNAME')
    32→      writeFileSync(cnamePath, cname + '\n', 'utf-8')
    33→      logger.info(`[gh-pages] CNAME written: ${cname}`)
    34→    }
    35→
    36→    // 2. Check if branch exists on remote
    37→    let branchExists = false
    38→    try {
    39→      execSafe(repoRoot, `git ls-remote --exit-code --heads origin ${branch}`)
    40→      branchExists = true
    41→    } catch {
    42→      branchExists = false
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    if (!branchExists) {
    46→      // Create orphan branch with an empty commit
    47→      logger.info(`[gh-pages] Branch '${branch}' not found, creating orphan...`)
    48→      const worktreePath = join(repoRoot, '.git', 'gh-pages-init-worktree')
    49→      try {
    50→        execSafe(repoRoot, `git worktree add --orphan -b ${branch} "${worktreePath}"`)
    51→        execSafe(worktreePath, 'git commit --allow-empty -m "chore: init gh-pages"')
    52→        execSafe(repoRoot, `git push origin ${branch}`)
    53→      } finally {
    54→        try { execSafe(repoRoot, `git worktree remove --force "${worktreePath}"`) } catch { /* ignore */ }
    55→      }
    56→    }
    57→
    58→    // 3. Push using git subtree
    59→    // Compute relative path of outputDir from repoRoot
    60→    const relOutput = makeRelative(repoRoot, outputDir)
    61→    logger.info(`[gh-pages] Pushing ${relOutput} to origin/${branch}...`)
    62→    execSafe(repoRoot, `git subtree push --prefix "${relOutput}" origin ${branch}`)
    63→    logger.info(`[gh-pages] Successfully pushed to origin/${branch}`)
    64→  } catch (err: unknown) {
    65→    logger.warn(`[gh-pages] Deploy failed: ${String(err)}`)
    66→    // Never throw — report deploy failure must not abort heartbeat
    67→  }
    68→}
    69→
    70→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    71→// Helpers
    72→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    73→
    74→function execSafe(cwd: string, command: string): string {
    75→  return execSync(command, { cwd, stdio: 'pipe' }).toString()
    76→}
    77→
    78→function makeRelative(base: string, target: string): string {
    79→  // Normalize separators
    80→  const b = base.replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/$/, '')
    81→  const t = target.replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/$/, '')
    82→  if (t.startsWith(b + '/')) {
    83→    return t.slice(b.length + 1)
    84→  }
    85→  return t
    86→}
    87→

1→/**
     2→ * HTML layout helpers: shell, navigation, and HTML escaping.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import { basename } from 'node:path'
     6→
     7→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     8→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     9→import { REPORT_CSS } from './css.js'
    10→
    11→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    12→// HTML escaping
    13→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    14→
    15→export function escHtml(text: string): string {
    16→  return text
    17→    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
    18→    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
    19→    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
    20→    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
    21→    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;')
    22→}
    23→
    24→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    25→// Navigation page IDs
    26→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    27→
    28→export type NavPage =
    29→  | 'dashboard'
    30→  | 'transcripts'
    31→  | 'projects'
    32→  | 'graph'
    33→  | 'goals'
    34→  | 'todos'
    35→  | 'knowledge'
    36→  | 'archive'
    37→  | 'search'
    38→
    39→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    40→// Sidebar navigation
    41→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    42→
    43→const SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS = `
    44→<script>
    45→(function() {
    46→  // Theme
    47→  var saved = localStorage.getItem('mt-theme') || 'dark';
    48→  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', saved);
    49→  function updateThemeBtn() {
    50→    var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
    51→    if (btn) btn.textContent = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? '☀ Light' : '☾ Dark';
    52→  }
    53→  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    54→    updateThemeBtn();
    55→    var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
    56→    if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    57→      var next = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
    58→      document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
    59→      localStorage.setItem('mt-theme', next);
    60→      updateThemeBtn();
    61→    });
    62→    // Mobile hamburger
    63→    var hb = document.getElementById('hamburger');
    64→    var sb = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    65→    var ov = document.getElementById('sidebar-overlay');
    66→    function closeSidebar() {
    67→      if (sb) sb.classList.remove('open');
    68→      if (ov) ov.classList.remove('open');
    69→    }
    70→    if (hb) hb.addEventListener('click', function() {
    71→      if (sb) sb.classList.toggle('open');
    72→      if (ov) ov.classList.toggle('open');
    73→    });
    74→    if (ov) ov.addEventListener('click', closeSidebar);
    75→    // Popover preview
    76→    var popover = null;
    77→    document.querySelectorAll('a[data-summary]').forEach(function(el) {
    78→      el.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(e) {
    79→        var summary = el.getAttribute('data-summary') || '';
    80→        var meta = el.getAttribute('data-meta') || '';
    81→        if (!summary && !meta) return;
    82→        if (!popover) {
    83→          popover = document.createElement('div');
    84→          popover.className = 'popover';
    85→          document.body.appendChild(popover);
    86→        }
    87→        popover.innerHTML = (meta ? '<div class="popover-meta">' + meta + '</div>' : '') +
    88→          (summary ? '<div class="popover-summary">' + summary + '</div>' : '');
    89→        popover.style.display = 'block';
    90→        positionPopover(e);
    91→      });
    92→      el.addEventListener('mousemove', positionPopover);
    93→      el.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
    94→        if (popover) popover.style.display = 'none';
    95→      });
    96→    });
    97→    function positionPopover(e) {
    98→      if (!popover) return;
    99→      var x = e.clientX + 12;
   100→      var y = e.clientY + 12;
   101→      var pw = popover.offsetWidth || 320;
   102→      var ph = popover.offsetHeight || 80;
   103→      if (x + pw > window.innerWidth - 8) x = e.clientX - pw - 12;
   104→      if (y + ph > window.innerHeight - 8) y = e.clientY - ph - 12;
   105→      popover.style.left = x + 'px';
   106→      popover.style.top = y + 'px';
   107→    }
   108→  });
   109→})();
   110→</script>`

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation. Summary: 1. Primary Request and Intent: **Phase 1 (completed):** ...

Expand full message

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

Phase 1 (completed): Implement "MemoryTree Report v2 — Quartz 对标全功能升级" — a full-feature upgrade of the static HTML report system. The plan included: i18n system (en/zh-CN), sidebar navigation with responsive layout, dark/light theme toggle, knowledge graph (force-directed canvas), projects page, todos/archive pages, client tab filtering, session link popover preview, GitHub Pages deployment, webhook notifications (Feishu/Telegram/Discord/Slack/generic), 4 new config fields, extended BuildReportOptions, and a full test suite.

Phase 2 (completed): Two parallel code reviews were performed. Both reviewers returned detailed findings. User confirmed they understood the findings.

Phase 3 (in progress): User said "好的 请开始修复" — fix all issues identified in the reviews, in P0→P1→P2 priority order. No fixes have been written yet; the assistant just read two files before this summary was requested.

---

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- NodeNext ESM TypeScript with strict mode, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes
- Vitest test framework, mock node:os homedir to tmpdir
- tsup bundler, entry src/cli/main.ts → dist/cli.js
- smol-toml for TOML config parsing
- i18n: build-time locale loading (loadLocale(locale)), static imports to avoid circular deps, Translations interface in separate types.ts
- Sidebar navigation: CSS fixed 240px, hamburger on mobile <768px, localStorage.mt-theme for theme persistence
- Force-directed graph: vanilla JS canvas, O(n²) repulsion simulation, MAX_NODES=500 cap
- GitHub Pages deploy: git subtree push, orphan branch creation via worktree
- Webhook: platform detection by URL pattern, separate payload builders per platform
- Security issues identified: shell injection (execSync + string), popover XSS (innerHTML + getAttribute decode), SSRF (http:// + private IPs), incomplete JSON escaping (missing \u2028/\u2029)

---

3. Files and Code Sections:

- src/report/i18n/types.ts (new) — Translations interface with nav/dashboard/sessions/transcript/graph/projects/search/common sections. Created separately to break circular imports between index.ts ↔ en.ts/zh-CN.ts.

- src/report/i18n/index.ts (new) — loadLocale(locale: string): Translations, falls back to en for unknown locales:

  const LOCALES: Record<string, Translations> = { 'en': en, 'zh-CN': zhCN }
  export function loadLocale(locale: string): Translations {
    return LOCALES[locale] ?? en
  }

- src/report/i18n/en.ts / zh-CN.ts (new) — ~80 string entries each, import from ./types.js.

- src/report/render/css.ts (modified) — Added: [data-theme="light"] overrides; sidebar CSS (.sidebar, .nav-link, .sidebar-footer); mobile topbar; tab-bar; popover; graph-canvas; project-grid; responsive breakpoints at 768px and 1024px. Issue: .summary-card, mark highlight, and .message-role colors are still hardcoded (not theme-aware) — pending fix.

- src/report/render/layout.ts (modified) — Major changes:
- NavPage type extended with 'projects' | 'graph' | 'todos' | 'archive'
- SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS (~70 lines) handles theme toggle, hamburger, and popover. Popover XSS issue at lines 87-88:

    popover.innerHTML = (meta ? '<div class="popover-meta">' + meta + '</div>' : '') +
      (summary ? '<div class="popover-summary">' + summary + '</div>' : '');

getAttribute() decodes &lt; back to <, then innerHTML re-parses — fix: use textContent.
- renderNav(current, rootLevel: boolean, t?) → sidebar HTML. Path depth bug: transcript pages are 2 levels deep (transcripts/{client}/xxx.html) but rootLevel=false only adds '../' (1 level) — pending fix.
- htmlShell now emits full sidebar layout with <div class="main-content">.

- src/report/render/projects.ts (new):

  export function extractProject(cwd: string): string {
    if (!cwd) return 'unknown'
    return cwd.split(/[/\\]/).filter(Boolean).at(-1) ?? 'unknown'
  }

Groups manifests by project name, renders card grid with session count, last active date, client badges.

- src/report/render/graph.ts (new) — buildGraphData() creates session/knowledge nodes + edges from LinkGraph.forwardLinks, caps at MAX_NODES=500. renderGraph() embeds GRAPH_DATA JSON in <script> block:

  const graphDataJson = JSON.stringify({ nodes, edges }).replace(/<\//g, '<\\/')

Issues: only escapes </, not \u2028/\u2029; infinite rAF loop never stops; O(n²) repulsion; dead code document.getElementById('graph-tooltip').

- src/report/render/todos.ts / archive.ts (new) — Reuse goals.ts pattern, render Memory/02_todos/ and Memory/05_archive/.

- src/report/render/transcript-list.ts (modified) — Added client tab bar with JS filtering (data-client attribute on rows, data-filter on tabs). Bug: const summary = '' at line 48 means data-summary is always empty, so popover never shows.

- src/report/render/transcript.ts, knowledge.ts, goals.ts, search.ts, dashboard.ts (modified) — Added optional t?: Translations parameter, updated all displayed strings to use translations with English fallbacks.

- src/report/deploy/github-pages.ts (new):

  function execSafe(cwd: string, command: string): string {
    return execSync(command, { cwd, stdio: 'pipe' }).toString()
  }
  // Called as:
  execSafe(repoRoot, `git ls-remote --exit-code --heads origin ${branch}`)
  execSafe(repoRoot, `git subtree push --prefix "${relOutput}" origin ${branch}`)

CRITICAL: branch from user config is unvalidated and interpolated into shell string. Fix: use spawnSync with array args or validate branch with /^[a-zA-Z0-9._/-]+$/.

- src/report/deploy/webhook.ts (new) — Detects platform by URL pattern, builds platform-specific payloads, sends via node:https/node:http. SSRF issue: allows http:// protocol and private IPs (169.254.169.254 etc.). Fix: force https:, block RFC 1918.

- src/report/build.ts (modified) — Integrates all new pages; loads t = loadLocale(locale); passes t to all render functions; calls deployGithubPages and sendWebhook. Bug: summaries populated during Promise.all phase but never passed to renderTranscriptList (so data-summary stays empty). Bug: Promise.all without per-task error isolation. Minor: redundant dynamic import('node:fs') when static import already at top.

- src/types/report.ts (modified):

  export interface BuildReportOptions {
    root: string; output: string; noAi?: boolean; model?: string
    locale?: string; ghPagesBranch?: string; cname?: string
    webhookUrl?: string; newSessionIds?: string[]
  }

- src/heartbeat/config.ts (modified) — Added locale, gh_pages_branch, cname, webhook_url to Config interface, defaults (DEFAULT_LOCALE = 'en', others = ''), parseRaw, saveConfig. Save uses ?? DEFAULT_* fallback to handle existing test fixtures without new fields.

- src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts (modified) — Passes locale, ghPagesBranch, cname, webhookUrl from config to buildReport().

- Test files (new/modified):
- tests/report/i18n.test.ts — 17 tests: all keys present, non-empty, zh-CN≠en, key parity
- tests/report/render/projects.test.ts — 15 tests: extractProject, grouping, translations
- tests/report/render/graph.test.ts — 13 tests: nodes/edges, 500-cap, empty graph, </script> escaping

- tests/report/deploy/webhook.test.ts — 8 tests: platform URLs, no-throw on failure

4. Errors and fixes:

- Circular import (en.ts/zh-CN.ts ↔ index.ts): Fixed by creating src/report/i18n/types.ts to hold Translations interface; locale files import from types.ts, index.ts imports from locale files.

- saveConfig TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'replace'): Existing config tests pass objects without new fields. Fixed: cfg.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE in saveConfig.

- Test import paths wrong (../../src/... from tests/report/deploy/): Should be ../../../src/.... Fixed all three paths in both deploy test files.

- XSS test assertion failure (not.toContain('<script>')): HTML always has <script> from SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS. Fixed: changed test to check </script> injection escaping using title 'foo</script>bar'.

Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * HTML layout helpers: shell, navigation, and HTML escaping.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import { basename } from 'node:path'
     6→
     7→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     8→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     9→import { REPORT_CSS } from './css.js'
    10→
    11→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    12→// HTML escaping
    13→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    14→
    15→export function escHtml(text: string): string {
    16→  return text
    17→    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
    18→    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
    19→    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
    20→    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
    21→    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;')
    22→}
    23→
    24→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    25→// Navigation page IDs
    26→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    27→
    28→export type NavPage =
    29→  | 'dashboard'
    30→  | 'transcripts'
    31→  | 'projects'
    32→  | 'graph'
    33→  | 'goals'
    34→  | 'todos'
    35→  | 'knowledge'
    36→  | 'archive'
    37→  | 'search'
    38→
    39→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    40→// Sidebar navigation
    41→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    42→
    43→const SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS = `
    44→<script>
    45→(function() {
    46→  // Theme
    47→  var saved = localStorage.getItem('mt-theme') || 'dark';
    48→  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', saved);
    49→  function updateThemeBtn() {
    50→    var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
    51→    if (btn) btn.textContent = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? '☀ Light' : '☾ Dark';
    52→  }
    53→  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    54→    updateThemeBtn();
    55→    var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
    56→    if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    57→      var next = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
    58→      document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
    59→      localStorage.setItem('mt-theme', next);
    60→      updateThemeBtn();
    61→    });
    62→    // Mobile hamburger
    63→    var hb = document.getElementById('hamburger');
    64→    var sb = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    65→    var ov = document.getElementById('sidebar-overlay');
    66→    function closeSidebar() {
    67→      if (sb) sb.classList.remove('open');
    68→      if (ov) ov.classList.remove('open');
    69→    }
    70→    if (hb) hb.addEventListener('click', function() {
    71→      if (sb) sb.classList.toggle('open');
    72→      if (ov) ov.classList.toggle('open');
    73→    });
    74→    if (ov) ov.addEventListener('click', closeSidebar);
    75→    // Popover preview
    76→    var popover = null;
    77→    document.querySelectorAll('a[data-summary]').forEach(function(el) {
    78→      el.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(e) {
    79→        var summary = el.getAttribute('data-summary') || '';
    80→        var meta = el.getAttribute('data-meta') || '';
    81→        if (!summary && !meta) return;
    82→        if (!popover) {
    83→          popover = document.createElement('div');
    84→          popover.className = 'popover';
    85→          document.body.appendChild(popover);
    86→        }
    87→        popover.innerHTML = (meta ? '<div class="popover-meta">' + meta + '</div>' : '') +
    88→          (summary ? '<div class="popover-summary">' + summary + '</div>' : '');
    89→        popover.style.display = 'block';
    90→        positionPopover(e);
    91→      });
    92→      el.addEventListener('mousemove', positionPopover);
    93→      el.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
    94→        if (popover) popover.style.display = 'none';
    95→      });
    96→    });
    97→    function positionPopover(e) {
    98→      if (!popover) return;
    99→      var x = e.clientX + 12;
   100→      var y = e.clientY + 12;
   101→      var pw = popover.offsetWidth || 320;
   102→      var ph = popover.offsetHeight || 80;
   103→      if (x + pw > window.innerWidth - 8) x = e.clientX - pw - 12;
   104→      if (y + ph > window.innerHeight - 8) y = e.clientY - ph - 12;
   105→      popover.style.left = x + 'px';
   106→      popover.style.top = y + 'px';
   107→    }
   108→  });
   109→})();
   110→</script>`
   111→
   112→interface NavItem {
   113→  id: NavPage
   114→  icon: string
   115→  labelKey: keyof Translations['nav']
   116→  href: string
   117→}
   118→
   119→function buildNavItems(rootLevel: boolean): NavItem[] {
   120→  const p = rootLevel ? '' : '../'
   121→  return [
   122→    { id: 'dashboard', icon: '◈', labelKey: 'dashboard', href: `${p}index.html` },
   123→    { id: 'transcripts', icon: '💬', labelKey: 'sessions', href: `${p}transcripts/index.html` },
   124→    { id: 'projects', icon: '📁', labelKey: 'projects', href: `${p}projects/index.html` },
   125→    { id: 'graph', icon: '⬡', labelKey: 'graph', href: `${p}graph.html` },
   126→    { id: 'goals', icon: '🎯', labelKey: 'goals', href: `${p}goals/index.html` },
   127→    { id: 'todos', icon: '✓', labelKey: 'todos', href: `${p}todos/index.html` },
   128→    { id: 'knowledge', icon: '📚', labelKey: 'knowledge', href: `${p}knowledge/index.html` },
   129→    { id: 'archive', icon: '🗄', labelKey: 'archive', href: `${p}archive/index.html` },
   130→    { id: 'search', icon: '🔍', labelKey: 'search', href: `${p}search.html` },
   131→  ]
   132→}
   133→
   134→export function renderNav(current: NavPage, rootLevel: boolean, t?: Translations): string {
   135→  const items = buildNavItems(rootLevel)
   136→
   137→  // Labels for each nav item
   138→  const label = (item: NavItem): string => {
   139→    if (t) return t.nav[item.labelKey]
   140→    // Fallback English labels
   141→    const defaults: Record<string, string> = {
   142→      dashboard: 'Dashboard', sessions: 'Sessions', projects: 'Projects',
   143→      graph: 'Graph', goals: 'Goals', todos: 'Todos',
   144→      knowledge: 'Knowledge', archive: 'Archive', search: 'Search',
   145→    }
   146→    return defaults[item.labelKey] ?? item.labelKey
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  const themeLabel = '☀ Light'
   150→
   151→  const navLinks = items.map(item => {
   152→    const cls = item.id === current ? 'nav-link active' : 'nav-link'
   153→    return `<a href="${escHtml(item.href)}" class="${cls}">${escHtml(item.icon)} ${escHtml(label(item))}</a>`
   154→  }).join('\n      ')
   155→
   156→  return `<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
   157→  <div class="sidebar-header">
   158→    <span class="sidebar-brand">MemoryTree</span>
   159→  </div>
   160→  <nav class="sidebar-nav">
   161→    ${navLinks}
   162→  </nav>
   163→  <div class="sidebar-footer">
   164→    <button class="theme-toggle-btn" id="theme-toggle" type="button">${escHtml(themeLabel)}</button>
   165→  </div>
   166→</aside>
   167→<div class="sidebar-overlay" id="sidebar-overlay"></div>`
   168→}
   169→
   170→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   171→// HTML shell
   172→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   173→
   174→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   175→// Transcript URL helpers (single canonical implementation)
   176→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   177→
   178→/**
   179→ * Compute the stem (filename without .md) for a manifest's clean path.
   180→ * Falls back to session_id.
   181→ */
   182→export function manifestStem(m: ManifestEntry): string {
   183→  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
   184→  return cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
   185→}
   186→
   187→/**
   188→ * URL to a transcript page relative to the **root** of the report output dir.
   189→ * Use this from index.html and transcripts/index.html.
   190→ */
   191→export function transcriptUrlFromRoot(m: ManifestEntry): string {
   192→  return `transcripts/${m.client}/${manifestStem(m)}.html`
   193→}
   194→
   195→/**
   196→ * URL to a transcript page relative to **another transcript** page.
   197→ * Use this from individual transcript pages.
   198→ */
   199→export function transcriptUrlFromTranscript(m: ManifestEntry): string {
   200→  return `../${m.client}/${manifestStem(m)}.html`
   201→}
   202→
   203→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   204→// Client badge (allowlisted CSS class)
   205→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   206→
   207→const KNOWN_CLIENTS = new Set(['codex', 'claude', 'gemini'])
   208→
   209→/** Render a coloured client badge. CSS class is allowlisted to prevent injection. */
   210→export function clientBadge(client: string): string {
   211→  const safeClass = KNOWN_CLIENTS.has(client) ? client : 'unknown'
   212→  return `<span class="badge badge-${safeClass}">${escHtml(client)}</span>`
   213→}
   214→
   215→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   216→// Shared MarkdownFile type and slug helper
   217→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   218→
   219→export interface MarkdownFile {
   220→  filename: string
   221→  title: string
   222→  content: string
   223→}
   224→
   225→export function slugifyName(name: string): string {
   226→  return name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
   227→}
   228→
   229→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   230→// HTML shell
   231→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   232→
   233→export function htmlShell(title: string, content: string, nav: string, extraHead = '', lang = 'en'): string {
   234→  const topbar = `<header class="topbar" id="topbar">
   235→  <span class="topbar-brand">MemoryTree</span>
   236→  <div class="topbar-actions">
   237→    <button class="theme-toggle-btn" id="theme-toggle-mobile" type="button">☀</button>
   238→    <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" type="button">☰</button>
   239→  </div>
   240→</header>`
   241→
   242→  return `<!DOCTYPE html>
   243→<html lang="${escHtml(lang)}" data-theme="dark">
   244→<head>
   245→<meta charset="UTF-8">
   246→<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   247→<title>${escHtml(title)} — MemoryTree</title>
   248→<style>${REPORT_CSS}</style>
   249→${extraHead}
   250→${SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS}
   251→</head>
   252→<body>
   253→${topbar}
   254→${nav}
   255→<div class="main-content">
   256→  <div class="container">
   257→${content}
   258→  </div>
   259→</div>
   260→</body>
   261→</html>`
   262→}
   263→

Tool Result #289 Read toolu_01LuJmkiBiKKk3yTNGj9NJD6 13:54:39
Read output=1→/** 2→ * GitHub Pages deployment: push report output to gh-pages branch. 3→ */ 4→ 5→import { writeFileSync, existsSync } from 'node:fs' 6→import { join } from 'node:path' 7→im...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * GitHub Pages deployment: push report output to gh-pages branch.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import { writeFileSync, existsSync } from 'node:fs'
     6→import { join } from 'node:path'
     7→import { execSync } from 'node:child_process'
     8→
     9→import { getLogger } from '../../heartbeat/log.js'
    10→
    11→export interface GithubPagesOptions {
    12→  /** Repository root (contains .git/) */
    13→  repoRoot: string
    14→  /** Report output directory (e.g. Memory/07_reports) */
    15→  outputDir: string
    16→  /** Branch name to push to (e.g. 'gh-pages'). Empty string = skip. */
    17→  branch: string
    18→  /** Custom domain (CNAME). Empty string = skip. */
    19→  cname: string
    20→}
    21→
    22→export async function deployGithubPages(options: GithubPagesOptions): Promise<void> {
    23→  const { repoRoot, outputDir, branch, cname } = options
    24→  const logger = getLogger()
    25→
    26→  if (!branch) return
    27→
    28→  try {
    29→    // 1. Write CNAME file if configured
    30→    if (cname) {
    31→      const cnamePath = join(outputDir, 'CNAME')
    32→      writeFileSync(cnamePath, cname + '\n', 'utf-8')
    33→      logger.info(`[gh-pages] CNAME written: ${cname}`)
    34→    }
    35→
    36→    // 2. Check if branch exists on remote
    37→    let branchExists = false
    38→    try {
    39→      execSafe(repoRoot, `git ls-remote --exit-code --heads origin ${branch}`)
    40→      branchExists = true
    41→    } catch {
    42→      branchExists = false
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    if (!branchExists) {
    46→      // Create orphan branch with an empty commit
    47→      logger.info(`[gh-pages] Branch '${branch}' not found, creating orphan...`)
    48→      const worktreePath = join(repoRoot, '.git', 'gh-pages-init-worktree')
    49→      try {
    50→        execSafe(repoRoot, `git worktree add --orphan -b ${branch} "${worktreePath}"`)
    51→        execSafe(worktreePath, 'git commit --allow-empty -m "chore: init gh-pages"')
    52→        execSafe(repoRoot, `git push origin ${branch}`)
    53→      } finally {
    54→        try { execSafe(repoRoot, `git worktree remove --force "${worktreePath}"`) } catch { /* ignore */ }
    55→      }
    56→    }
    57→
    58→    // 3. Push using git subtree
    59→    // Compute relative path of outputDir from repoRoot
    60→    const relOutput = makeRelative(repoRoot, outputDir)
    61→    logger.info(`[gh-pages] Pushing ${relOutput} to origin/${branch}...`)
    62→    execSafe(repoRoot, `git subtree push --prefix "${relOutput}" origin ${branch}`)
    63→    logger.info(`[gh-pages] Successfully pushed to origin/${branch}`)
    64→  } catch (err: unknown) {
    65→    logger.warn(`[gh-pages] Deploy failed: ${String(err)}`)
    66→    // Never throw — report deploy failure must not abort heartbeat
    67→  }
    68→}
    69→
    70→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    71→// Helpers
    72→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    73→
    74→function execSafe(cwd: string, command: string): string {
    75→  return execSync(command, { cwd, stdio: 'pipe' }).toString()
    76→}
    77→
    78→function makeRelative(base: string, target: string): string {
    79→  // Normalize separators
    80→  const b = base.replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/$/, '')
    81→  const t = target.replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/$/, '')
    82→  if (t.startsWith(b + '/')) {
    83→    return t.slice(b.length + 1)
    84→  }
    85→  return t
    86→}
    87→

Read output=1→/** 2→ * Webhook notification: sends a POST to configurable endpoints. 3→ * Supports Feishu, Telegram, Discord, Slack, and generic webhooks. 4→ * Never throws — failures are l...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Webhook notification: sends a POST to configurable endpoints.
     3→ * Supports Feishu, Telegram, Discord, Slack, and generic webhooks.
     4→ * Never throws — failures are logged as warnings.
     5→ */
     6→
     7→import { getLogger } from '../../heartbeat/log.js'
     8→
     9→export interface WebhookOptions {
    10→  url: string
    11→  sessionCount: number
    12→  newSessionIds?: string[]
    13→  reportUrl?: string
    14→}
    15→
    16→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17→// Platform detection
    18→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    19→
    20→type Platform = 'feishu' | 'telegram' | 'discord' | 'slack' | 'generic'
    21→
    22→function detectPlatform(url: string): Platform {
    23→  if (url.includes('open.feishu.cn') || url.includes('open.larksuite.com')) return 'feishu'
    24→  if (url.includes('api.telegram.org')) return 'telegram'
    25→  if (url.includes('discord.com/api/webhooks') || url.includes('discordapp.com/api/webhooks')) return 'discord'
    26→  if (url.includes('hooks.slack.com')) return 'slack'
    27→  return 'generic'
    28→}
    29→
    30→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    31→// Payload builders
    32→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    33→
    34→function buildFeishuPayload(options: WebhookOptions): Record<string, unknown> {
    35→  const { sessionCount, newSessionIds = [], reportUrl } = options
    36→  const newCount = newSessionIds.length
    37→  const actionBtn = reportUrl
    38→    ? [{
    39→        tag: 'button',
    40→        text: { content: 'View Report', tag: 'plain_text' },
    41→        url: reportUrl,
    42→        type: 'primary',
    43→      }]
    44→    : []
    45→
    46→  return {
    47→    msg_type: 'interactive',
    48→    card: {
    49→      header: {
    50→        title: { content: 'MemoryTree Report Updated', tag: 'plain_text' },
    51→        template: 'blue',
    52→      },
    53→      elements: [
    54→        {
    55→          tag: 'div',
    56→          text: {
    57→            tag: 'lark_md',
    58→            content: `**Sessions:** ${sessionCount} total${newCount ? `, ${newCount} new` : ''}`,
    59→          },
    60→        },
    61→        ...(actionBtn.length > 0 ? [{ tag: 'action', actions: actionBtn }] : []),
    62→      ],
    63→    },
    64→  }
    65→}
    66→
    67→function buildTelegramPayload(options: WebhookOptions): Record<string, unknown> {
    68→  const { sessionCount, newSessionIds = [], reportUrl } = options
    69→  const newCount = newSessionIds.length
    70→  let text = `📊 *MemoryTree Report Updated*\n\nSessions: ${sessionCount} total`
    71→  if (newCount > 0) text += `, ${newCount} new`
    72→  if (reportUrl) text += `\n[View Report](${reportUrl})`
    73→  return { text, parse_mode: 'Markdown' }
    74→}
    75→
    76→function buildDiscordPayload(options: WebhookOptions): Record<string, unknown> {
    77→  const { sessionCount, newSessionIds = [], reportUrl } = options
    78→  const newCount = newSessionIds.length
    79→  let content = `📊 **MemoryTree Report Updated** — ${sessionCount} sessions total`
    80→  if (newCount > 0) content += `, ${newCount} new`
    81→  if (reportUrl) content += ` · [View Report](${reportUrl})`
    82→  return { content }
    83→}
    84→
    85→function buildSlackPayload(options: WebhookOptions): Record<string, unknown> {
    86→  const { sessionCount, newSessionIds = [], reportUrl } = options
    87→  const newCount = newSessionIds.length
    88→  let text = `📊 MemoryTree Report Updated — ${sessionCount} sessions total`
    89→  if (newCount > 0) text += `, ${newCount} new`
    90→  if (reportUrl) text += ` · <${reportUrl}|View Report>`
    91→  return { text }
    92→}
    93→
    94→function buildGenericPayload(options: WebhookOptions): Record<string, unknown> {
    95→  return {
    96→    event: 'memorytree.report.updated',
    97→    session_count: options.sessionCount,
    98→    new_session_count: options.newSessionIds?.length ?? 0,
    99→    new_session_ids: options.newSessionIds ?? [],
   100→    report_url: options.reportUrl ?? '',
   101→  }
   102→}
   103→
   104→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   105→// Main send function
   106→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   107→
   108→export async function sendWebhook(options: WebhookOptions): Promise<void> {
   109→  if (!options.url) return
   110→  const logger = getLogger()
   111→  const platform = detectPlatform(options.url)
   112→
   113→  const payloadMap: Record<Platform, (o: WebhookOptions) => Record<string, unknown>> = {
   114→    feishu: buildFeishuPayload,
   115→    telegram: buildTelegramPayload,
   116→    discord: buildDiscordPayload,
   117→    slack: buildSlackPayload,
   118→    generic: buildGenericPayload,
   119→  }
   120→
   121→  const payload = payloadMap[platform](options)
   122→
   123→  try {
   124→    const { default: https } = await import('node:https')
   125→    const { default: http } = await import('node:http')
   126→    const body = JSON.stringify(payload)
   127→
   128→    await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
   129→      const url = new URL(options.url)
   130→      const transport = url.protocol === 'https:' ? https : http
   131→      const req = transport.request(
   132→        {
   133→          hostname: url.hostname,
   134→          port: url.port || (url.protocol === 'https:' ? 443 : 80),
   135→          path: url.pathname + url.search,
   136→          method: 'POST',
   137→          headers: {
   138→            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   139→            'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(body),
   140→          },
   141→        },
   142→        res => {
   143→          // Consume response to avoid socket leak
   144→          res.resume()
   145→          if (res.statusCode && res.statusCode >= 400) {
   146→            reject(new Error(`HTTP ${res.statusCode}`))
   147→          } else {
   148→            resolve()
   149→          }
   150→        },
   151→      )
   152→      req.on('error', reject)
   153→      req.setTimeout(5000, () => { req.destroy(); reject(new Error('timeout')) })
   154→      req.write(body)
   155→      req.end()
   156→    })
   157→
   158→    logger.info(`[webhook] Sent ${platform} notification`)
   159→  } catch (err: unknown) {
   160→    logger.warn(`[webhook] Failed to send notification: ${String(err)}`)
   161→    // Never throw
   162→  }
   163→}
   164→

</system-reminder>
Tool Result #293 Read toolu_01DfE1ktvUsYD9AcYuudChN6 13:54:50
Read output=1→/** 2→ * Knowledge graph page: force-directed visualization of sessions and knowledge links. 3→ * Inline vanilla JS, no CDN dependencies. 4→ */ 5→ 6→import type { ManifestEntr...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Knowledge graph page: force-directed visualization of sessions and knowledge links.
     3→ * Inline vanilla JS, no CDN dependencies.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     7→import type { LinkGraph } from '../../types/report.js'
     8→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     9→import type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'
    10→import { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, transcriptUrlFromRoot } from './layout.js'
    11→
    12→const MAX_NODES = 500
    13→
    14→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    15→// Graph data types
    16→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17→
    18→interface GraphNode {
    19→  id: string
    20→  label: string
    21→  type: 'session' | 'knowledge'
    22→  client?: string
    23→  url: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→interface GraphEdge {
    27→  source: string
    28→  target: string
    29→}
    30→
    31→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    32→// Build graph data
    33→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    34→
    35→export function buildGraphData(
    36→  manifests: ManifestEntry[],
    37→  knowledgeFiles: MarkdownFile[],
    38→  linkGraph: LinkGraph,
    39→): { nodes: GraphNode[]; edges: GraphEdge[] } {
    40→  // Cap manifests to MAX_NODES (most recent first)
    41→  const sorted = [...manifests]
    42→    .sort((a, b) => b.started_at.localeCompare(a.started_at))
    43→    .slice(0, MAX_NODES)
    44→
    45→  const nodeSet = new Set<string>()
    46→  const nodes: GraphNode[] = []
    47→  const edges: GraphEdge[] = []
    48→
    49→  for (const m of sorted) {
    50→    if (!nodeSet.has(m.session_id)) {
    51→      nodeSet.add(m.session_id)
    52→      nodes.push({
    53→        id: m.session_id,
    54→        label: m.title || m.session_id.slice(0, 8),
    55→        type: 'session',
    56→        client: m.client,
    57→        url: transcriptUrlFromRoot(m),
    58→      })
    59→    }
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  for (const kf of knowledgeFiles) {
    63→    const id = `knowledge:${kf.filename}`
    64→    if (!nodeSet.has(id)) {
    65→      nodeSet.add(id)
    66→      nodes.push({
    67→        id,
    68→        label: kf.title || kf.filename,
    69→        type: 'knowledge',
    70→        url: `knowledge/index.html#${slugify(kf.filename)}`,
    71→      })
    72→    }
    73→  }
    74→
    75→  // Add edges from link graph (only for nodes that exist)
    76→  for (const [sourceId, targets] of Object.entries(linkGraph.forwardLinks)) {
    77→    if (!nodeSet.has(sourceId)) continue
    78→    for (const targetId of targets) {
    79→      if (nodeSet.has(targetId)) {
    80→        edges.push({ source: sourceId, target: targetId })
    81→      }
    82→    }
    83→  }
    84→
    85→  return { nodes, edges }
    86→}
    87→
    88→function slugify(s: string): string {
    89→  return s.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
    90→}
    91→
    92→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    93→// Graph page renderer
    94→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    95→
    96→export function renderGraph(
    97→  manifests: ManifestEntry[],
    98→  knowledgeFiles: MarkdownFile[],
    99→  linkGraph: LinkGraph,
   100→  t?: Translations,
   101→): string {
   102→  const nav = renderNav('graph', true, t)
   103→  const title = t?.graph.title ?? 'Knowledge Graph'
   104→  const subtitle = t?.graph.subtitle ?? 'Connections between sessions and knowledge files'
   105→
   106→  const { nodes, edges } = buildGraphData(manifests, knowledgeFiles, linkGraph)
   107→
   108→  if (nodes.length === 0) {
   109→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
   110→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
   111→  <p class="subtitle">${escHtml(t?.graph.noData ?? 'No graph data available.')}</p>
   112→</div>`
   113→    return htmlShell(title, content, nav)
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  // Embed graph data as JSON (escape </script> to prevent injection)
   117→  const graphDataJson = JSON.stringify({ nodes, edges }).replace(/<\//g, '<\\/')
   118→
   119→  const graphScript = `<script>
   120→(function() {
   121→var GRAPH_DATA = ${graphDataJson};
   122→
   123→// Client color map
   124→var CLIENT_COLORS = { claude: '#bc8cff', codex: '#58a6ff', gemini: '#3fb950' };
   125→function nodeColor(n) {
   126→  if (n.type === 'knowledge') return '#f0c040';
   127→  return CLIENT_COLORS[n.client] || '#8b949e';
   128→}
   129→function nodeRadius(n) { return n.type === 'knowledge' ? 7 : 5; }
   130→
   131→var canvas = document.getElementById('graph-canvas');
   132→if (!canvas) return;
   133→var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
   134→
   135→// High-DPI
   136→function resize() {
   137→  var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
   138→  var dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
   139→  canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;
   140→  canvas.height = rect.height * dpr;
   141→  ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
   142→}
   143→resize();
   144→window.addEventListener('resize', function() { resize(); draw(); });
   145→
   146→var W = canvas.getBoundingClientRect().width;
   147→var H = canvas.getBoundingClientRect().height;
   148→
   149→// Init positions (random spread)
   150→var nodeMap = {};
   151→var simNodes = GRAPH_DATA.nodes.map(function(n) {
   152→  var sn = { id: n.id, label: n.label, type: n.type, client: n.client, url: n.url,
   153→    x: W/2 + (Math.random()-0.5)*W*0.7, y: H/2 + (Math.random()-0.5)*H*0.7, vx: 0, vy: 0 };
   154→  nodeMap[n.id] = sn;
   155→  return sn;
   156→});
   157→
   158→var simEdges = GRAPH_DATA.edges.map(function(e) {
   159→  return { source: nodeMap[e.source], target: nodeMap[e.target] };
   160→}).filter(function(e) { return e.source && e.target; });
   161→
   162→// Simulation params
   163→var ALPHA = 1.0;
   164→var ALPHA_DECAY = 0.0228;
   165→var ALPHA_MIN = 0.001;
   166→var CHARGE = -120;
   167→var LINK_DIST = 80;
   168→var CENTER_FORCE = 0.05;
   169→var DAMPING = 0.6;
   170→
   171→// Pan/zoom state
   172→var panX = 0, panY = 0, scale = 1;
   173→var dragging = false, dragNode = null, dragOffX = 0, dragOffY = 0;
   174→var isPanning = false, panStartX = 0, panStartY = 0, panStartPanX = 0, panStartPanY = 0;
   175→
   176→function worldToScreen(wx, wy) {
   177→  return { x: (wx + panX) * scale + W/2, y: (wy + panY) * scale + H/2 };
   178→}
   179→function screenToWorld(sx, sy) {
   180→  return { x: (sx - W/2) / scale - panX, y: (sy - H/2) / scale - panY };
   181→}
   182→
   183→function tick() {
   184→  if (ALPHA < ALPHA_MIN) return;
   185→  ALPHA *= (1 - ALPHA_DECAY);
   186→
   187→  // Repulsion (n^2, capped)
   188→  var N = simNodes.length;
   189→  for (var i = 0; i < N; i++) {
   190→    for (var j = i+1; j < N; j++) {
   191→      var ni = simNodes[i], nj = simNodes[j];
   192→      var dx = nj.x - ni.x, dy = nj.y - ni.y;
   193→      var dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy) || 1;
   194→      var force = CHARGE / (dist * dist) * ALPHA;
   195→      var fx = dx / dist * force, fy = dy / dist * force;
   196→      ni.vx -= fx; ni.vy -= fy;
   197→      nj.vx += fx; nj.vy += fy;
   198→    }
   199→  }
   200→
   201→  // Link attraction
   202→  for (var k = 0; k < simEdges.length; k++) {
   203→    var e = simEdges[k];
   204→    var dx2 = e.target.x - e.source.x, dy2 = e.target.y - e.source.y;
   205→    var dist2 = Math.sqrt(dx2*dx2 + dy2*dy2) || 1;
   206→    var strength = (dist2 - LINK_DIST) / dist2 * 0.5 * ALPHA;
   207→    var fx2 = dx2 * strength, fy2 = dy2 * strength;
   208→    e.source.vx += fx2; e.source.vy += fy2;
   209→    e.target.vx -= fx2; e.target.vy -= fy2;
   210→  }
   211→
   212→  // Center gravity
   213→  for (var m = 0; m < N; m++) {
   214→    var node = simNodes[m];
   215→    node.vx += -node.x * CENTER_FORCE * ALPHA;
   216→    node.vy += -node.y * CENTER_FORCE * ALPHA;
   217→    if (node === dragNode) continue;
   218→    node.vx *= DAMPING;
   219→    node.vy *= DAMPING;
   220→    node.x += node.vx;
   221→    node.y += node.vy;
   222→  }
   223→}
   224→
   225→function draw() {
   226→  W = canvas.getBoundingClientRect().width;
   227→  H = canvas.getBoundingClientRect().height;
   228→  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
   229→  ctx.save();
   230→
   231→  // Draw edges
   232→  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(139,148,158,0.3)';
   233→  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
   234→  for (var k = 0; k < simEdges.length; k++) {
   235→    var e = simEdges[k];
   236→    var s = worldToScreen(e.source.x, e.source.y);
   237→    var t2 = worldToScreen(e.target.x, e.target.y);
   238→    ctx.beginPath();
   239→    ctx.moveTo(s.x, s.y);
   240→    ctx.lineTo(t2.x, t2.y);
   241→    ctx.stroke();
   242→  }
   243→
   244→  // Draw nodes
   245→  for (var i = 0; i < simNodes.length; i++) {
   246→    var n = simNodes[i];
   247→    var pos = worldToScreen(n.x, n.y);
   248→    var r = nodeRadius(n) * scale;
   249→    ctx.beginPath();
   250→    ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, Math.max(r, 3), 0, Math.PI*2);
   251→    ctx.fillStyle = nodeColor(n);
   252→    ctx.fill();
   253→    if (n === hoverNode) {
   254→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff';
   255→      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
   256→      ctx.stroke();
   257→    }
   258→  }
   259→
   260→  // Draw hover label
   261→  if (hoverNode) {
   262→    var hpos = worldToScreen(hoverNode.x, hoverNode.y);
   263→    ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
   264→    ctx.fillStyle = '#e6edf3';
   265→    ctx.fillText(hoverNode.label.slice(0, 30), hpos.x + 8, hpos.y - 4);
   266→  }
   267→
   268→  ctx.restore();
   269→}
   270→
   271→var hoverNode = null;
   272→var tooltip = document.getElementById('graph-tooltip');
   273→
   274→function findNode(sx, sy) {
   275→  var w = screenToWorld(sx, sy);
   276→  var best = null, bestDist = Infinity;
   277→  for (var i = 0; i < simNodes.length; i++) {
   278→    var n = simNodes[i];
   279→    var dx = n.x - w.x, dy = n.y - w.y;
   280→    var dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
   281→    if (dist < 15 / scale && dist < bestDist) { best = n; bestDist = dist; }
   282→  }
   283→  return best;
   284→}
   285→
   286→function getCanvasPos(evt) {
   287→  var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
   288→  return { x: evt.clientX - rect.left, y: evt.clientY - rect.top };
   289→}
   290→
   291→canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
   292→  var pos = getCanvasPos(e);
   293→  if (isPanning) {
   294→    panX = panStartPanX + (pos.x - panStartX) / scale;
   295→    panY = panStartPanY + (pos.y - panStartY) / scale;
   296→    return;
   297→  }
   298→  if (dragNode) {
   299→    var w = screenToWorld(pos.x, pos.y);
   300→    dragNode.x = w.x + dragOffX;
   301→    dragNode.y = w.y + dragOffY;
   302→    dragNode.vx = 0; dragNode.vy = 0;
   303→    return;
   304→  }
   305→  var node = findNode(pos.x, pos.y);
   306→  hoverNode = node;
   307→  canvas.style.cursor = node ? 'pointer' : 'grab';
   308→});
   309→
   310→canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
   311→  var pos = getCanvasPos(e);
   312→  var node = findNode(pos.x, pos.y);
   313→  if (node) {
   314→    dragNode = node;
   315→    var w = screenToWorld(pos.x, pos.y);
   316→    dragOffX = node.x - w.x;
   317→    dragOffY = node.y - w.y;
   318→    ALPHA = 0.3;
   319→  } else {
   320→    isPanning = true;
   321→    panStartX = pos.x; panStartY = pos.y;
   322→    panStartPanX = panX; panStartPanY = panY;
   323→  }
   324→});
   325→
   326→canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', function(e) {
   327→  if (dragNode) { dragNode = null; return; }
   328→  isPanning = false;
   329→});
   330→
   331→canvas.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
   332→  var pos = getCanvasPos(e);
   333→  var node = findNode(pos.x, pos.y);
   334→  if (node && node.url) { window.location.href = node.url; }
   335→});
   336→
   337→canvas.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
   338→  e.preventDefault();
   339→  var pos = getCanvasPos(e);
   340→  var factor = e.deltaY > 0 ? 0.9 : 1.1;
   341→  var wx = (pos.x - W/2) / scale - panX;
   342→  var wy = (pos.y - H/2) / scale - panY;
   343→  scale *= factor;
   344→  scale = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(10, scale));
   345→  panX = (pos.x - W/2) / scale - wx;
   346→  panY = (pos.y - H/2) / scale - wy;
   347→}, { passive: false });
   348→
   349→// Animation loop
   350→function loop() {
   351→  tick();
   352→  draw();
   353→  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
   354→}
   355→loop();
   356→})();
   357→</script>`
   358→
   359→  const legendItems = [
   360→    { color: '#bc8cff', label: 'Claude' },
   361→    { color: '#58a6ff', label: 'Codex' },
   362→    { color: '#3fb950', label: 'Gemini' },
   363→    { color: '#8b949e', label: 'Other' },
   364→    { color: '#f0c040', label: 'Knowledge' },
   365→  ]
   366→
   367→  const legend = legendItems.map(item =>
   368→    `<div class="graph-legend-item">
   369→  <span class="graph-legend-dot" style="background:${escHtml(item.color)}"></span>
   370→  ${escHtml(item.label)}
   371→</div>`
   372→  ).join('')
   373→
   374→  const content = `<div class="page-header">
   375→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
   376→  <p class="subtitle">${escHtml(subtitle)} · ${nodes.length} nodes, ${edges.length} edges</p>
   377→</div>
   378→<canvas id="graph-canvas"></canvas>
   379→<div class="graph-legend">${legend}</div>`
   380→
   381→  return htmlShell(title, content, nav, graphScript)
   382→}
   383→
