Read output=1→/** 2→ * Report build orchestrator. 3→ * Generates a self-contained multi-page HTML website in Memory/07_reports/. 4→ */ 5→ 6→import { 7→ existsSync, 8→ mkdirSync, 9→ readdirS...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Report build orchestrator.
     3→ * Generates a self-contained multi-page HTML website in Memory/07_reports/.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import {
     7→  existsSync,
     8→  mkdirSync,
     9→  readdirSync,
    10→  readFileSync,
    11→  writeFileSync,
    12→  appendFileSync,
    13→} from 'node:fs'
    14→import { basename, dirname, join, relative } from 'node:path'
    15→
    16→import type { BuildReportOptions } from '../types/report.js'
    17→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'
    18→import { computeStats, extractToolNames, accumulateToolCounts } from './stats.js'
    19→import { renderDashboard } from './render/dashboard.js'
    20→import { renderTranscriptList } from './render/transcript-list.js'
    21→import { renderTranscript } from './render/transcript.js'
    22→import type { RenderedMessage } from './render/transcript.js'
    23→import { renderKnowledge } from './render/knowledge.js'
    24→import type { KnowledgeFile } from './render/knowledge.js'
    25→import { renderGoals } from './render/goals.js'
    26→import type { GoalFile } from './render/goals.js'
    27→import { renderTodos } from './render/todos.js'
    28→import { renderArchive } from './render/archive.js'
    29→import { renderProjects } from './render/projects.js'
    30→import { renderGraph } from './render/graph.js'
    31→import { buildSearchIndex, renderSearchPage } from './render/search.js'
    32→import { buildLinkGraph } from './render/links.js'
    33→import { getSummary } from './summarize.js'
    34→import type { SummaryOptions } from './summarize.js'
    35→import { loadLocale } from './i18n/index.js'
    36→import type { Translations } from './i18n/types.js'
    37→
    38→const DEFAULT_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
    39→
    40→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    41→// Main entry point
    42→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    43→
    44→export async function buildReport(options: BuildReportOptions): Promise<void> {
    45→  const { root, output } = options
    46→  const noAi = options.noAi ?? false
    47→  const model = options.model ?? DEFAULT_MODEL
    48→  const locale = options.locale ?? 'en'
    49→  const ghPagesBranch = options.ghPagesBranch ?? ''
    50→  const cname = options.cname ?? ''
    51→  const webhookUrl = options.webhookUrl ?? ''
    52→  const newSessionIds = options.newSessionIds ?? []
    53→
    54→  // Cache lives outside the gitignored output dir so it survives rm -rf
    55→  const cacheDir = join(root, 'Memory', '.report-cache')
    56→
    57→  // Load translations
    58→  const t: Translations = loadLocale(locale)
    59→
    60→  // Ensure output dirs exist
    61→  mkdirSync(output, { recursive: true })
    62→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'transcripts'), { recursive: true })
    63→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'goals'), { recursive: true })
    64→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'knowledge'), { recursive: true })
    65→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'todos'), { recursive: true })
    66→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'archive'), { recursive: true })
    67→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'projects'), { recursive: true })
    68→  mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })
    69→
    70→  // Ensure Memory/07_reports is gitignored
    71→  ensureGitignore(root, 'Memory/07_reports/')
    72→
    73→  // Load all manifests
    74→  const manifests = loadManifests(root)
    75→
    76→  // Build link graph from clean markdown
    77→  const linkGraph = buildLinkGraph(manifests, root)
    78→
    79→  // Accumulate tool counts while processing transcripts
    80→  let toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {}
    81→
    82→  // Summary options
    83→  const summaryOptions: SummaryOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
    84→
    85→  // Process each transcript: parse → summarize → render → write → discard
    86→  const snippets: Record<string, string> = {}
    87→  const summaries: Record<string, string> = {}
    88→  const summaryPromises: Array<Promise<void>> = []
    89→
    90→  for (const m of manifests) {
    91→    const messages = parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m, root)
    92→
    93→    // Tool events from parsed transcript (try raw path)
    94→    const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)
    95→    if (rawPath && existsSync(rawPath)) {
    96→      try {
    97→        const toolSummaries = extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath, m.client)
    98→        const names = extractToolNames(toolSummaries)
    99→        toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, names)
   100→      } catch {
   101→        // Skip if raw parsing fails
   102→      }
   103→    }
   104→
   105→    // Search snippet from first message text
   106→    const firstMsg = messages[0]
   107→    snippets[m.session_id] = firstMsg ? firstMsg.text.slice(0, 300) : ''
   108→
   109→    // Summarize + render (deferred to allow parallel API calls)
   110→    const manifest = m
   111→    const msgs = messages
   112→    summaryPromises.push(
   113→      (async () => {
   114→        const summary = await getSummary(manifest.raw_sha256, msgs, summaryOptions)
   115→        summaries[manifest.session_id] = summary
   116→        const backlinkIds = linkGraph.backlinks[manifest.session_id] ?? []
   117→        const backlinkManifests = backlinkIds
   118→          .map(id => manifests.find(x => x.session_id === id))
   119→          .filter((x): x is ManifestEntry => x !== undefined)
   120→
   121→        const html = renderTranscript(msgs, manifest, summary, backlinkManifests, t)
   122→        const outPath = transcriptOutputPath(output, manifest)
   123→        mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true })
   124→        writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')
   125→      })(),
   126→    )
   127→  }
   128→
   129→  // Wait for all transcript renders (parallel, bounded by semaphore in summarize.ts)
   130→  await Promise.all(summaryPromises)
   131→
   132→  // Compute final stats with accumulated tool counts
   133→  const stats = computeStats(manifests, toolCounts)
   134→
   135→  // Load markdown content for various pages
   136→  const goalFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals'))
   137→  const todoFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos'))
   138→  const knowledgeFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '04_knowledge'))
   139→  const archiveFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '05_archive'))
   140→
   141→  // Dashboard
   142→  writeFileSync(join(output, 'index.html'), renderDashboard(stats, manifests, t), 'utf-8')
   143→
   144→  // Session list
   145→  writeFileSync(
   146→    join(output, 'transcripts', 'index.html'),
   147→    renderTranscriptList(manifests, t),
   148→    'utf-8',
   149→  )
   150→
   151→  // Goals page
   152→  writeFileSync(
   153→    join(output, 'goals', 'index.html'),
   154→    renderGoals(goalFiles, t),
   155→    'utf-8',
   156→  )
   157→
   158→  // Knowledge page
   159→  writeFileSync(
   160→    join(output, 'knowledge', 'index.html'),
   161→    renderKnowledge(knowledgeFiles, t),
   162→    'utf-8',
   163→  )
   164→
   165→  // Todos page
   166→  writeFileSync(
   167→    join(output, 'todos', 'index.html'),
   168→    renderTodos(todoFiles, t),
   169→    'utf-8',
   170→  )
   171→
   172→  // Archive page
   173→  writeFileSync(
   174→    join(output, 'archive', 'index.html'),
   175→    renderArchive(archiveFiles, t),
   176→    'utf-8',
   177→  )
   178→
   179→  // Projects page
   180→  writeFileSync(
   181→    join(output, 'projects', 'index.html'),
   182→    renderProjects(manifests, t),
   183→    'utf-8',
   184→  )
   185→
   186→  // Knowledge graph
   187→  writeFileSync(
   188→    join(output, 'graph.html'),
   189→    renderGraph(manifests, knowledgeFiles, linkGraph, t),
   190→    'utf-8',
   191→  )
   192→
   193→  // Search
   194→  const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(manifests, m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '')
   195→  writeFileSync(join(output, 'search.html'), renderSearchPage(searchIndex, t), 'utf-8')
   196→
   197→  // GitHub Pages deployment (non-blocking on failure)
   198→  if (ghPagesBranch) {
   199→    try {
   200→      const { deployGithubPages } = await import('./deploy/github-pages.js')
   201→      await deployGithubPages({ repoRoot: root, outputDir: output, branch: ghPagesBranch, cname })
   202→    } catch {
   203→      // Logged inside deployGithubPages
   204→    }
   205→  } else if (cname) {
   206→    // Write CNAME even without deploy
   207→    const { writeFileSync: wf } = await import('node:fs')
   208→    wf(join(output, 'CNAME'), cname + '\n', 'utf-8')
   209→  }
   210→
   211→  // Webhook notification (non-blocking on failure)
   212→  if (webhookUrl) {
   213→    try {
   214→      const { sendWebhook } = await import('./deploy/webhook.js')
   215→      await sendWebhook({
   216→        url: webhookUrl,
   217→        sessionCount: manifests.length,
   218→        newSessionIds,
   219→      })
   220→    } catch {
   221→      // Logged inside sendWebhook
   222→    }
   223→  }
   224→}
   225→
   226→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   227→// Manifest loading
   228→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   229→
   230→function loadManifests(root: string): ManifestEntry[] {
   231→  const manifestsDir = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts', 'manifests')
   232→  if (!existsSync(manifestsDir)) return []
   233→
   234→  const manifests: ManifestEntry[] = []
   235→  loadManifestsRecursive(manifestsDir, manifests)
   236→  return manifests
   237→}
   238→
   239→function loadManifestsRecursive(dir: string, out: ManifestEntry[]): void {
   240→  let entries: string[]
   241→  try {
   242→    entries = readdirSync(dir)
   243→  } catch {
   244→    return
   245→  }
   246→
   247→  for (const entry of entries) {
   248→    const fullPath = join(dir, entry)
   249→    if (entry.endsWith('.json')) {
   250→      try {
   251→        const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
   252→        const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as ManifestEntry
   253→        if (parsed.session_id && parsed.client) {
   254→          out.push(parsed)
   255→        }
   256→      } catch {
   257→        // Skip malformed manifests
   258→      }
   259→    } else {
   260→      // Recurse into subdirectories
   261→      loadManifestsRecursive(fullPath, out)
   262→    }
   263→  }
   264→}
   265→
   266→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   267→// Clean markdown message parsing
   268→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   269→
   270→/** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */
   271→export function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {
   272→  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path
   273→    ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path)
   274→    : m.global_clean_path
   275→  if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []
   276→
   277→  let content: string
   278→  try {
   279→    content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
   280→  } catch {
   281→    return []
   282→  }
   283→
   284→  return parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content)
   285→}
   286→
   287→/** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */
   288→export function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {
   289→  const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []
   290→
   291→  // Find ## Messages section
   292→  const msgSection = content.indexOf('\n## Messages')
   293→  if (msgSection === -1) return []
   294→
   295→  const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after "## Messages\n"
   296→
   297→  // Split on ### N. role headers
   298→  const msgRe = /^### \d+\.\s+(\w+)/gm
   299→  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
   300→  const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []
   301→
   302→  while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {
   303→    starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })
   304→  }
   305→
   306→  for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {
   307→    const start = starts[i]
   308→    if (!start) continue
   309→    const nextStart = starts[i + 1]
   310→    const chunk = nextStart
   311→      ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)
   312→      : body.slice(start.index)
   313→
   314→    const lines = chunk.split('\n')
   315→    // First line is the header, second may be timestamp
   316→    let timestamp = ''
   317→    const textLines: string[] = []
   318→    let pastHeader = false
   319→
   320→    for (const line of lines) {
   321→      if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {
   322→        pastHeader = true
   323→        continue
   324→      }
   325→      if (!pastHeader) continue
   326→      const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\s*`([^`]+)`/)
   327→      if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {
   328→        timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''
   329→        continue
   330→      }
   331→      textLines.push(line)
   332→    }
   333→
   334→    // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text
   335→    const text = textLines.join('\n').trim()
   336→    if (text || timestamp) {
   337→      messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })
   338→    }
   339→  }
   340→
   341→  return messages
   342→}
   343→
   344→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   345→// Raw transcript tool extraction
   346→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   347→
   348→/** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */
   349→function extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {
   350→  const summaries: string[] = []
   351→  let content: string
   352→  try {
   353→    content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')
   354→  } catch {
   355→    return []
   356→  }
   357→
   358→  for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
   359→    const trimmed = line.trim()
   360→    if (!trimmed) continue
   361→    try {
   362→      const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
   363→      // Codex: function_call type
   364→      const type = record['type'] as string | undefined
   365→      if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {
   366→        const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type
   367→        summaries.push(name)
   368→        continue
   369→      }
   370→      // Claude: tool_use content blocks
   371→      const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined
   372→      const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined
   373→      if (Array.isArray(content2)) {
   374→        for (const block of content2) {
   375→          if (
   376→            block !== null &&
   377→            typeof block === 'object' &&
   378→            (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'
   379→          ) {
   380→            const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'
   381→            summaries.push(name)
   382→          }
   383→        }
   384→      }
   385→    } catch {
   386→      // Skip malformed lines
   387→    }
   388→  }
   389→
   390→  return summaries
   391→}
   392→
   393→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   394→// Output path helpers
   395→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   396→
   397→function transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {
   398→  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
   399→  const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
   400→  return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)
   401→}
   402→
   403→function resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
   404→  if (m.repo_raw_path) {
   405→    return join(root, m.repo_raw_path)
   406→  }
   407→  if (m.global_raw_path) {
   408→    return m.global_raw_path
   409→  }
   410→  return null
   411→}
   412→
   413→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   414→// Markdown file loader (for goals/knowledge/todos/archive)
   415→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   416→
   417→function loadMarkdownFiles(dir: string): Array<{ filename: string; title: string; content: string }> {
   418→  if (!existsSync(dir)) return []
   419→
   420→  let entries: string[]
   421→  try {
   422→    entries = readdirSync(dir)
   423→  } catch {
   424→    return []
   425→  }
   426→
   427→  return entries
   428→    .filter(e => e.endsWith('.md'))
   429→    .sort()
   430→    .map(filename => {
   431→      const fullPath = join(dir, filename)
   432→      let content = ''
   433→      try {
   434→        content = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
   435→      } catch {
   436→        // empty
   437→      }
   438→      const title = extractMarkdownTitle(content) || basename(filename, '.md')
   439→      return { filename, title, content }
   440→    })
   441→}
   442→
   443→function extractMarkdownTitle(content: string): string {
   444→  const match = content.match(/^#\s+(.+)$/m)
   445→  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? ''
   446→}
   447→
   448→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   449→// .gitignore management
   450→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   451→
   452→export function ensureGitignore(root: string, entry: string): void {
   453→  const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
   454→  let existing = ''
   455→  if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
   456→    try {
   457→      existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
   458→    } catch {
   459→      return
   460→    }
   461→  }
   462→  // Check if already present (normalize line endings)
   463→  const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
   464→  if (lines.some(l => l.trim() === entry.trim())) return
   465→
   466→  // Append with trailing newline
   467→  const append = existing.endsWith('\n') ? entry + '\n' : '\n' + entry + '\n'
   468→  try {
   469→    appendFileSync(gitignorePath, append, 'utf-8')
   470→  } catch {
   471→    // Best-effort
   472→  }
   473→}
   474→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
Tool Result #297 Read toolu_01YJNe76wuGL6za9w42o5aLs 13:55:00
Read output=1→/** 2→ * Session list page: tabular index of all imported transcripts, with client tab filtering. 3→ */ 4→ 5→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js' 6→i...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Session list page: tabular index of all imported transcripts, with client tab filtering.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     6→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     7→import { clientBadge, escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, transcriptUrlFromRoot } from './layout.js'
     8→
     9→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    10→// Transcript list
    11→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    12→
    13→export function renderTranscriptList(manifests: ManifestEntry[], t?: Translations): string {
    14→  const nav = renderNav('transcripts', false, t)
    15→
    16→  const sorted = [...manifests].sort((a, b) => b.started_at.localeCompare(a.started_at))
    17→
    18→  const title = t?.sessions.title ?? 'Sessions'
    19→  const clientLabel = t?.sessions.client ?? 'Client'
    20→  const dateLabel = t?.sessions.date ?? 'Date'
    21→  const idLabel = t?.sessions.id ?? 'ID'
    22→  const msgsLabel = t?.sessions.msgs ?? 'Msgs'
    23→  const toolsLabel = t?.sessions.tools ?? 'Tools'
    24→  const allLabel = t?.sessions.all ?? 'All'
    25→
    26→  if (sorted.length === 0) {
    27→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
    28→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
    29→  <p class="subtitle">${escHtml(t?.sessions.noSessions ?? 'No sessions imported yet.')}</p>
    30→</div>`
    31→    return htmlShell(title, content, nav)
    32→  }
    33→
    34→  // Collect unique clients
    35→  const clientSet = new Set<string>()
    36→  for (const m of sorted) clientSet.add(m.client)
    37→  const clients = [...clientSet].sort()
    38→
    39→  // Tab bar
    40→  const tabBar = renderTabBar(allLabel, clients, sorted)
    41→
    42→  const rows = sorted
    43→    .map(m => {
    44→      const url = transcriptHref(m)
    45→      const date = m.started_at.slice(0, 10)
    46→      const time = m.started_at.slice(11, 16)
    47→      const badge = clientBadge(m.client)
    48→      const summary = ''
    49→      const meta = `${escHtml(m.client)} · ${escHtml(date)} · ${m.message_count} msgs`
    50→      return `<tr data-client="${escHtml(m.client)}">
    51→  <td>${badge}</td>
    52→  <td><a href="${escHtml(url)}" data-summary="${escHtml(summary)}" data-meta="${escHtml(meta)}">${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</a></td>
    53→  <td style="color:var(--text-muted)">${escHtml(date)} ${escHtml(time)}</td>
    54→  <td style="color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.8rem">${escHtml(m.session_id.slice(0, 8))}</td>
    55→  <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--text-muted)">${m.message_count}</td>
    56→  <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--text-muted)">${m.tool_event_count}</td>
    57→</tr>`
    58→    })
    59→    .join('')
    60→
    61→  const filterJs = `<script>
    62→(function() {
    63→  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    64→    var tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn');
    65→    var rows = document.querySelectorAll('tr[data-client]');
    66→    tabs.forEach(function(btn) {
    67→      btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    68→        tabs.forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
    69→        btn.classList.add('active');
    70→        var filter = btn.getAttribute('data-filter');
    71→        rows.forEach(function(row) {
    72→          if (!filter || row.getAttribute('data-client') === filter) {
    73→            row.style.display = '';
    74→          } else {
    75→            row.style.display = 'none';
    76→          }
    77→        });
    78→      });
    79→    });
    80→  });
    81→})();
    82→</script>`
    83→
    84→  const content = `<div class="page-header">
    85→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
    86→  <p class="subtitle">${sorted.length} session(s) imported</p>
    87→</div>
    88→${tabBar}
    89→<div class="card" style="padding:0;overflow:hidden">
    90→<table>
    91→<thead><tr>
    92→  <th>${escHtml(clientLabel)}</th>
    93→  <th>Title</th>
    94→  <th>${escHtml(dateLabel)}</th>
    95→  <th>${escHtml(idLabel)}</th>
    96→  <th style="text-align:right">${escHtml(msgsLabel)}</th>
    97→  <th style="text-align:right">${escHtml(toolsLabel)}</th>
    98→</tr></thead>
    99→<tbody>${rows}</tbody>
   100→</table>
   101→</div>`
   102→
   103→  return htmlShell(title, content, nav, filterJs)
   104→}
   105→
   106→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   107→// Tab bar
   108→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   109→
   110→function renderTabBar(allLabel: string, clients: string[], manifests: ManifestEntry[]): string {
   111→  const total = manifests.length
   112→  const tabs = [
   113→    `<button class="tab-btn active" data-filter="" type="button">${escHtml(allLabel)} (${total})</button>`,
   114→    ...clients.map(client => {
   115→      const count = manifests.filter(m => m.client === client).length
   116→      return `<button class="tab-btn" data-filter="${escHtml(client)}" type="button">${escHtml(client)} (${count})</button>`
   117→    }),
   118→  ]
   119→  return `<div class="tab-bar">${tabs.join('')}</div>`
   120→}
   121→
   122→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   123→// Helper
   124→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   125→
   126→function transcriptHref(m: ManifestEntry): string {
   127→  // From transcripts/index.html, the URL is relative to the transcripts/ dir
   128→  // so we only need {client}/{stem}.html (no leading "transcripts/")
   129→  return transcriptUrlFromRoot(m).replace(/^transcripts\//, '')
   130→}
   131→

Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/deploy/github-pages.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * GitHub Pages deployment: push report output to gh-pages branch.\n */\n\nimport { writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { join } from 'node:path'\nimport { tmpdir } from 'node:os'\nimport { execFileSync } from 'node:child_process'\n\nimport { getLogger } from '../../heartbeat/log.js'\n\nexport interface GithubPagesOptions {\n  /** Repository root (contains .git/) */\n  repoRoot: string\n  /** Report output directory (e.g. Memory/07_reports) */\n  outputDir: string\n  /** Branch name to push to (e.g. 'gh-pages'). Empty string = skip. */\n  branch: string\n  /** Custom domain (CNAME). Empty string = skip. */\n  cname: string\n}\n\n/** Safe character set for branch names — blocks shell meta-chars. */\nconst BRANCH_RE = /^[a-zA-Z0-9._/-]+$/\n\nexport async function deployGithubPages(options: GithubPagesOptions): Promise<void> {\n  const { repoRoot, outputDir, branch, cname } = options\n  const logger = getLogger()\n\n  if (!branch) return\n\n  // Validate branch name to prevent any injection\n  if (!BRANCH_RE.test(branch)) {\n    logger.warn(`[gh-pages] Invalid branch name, skipping deploy: \"${branch}\"`)\n    return\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // 1. Write CNAME file if configured\n    if (cname) {\n      const cnamePath = join(outputDir, 'CNAME')\n      writeFileSync(cnamePath, cname + '\\n', 'utf-8')\n      logger.info(`[gh-pages] CNAME written: ${cname}`)\n    }\n\n    // 2. Check if branch exists on remote\n    let branchExists = false\n    try {\n      git(repoRoot, 'ls-remote', '--exit-code', '--heads', 'origin', branch)\n      branchExists = true\n    } catch {\n      branchExists = false\n    }\n\n    if (!branchExists) {\n      // Create orphan branch via a temporary worktree in os.tmpdir()\n      logger.info(`[gh-pages] Branch '${branch}' not found, creating orphan...`)\n      const worktreePath = join(tmpdir(), `mt-gh-pages-${Date.now()}`)\n      try {\n        git(repoRoot, 'worktree', 'add', '--orphan', '-b', branch, worktreePath)\n        git(worktreePath, 'commit', '--allow-empty', '-m', 'chore: init gh-pages')\n        git(repoRoot, 'push', 'origin', branch)\n      } finally {\n        try { git(repoRoot, 'worktree', 'remove', '--force', worktreePath) } catch { /* ignore */ }\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 3. Push using git subtree\n    const relOutput = makeRelative(repoRoot, outputDir)\n    logger.info(`[gh-pages] Pushing ${relOutput} to origin/${branch}...`)\n    git(repoRoot, 'subtree', 'push', '--prefix', relOutput, 'origin', branch)\n    logger.info(`[gh-pages] Successfully pushed to origin/${branch}`)\n  } catch (err: unknown) {\n    logger.warn(`[gh-pages] Deploy failed: ${String(err)}`)\n    // Never throw — report deploy failure must not abort heartbeat\n  }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Helpers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** Invoke git with explicit args — no shell interpolation. */\nfunction git(cwd: string, ...args: string[]): string {\n  return execFileSync('git', args, { cwd, stdio: 'pipe' }).toString()\n}\n\nfunction makeRelative(base: string, target: string): string {\n  // Normalize separators\n  const b = base.replace(/\\\\/g, '/').replace(/\\/$/, '')\n  const t = target.replace(/\\\\/g, '/').replace(/\\/$/, '')\n  if (t.startsWith(b + '/')) {\n    return t.slice(b.length + 1)\n  }\n  return t\n}\n"
}

1→/**
     2→ * Goals page: renders markdown files from Memory/01_goals/.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     6→import { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js'
     7→import type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'
     8→import { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'
     9→
    10→export type GoalFile = MarkdownFile
    11→
    12→export function renderGoals(files: GoalFile[], t?: Translations): string {
    13→  const nav = renderNav('goals', false, t)
    14→  const title = t?.nav.goals ?? 'Goals'
    15→
    16→  if (files.length === 0) {
    17→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
    18→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
    19→  <p class="subtitle">No goal files found in Memory/01_goals/.</p>
    20→</div>`

1→/**
     2→ * Knowledge page: renders markdown files from Memory/04_knowledge/.

     4→
     5→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     6→import { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js'
     7→import type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'

    10→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    11→// Knowledge page
    12→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    13→

    15→
    16→export function renderKnowledge(files: KnowledgeFile[], t?: Translations): string {
    17→  const nav = renderNav('knowledge', false, t)
    18→  const title = t?.nav.knowledge ?? 'Knowledge'
    19→
    20→  if (files.length === 0) {
    21→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
    22→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
    23→  <p class="subtitle">No knowledge files found in Memory/04_knowledge/.</p>

Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Projects page: groups sessions by their working directory (last segment).
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     6→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     7→import { clientBadge, escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav } from './layout.js'
     8→
     9→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    10→// Project extraction
    11→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    12→
    13→export function extractProject(cwd: string): string {
    14→  if (!cwd) return 'unknown'
    15→  return cwd.split(/[/\\]/).filter(Boolean).at(-1) ?? 'unknown'
    16→}
    17→
    18→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    19→// Projects page
    20→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    21→
    22→export function renderProjects(manifests: ManifestEntry[], t?: Translations): string {
    23→  const nav = renderNav('projects', false, t)
    24→  const title = t?.projects.title ?? 'Projects'
    25→
    26→  if (manifests.length === 0) {
    27→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
    28→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
    29→  <p class="subtitle">${escHtml(t?.projects.noProjects ?? 'No projects found.')}</p>
    30→</div>`

    15→
    16→  if (files.length === 0) {
    17→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
    18→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>

Read output=1→/** 2→ * Full-text search: pre-built JSON index embedded as inline JS. 3→ * Vanilla JS substring search, no external library. 4→ */ 5→ 6→import type { ManifestEntry } from '.....
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Full-text search: pre-built JSON index embedded as inline JS.
     3→ * Vanilla JS substring search, no external library.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     7→import type { SearchIndexEntry } from '../../types/report.js'
     8→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     9→import { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, transcriptUrlFromRoot } from './layout.js'
    10→
    11→const MAX_INDEX_BYTES = 50_000
    12→const SNIPPET_LEN = 200
    13→
    14→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    15→// Index construction
    16→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17→
    18→export function buildSearchIndex(
    19→  manifests: ManifestEntry[],
    20→  getSnippet: (m: ManifestEntry) => string,
    21→): SearchIndexEntry[] {
    22→  const entries: SearchIndexEntry[] = []
    23→  let totalBytes = 0
    24→
    25→  for (const m of manifests) {
    26→    let snippet = getSnippet(m).slice(0, SNIPPET_LEN)
    27→    const entry: SearchIndexEntry = {
    28→      url: transcriptUrl(m),
    29→      title: m.title || m.session_id,
    30→      client: m.client,
    31→      date: m.started_at.slice(0, 10),
    32→      snippet,
    33→    }
    34→    const entryBytes = JSON.stringify(entry).length
    35→    if (totalBytes + entryBytes > MAX_INDEX_BYTES) {
    36→      // Truncate snippet to fit within budget
    37→      const remaining = MAX_INDEX_BYTES - totalBytes - (entryBytes - snippet.length) - 10
    38→      if (remaining < 20) break
    39→      snippet = snippet.slice(0, remaining)
    40→      entry.snippet = snippet
    41→    }
    42→    totalBytes += JSON.stringify(entry).length
    43→    entries.push(entry)
    44→  }
    45→
    46→  return entries
    47→}
    48→
    49→function transcriptUrl(m: ManifestEntry): string {
    50→  return transcriptUrlFromRoot(m)
    51→}
    52→
    53→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    54→// Search page renderer
    55→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    56→
    57→export function renderSearchPage(index: SearchIndexEntry[], t?: Translations): string {
    58→  // Escape </script> to prevent script-injection via manifest-controlled content
    59→  const indexJson = JSON.stringify(index).replace(/<\//g, '<\\/')
    60→  const nav = renderNav('search', true, t)
    61→  const title = t?.search.title ?? 'Search'
    62→  const placeholder = t?.search.placeholder ?? 'Search sessions, messages, and content...'
    63→
    64→  const extraHead = `<script>
    65→const SEARCH_INDEX = ${indexJson};
    66→</script>`
    67→
    68→  const content = `
    69→<div class="page-header">
    70→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>

<system-reminder>

  "old_string": "// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Main send function\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport async function sendWebhook(options: WebhookOptions): Promise<void> {\n  if (!options.url) return\n  const logger = getLogger()\n  const platform = detectPlatform(options.url)\n\n  const payloadMap: Record<Platform, (o: WebhookOptions) => Record<string, unknown>> = {\n    feishu: buildFeishuPayload,\n    telegram: buildTelegramPayload,\n    discord: buildDiscordPayload,\n    slack: buildSlackPayload,\n    generic: buildGenericPayload,\n  }\n\n  const payload = payloadMap[platform](options)\n\n  try {\n    const { default: https } = await import('node:https')\n    const { default: http } = await import('node:http')\n    const body = JSON.stringify(payload)\n\n    await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {\n      const url = new URL(options.url)\n      const transport = url.protocol === 'https:' ? https : http\n      const req = transport.request(",
  "new_string": "// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// URL safety validation\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** Private / loopback IP ranges that must not be reachable via webhook. */\nconst PRIVATE_HOSTNAME_RE =\n  /^(localhost|127\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+|0\\.0\\.0\\.0|::1|10\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+|172\\.(1[6-9]|2\\d|3[01])\\.\\d+\\.\\d+|192\\.168\\.\\d+\\.\\d+|169\\.254\\.\\d+\\.\\d+|fc[0-9a-f]{2}:|fd[0-9a-f]{2}:)$/i\n\nfunction validateWebhookUrl(raw: string): URL {\n  let url: URL\n  try {\n    url = new URL(raw)\n  } catch {\n    throw new Error(`Invalid webhook URL: ${raw}`)\n  }\n  if (url.protocol !== 'https:') {\n    throw new Error(`Webhook URL must use https: (got ${url.protocol})`)\n  }\n  if (PRIVATE_HOSTNAME_RE.test(url.hostname)) {\n    throw new Error(`Webhook URL hostname is private/loopback: ${url.hostname}`)\n  }\n  return url\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Main send function\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport async function sendWebhook(options: WebhookOptions): Promise<void> {\n  if (!options.url) return\n  const logger = getLogger()\n\n  let parsedUrl: URL\n  try {\n    parsedUrl = validateWebhookUrl(options.url)\n  } catch (err) {\n    logger.warn(`[webhook] Rejected URL: ${String(err)}`)\n    return\n  }\n\n  const platform = detectPlatform(options.url)\n\n  const payloadMap: Record<Platform, (o: WebhookOptions) => Record<string, unknown>> = {\n    feishu: buildFeishuPayload,\n    telegram: buildTelegramPayload,\n    discord: buildDiscordPayload,\n    slack: buildSlackPayload,\n    generic: buildGenericPayload,\n  }\n\n  const payload = payloadMap[platform](options)\n\n  try {\n    const { default: https } = await import('node:https')\n    const body = JSON.stringify(payload)\n\n    await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {\n      const url = parsedUrl\n      const req = https.request("
}

P1 Fix: webhook.test.ts — add HTTPS mock and payload assertions:

Tool Call #430 Write toolu_01JBJKPBmKgxXmphD7zwmxhy 14:08:11
Write input={"content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from 'vitest'\nimport type { ClientRequest, IncomingMessage } from 'node:https'\n\n// Mock getLogger\nvi.mock('../../...
Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/tests/report/deploy/webhook.test.ts",
  "content": "import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from 'vitest'\nimport type { ClientRequest, IncomingMessage } from 'node:https'\n\n// Mock getLogger\nvi.mock('../../../src/heartbeat/log.js', () => ({\n  getLogger: () => ({\n    info: vi.fn(),\n    warn: vi.fn(),\n    debug: vi.fn(),\n    error: vi.fn(),\n  }),\n}))\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Mock node:https so no real network calls are made\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ntype RequestCallback = (res: Partial<IncomingMessage>) => void\n\nconst mockRequest = {\n  write: vi.fn(),\n  end: vi.fn(),\n  on: vi.fn(),\n  setTimeout: vi.fn(),\n}\n\nconst mockHttpsRequest = vi.fn()\n\nvi.mock('node:https', () => ({\n  default: { request: mockHttpsRequest },\n}))\n\nimport { sendWebhook } from '../../../src/report/deploy/webhook.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Helpers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** Make mockHttpsRequest resolve immediately with the given status code. */\nfunction mockSuccess(statusCode = 200) {\n  mockHttpsRequest.mockImplementation((opts: unknown, cb: RequestCallback) => {\n    cb({ statusCode, resume: vi.fn() })\n    return mockRequest as unknown as ClientRequest\n  })\n}\n\n/** Make mockHttpsRequest trigger the 'error' event. */\nfunction mockNetworkError() {\n  mockHttpsRequest.mockImplementation((_opts: unknown, _cb: RequestCallback) => {\n    const req = {\n      ...mockRequest,\n      on: vi.fn().mockImplementation((event: string, handler: (e: Error) => void) => {\n        if (event === 'error') handler(new Error('network failure'))\n        return req\n      }),\n    }\n    return req as unknown as ClientRequest\n  })\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Setup\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nbeforeEach(() => {\n  vi.clearAllMocks()\n  mockRequest.on.mockReturnValue(mockRequest)\n  mockRequest.setTimeout.mockReturnValue(mockRequest)\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// No-op on empty URL\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('sendWebhook — no-op on empty URL', () => {\n  it('resolves immediately when url is empty', async () => {\n    await expect(sendWebhook({ url: '', sessionCount: 10 })).resolves.not.toThrow()\n    expect(mockHttpsRequest).not.toHaveBeenCalled()\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// SSRF protection\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('sendWebhook — SSRF protection', () => {\n  it('rejects http:// URLs (only https allowed)', async () => {\n    await expect(\n      sendWebhook({ url: 'http://example.com/webhook', sessionCount: 5 })\n    ).resolves.not.toThrow()\n    expect(mockHttpsRequest).not.toHaveBeenCalled()\n  })\n\n  it('rejects localhost', async () => {\n    await expect(\n      sendWebhook({ url: 'https://localhost/webhook', sessionCount: 5 })\n    ).resolves.not.toThrow()\n    expect(mockHttpsRequest).not.toHaveBeenCalled()\n  })\n\n  it('rejects 127.x.x.x', async () => {\n    await expect(\n      sendWebhook({ url: 'https://127.0.0.1/webhook', sessionCount: 5 })\n    ).resolves.not.toThrow()\n    expect(mockHttpsRequest).not.toHaveBeenCalled()\n  })\n\n  it('rejects 169.254.x.x (link-local)', async () => {\n    await expect(\n      sendWebhook({ url: 'https://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/', sessionCount: 5 })\n    ).resolves.not.toThrow()\n    expect(mockHttpsRequest).not.toHaveBeenCalled()\n  })\n\n  it('rejects 10.x.x.x (RFC 1918)', async () => {\n    await expect(\n      sendWebhook({ url: 'https://10.0.0.1/webhook', sessionCount: 5 })\n    ).resolves.not.toThrow()\n    expect(mockHttpsRequest).not.toHaveBeenCalled()\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Network failure does not throw\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('sendWebhook — network failure does not throw', () => {\n  it('resolves even when HTTP request triggers error event', async () => {\n    mockNetworkError()\n    await expect(\n      sendWebhook({ url: 'https://hooks.slack.com/services/test', sessionCount: 5 })\n    ).resolves.not.toThrow()\n  })\n\n  it('resolves on HTTP 4xx response', async () => {\n    mockSuccess(400)\n    await expect(\n      sendWebhook({ url: 'https://hooks.slack.com/services/test', sessionCount: 5 })\n    ).resolves.not.toThrow()\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Payload assertions\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('sendWebhook — payload structure', () => {\n  it('sends correct JSON body for slack', async () => {\n    mockSuccess()\n    await sendWebhook({ url: 'https://hooks.slack.com/services/test', sessionCount: 7 })\n\n    expect(mockHttpsRequest).toHaveBeenCalled()\n    const writtenBody = mockRequest.write.mock.calls[0]?.[0] as string\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(writtenBody) as { text: string }\n    expect(parsed.text).toContain('7')\n    expect(parsed.text).toContain('MemoryTree')\n  })\n\n  it('sends correct JSON body for discord', async () => {\n    mockSuccess()\n    await sendWebhook({\n      url: 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123/test',\n      sessionCount: 5,\n      reportUrl: 'https://example.com/report',\n    })\n\n    const writtenBody = mockRequest.write.mock.calls[0]?.[0] as string\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(writtenBody) as { content: string }\n    expect(parsed.content).toContain('5')\n    expect(parsed.content).toContain('MemoryTree')\n  })\n\n  it('includes new session count in feishu payload', async () => {\n    mockSuccess()\n    await sendWebhook({\n      url: 'https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/bot/v2/hook/test',\n      sessionCount: 42,\n      newSessionIds: ['s1', 's2'],\n    })\n\n    const writtenBody = mockRequest.write.mock.calls[0]?.[0] as string\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(writtenBody) as Record<string, unknown>\n    // Feishu sends interactive card\n    expect(parsed.msg_type).toBe('interactive')\n  })\n\n  it('sends generic payload for unknown URL', async () => {\n    mockSuccess()\n    await sendWebhook({\n      url: 'https://my-server.example.com/webhook',\n      sessionCount: 3,\n      newSessionIds: ['s1'],\n    })\n\n    const writtenBody = mockRequest.write.mock.calls[0]?.[0] as string\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(writtenBody) as {\n      event: string\n      session_count: number\n      new_session_count: number\n    }\n    expect(parsed.event).toBe('memorytree.report.updated')\n    expect(parsed.session_count).toBe(3)\n    expect(parsed.new_session_count).toBe(1)\n  })\n\n  it('sends correct hostname in request options', async () => {\n    mockSuccess()\n    await sendWebhook({ url: 'https://hooks.slack.com/services/test', sessionCount: 1 })\n\n    const reqOpts = mockHttpsRequest.mock.calls[0]?.[0] as { hostname: string }\n    expect(reqOpts.hostname).toBe('hooks.slack.com')\n  })\n})\n"
}

    53→    await deployGithubPages({

    55→      outputDir: join(tmpDir, 'output'),

    62→    expect(readFileSync(cnamePath, 'utf-8').trim()).toBe('memory.example.com')
    63→  })
    64→
    65→  it('skips CNAME when cname is empty string', async () => {

The test uses execSync mock but we now use execFileSync. Rewrite to match:

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/tests/report/deploy/github-pages.test.ts",
  "content": "import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, afterEach, vi } from 'vitest'\nimport { mkdtempSync, mkdirSync, writeFileSync, readFileSync, existsSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { join } from 'node:path'\nimport { tmpdir } from 'node:os'\n\n// Mock child_process.execFileSync so no actual git commands run\nvi.mock('node:child_process', () => ({\n  execFileSync: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(Buffer.from('')),\n}))\n\n// Mock getLogger to avoid needing full setup\nvi.mock('../../../src/heartbeat/log.js', () => ({\n  getLogger: () => ({\n    info: vi.fn(),\n    warn: vi.fn(),\n    debug: vi.fn(),\n    error: vi.fn(),\n  }),\n}))\n\nimport { deployGithubPages } from '../../../src/report/deploy/github-pages.js'\nimport { execFileSync } from 'node:child_process'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Setup / Teardown\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nlet tmpDir: string\n\nbeforeEach(() => {\n  tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'ghpages-test-'))\n  vi.clearAllMocks()\n})\n\nafterEach(() => {\n  rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// CNAME file generation\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('CNAME file', () => {\n  it('writes CNAME when cname is set', async () => {\n    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, 'output'), { recursive: true })\n    // Make execFileSync throw on ls-remote so branch is treated as non-existent\n    const mockExec = vi.mocked(execFileSync)\n    mockExec.mockImplementationOnce(() => { throw new Error('ls-remote failed') })\n    // Other calls succeed (worktree add, commit, push, subtree push, etc.)\n    mockExec.mockReturnValue(Buffer.from(''))\n\n    await deployGithubPages({\n      repoRoot: tmpDir,\n      outputDir: join(tmpDir, 'output'),\n      branch: 'gh-pages',\n      cname: 'memory.example.com',\n    })\n\n    const cnamePath = join(tmpDir, 'output', 'CNAME')\n    expect(existsSync(cnamePath)).toBe(true)\n    expect(readFileSync(cnamePath, 'utf-8').trim()).toBe('memory.example.com')\n  })\n\n  it('skips CNAME when cname is empty string', async () => {\n    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, 'output'), { recursive: true })\n    vi.mocked(execFileSync).mockReturnValue(Buffer.from(''))\n\n    await deployGithubPages({\n      repoRoot: tmpDir,\n      outputDir: join(tmpDir, 'output'),\n      branch: 'gh-pages',\n      cname: '',\n    })\n\n    const cnamePath = join(tmpDir, 'output', 'CNAME')\n    expect(existsSync(cnamePath)).toBe(false)\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Branch name validation\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('branch name validation', () => {\n  it('skips deploy for branch with shell meta-chars', async () => {\n    await deployGithubPages({\n      repoRoot: tmpDir,\n      outputDir: tmpDir,\n      branch: 'gh-pages; rm -rf /',\n      cname: '',\n    })\n    expect(execFileSync).not.toHaveBeenCalled()\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Skip deploy when branch is empty\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('skip when branch is empty', () => {\n  it('does nothing when branch is empty string', async () => {\n    await deployGithubPages({\n      repoRoot: tmpDir,\n      outputDir: tmpDir,\n      branch: '',\n      cname: '',\n    })\n    expect(execFileSync).not.toHaveBeenCalled()\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// git subtree push command\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('git subtree push', () => {\n  it('calls git subtree push with correct branch', async () => {\n    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, 'output'), { recursive: true })\n    const mockExec = vi.mocked(execFileSync)\n    // ls-remote succeeds (branch exists)\n    mockExec.mockReturnValue(Buffer.from('refs/heads/gh-pages'))\n\n    await deployGithubPages({\n      repoRoot: tmpDir,\n      outputDir: join(tmpDir, 'output'),\n      branch: 'gh-pages',\n      cname: '',\n    })\n\n    // execFileSync is called as: execFileSync('git', [...args], opts)\n    // c[0] = 'git', c[1] = args array\n    const calls = mockExec.mock.calls\n    const subtreeCall = calls.find(c => {\n      const args = c[1] as string[] | undefined\n      return Array.isArray(args) && args.includes('subtree') && args.includes('push')\n    })\n    expect(subtreeCall).toBeTruthy()\n    const args = subtreeCall![1] as string[]\n    expect(args).toContain('gh-pages')\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Failure handling\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('failure handling', () => {\n  it('does not throw when git commands fail', async () => {\n    vi.mocked(execFileSync).mockImplementation(() => { throw new Error('git failure') })\n\n    await expect(\n      deployGithubPages({\n        repoRoot: tmpDir,\n        outputDir: tmpDir,\n        branch: 'gh-pages',\n        cname: '',\n      })\n    ).resolves.not.toThrow()\n  })\n})\n"
}

assistant #449 14:09:46

All fixes applied. Summary of what was done:

| 优先级 | 问题 | 修复方案 |
|--------|------|----------|
| P0 | Shell injection (github-pages.ts) | execSync(string) → execFileSync('git', [...args]) + branch 白名单校验 /^[a-zA-Z0-9._/-]+$/ |
| P0 | Popover XSS (layout.ts) | innerHTML 拼接 → DOM API (createElement + textContent) |
| P1 | SSRF (webhook.ts) | 强制 https:、阻断 RFC 1918 / 127.x / 169.254.x / localhost |
| P1 | JSON script injection (graph.ts) | 补充 \u2028 / \u2029 转义 |
| P1 | Promise.all 无隔离 (build.ts) | 每个任务加 try/catch，单个失败不影响整体 |
| P1 | data-summary 永远为空 | renderTranscriptList 接收 summaries 参数，build.ts 传入 |
| P1 | Nav 路径深度错误 | rootLevel: boolean → depth: 0 \| 1 \| 2，transcript.ts 改为 depth=2 |
| P1 | webhook 测试无 mock | 新写 13 个测试：https mock + payload 结构断言 + SSRF 测试 |
| P2 | CSS 硬编码颜色 | .message-role 和 .summary-card 改用 CSS 变量 |
| P2 | rAF 无限循环 | ALPHA < ALPHA_MIN 时停止 requestAnimationFrame |
| P2 | Dead code #graph-tooltip | 删除 |
| P2 | 重复 dynamic import('node:fs') | 改用顶部静态 import 的 writeFileSync |
| P2 | Worktree 路径在 .git/ 内 | 改用 os.tmpdir() |

C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/tests/report/deploy/webhook.test.ts\n\n审查角度：\n- 架构设计（耦合度、职责分离）\n- 性能问题（不必要的计算、内存泄漏风险）\n- 可维护性（hardcode 常量、魔法数字、重复代码）\n- 测试质量（边界情况覆盖、测试隔离性、可靠性）\n- 与项目整体风格是否一致（NodeNext ESM, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes）\n\n输出格式：\n- 严重性：CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW / INFO\n- 每个问题：文件名:行号 | 严重性 | 问题描述 | 建议修复\n\n最后给出总评：整体质量如何，是否还有需要修复的问题。",

[
  {
    "text": "现在我已经读取了所有需要审查的文件。让我进行全面的代码审查。\n\n## 代码审查报告（第一轮）\n\n### 严重性等级说明\n- **CRITICAL** - 安全漏洞、数据损毁、功能破损\n- **HIGH** - 逻辑缺陷、潜在错误、类型不安全\n- **MEDIUM** - 代码质量、性能、可维护性\n- **LOW** - 风格、文档、边界情况\n- **INFO** - 信息性建议\n\n---\n\n## 发现的问题\n\n### 1. 安全性问题\n\n#### 1.1 webhook.ts:109-110 | HIGH | 正则表达式 SSRF 防护不完整\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nconst PRIVATE_HOSTNAME_RE =\n  /^(localhost|127\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+|0\\.0\\.0\\.0|::1|10\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+|172\\.(1[6-9]|2\\d|3[01])\\.\\d+\\.\\d+|192\\.168\\.\\d+\\.\\d+|169\\.254\\.\\d+\\.\\d+|fc[0-9a-f]{2}:|fd[0-9a-f]{2}:)$/i\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 正则表达式缺少 IPv6 完整检查（只检查链接本地和私有前缀）\n- 缺少对 fc00::/7（ULA 私有地址）的完整验证\n- 缺少 ::ffff:127.0.0.1 这样的 IPv4 映射地址的检查\n- 缺少对 [::1] 带方括号形式的支持\n\n**建议修复：**\n```typescript\n// 更安全的做法：明确检查 URL 解析后的 hostname，支持 URL 对象的 hostname 属性已自动解析\n// 但应额外验证 IPv6 地址，使用 IP 范围库或更全面的检查\n```\n\n#### 1.2 graph.ts:336 | MEDIUM | XSS 风险 - node.url 直接赋给 window.location.href\n\n**问题描述：**\n```javascript\nif (node && node.url) { window.location.href = node.url; }\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- node.url 来自 GraphNode.url，在 buildGraphData 中由 transcriptUrlFromRoot() 生成\n- 虽然 transcriptUrlFromRoot() 返回相对路径（相对安全），但这是隐含的假设\n- 如果 knowledgeFiles[].title 或 manifests[].title 中包含恶意数据，生成的 url 字符串可能被污染\n\n**建议修复：**\n使用 URL.canParse() 验证或确保只接受相对路径前缀\n```typescript\nif (node && node.url && node.url.startsWith('../') || node.url.startsWith('./')) {\n  window.location.href = node.url;\n}\n```\n\n#### 1.3 layout.ts:336 | MEDIUM | window.location.href 直接赋值 - 类似 XSS 风险\n\n**问题描述：**\ngraph.ts 中的 canvas.addEventListener('click') 直接使用 node.url\n\n**已在上面 1.2 中提到**\n\n---\n\n### 2. 逻辑缺陷和竞态条件\n\n#### 2.1 build.ts:116-131 | HIGH | 异步 Promise 链中错误处理不完整\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nsummaryPromises.push(\n  (async () => {\n    try {\n      const summary = await getSummary(...)\n      summaries[manifest.session_id] = summary\n      // ... rendering ...\n    } catch (err: unknown) {\n      getLogger().warn(...)\n    }\n  })(),\n)\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- Promise 内部捕获了所有异常，但 Promise.all() 在第 136 行调用\n- 如果某个 promise 出错后被捕获，Promise.all() 不会察觉到失败\n- 但这里实际上没有产生真正的问题，因为错误被吞掉了（符合设计意图）\n- **但问题是：** 如果 renderTranscript() 或 writeFileSync() 抛出异步错误，会被捕获；但 markdown.session_id 可能为 undefined\n\n**建议修复：**\n```typescript\n// 在 catch 块中添加守护条件\ncatch (err: unknown) {\n  const sid = manifest?.session_id ?? 'unknown'\n  getLogger().warn(`[build] Failed to render ${sid}: ${String(err)}`)\n}\n```\n\n#### 2.2 build.ts:307-309 | MEDIUM | 正则表达式 exec() 循环中的隐含 index 重置\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nconst msgRe = /^### \\d+\\.\\s+(\\w+)/gm\nlet match: RegExpExecArray | null\nwhile ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {\n  starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })\n}\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 当使用全局 flag (g) 的正则时，如果循环中发生异常并重新进入，lastIndex 可能处于不可预测的状态\n- 这里没有问题因为循环是线性的，但这是脆弱的设计\n\n**建议修复：**\n```typescript\nmsgRe.lastIndex = 0  // 显式重置\n```\n\n#### 2.3 build.ts:92-104 | MEDIUM | 错误处理中的资源泄露可能性\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nconst messages = parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m, root)\nconst rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)\nif (rawPath && existsSync(rawPath)) {\n  try {\n    const toolSummaries = extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath, m.client)\n    // ...\n  } catch {\n    // Skip if raw parsing fails\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- extractToolSummariesFromRaw() 和 parseCleanMarkdownMessages() 都是 I/O 操作\n- 如果 rawPath 读取中途失败，错误被吞掉，可能导致不完整的数据\n- manifests 中的 session_id 未验证为非空字符串\n\n**建议修复：**\n```typescript\nif (!m.session_id) {\n  logger.warn(`[build] Manifest missing session_id, skipping`)\n  continue\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. TypeScript 类型安全问题\n\n#### 3.1 build.ts:308 | HIGH | match[1] 可能为 undefined\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nrole: match[1] ?? 'unknown'\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- RegExpExecArray[1] 如果正则没有捕获组时为 undefined（这里有捕获组，但类型系统不能保证）\n- 实际上是安全的，但类型断言应该更明确\n\n#### 3.2 webhook.ts:76-92 | MEDIUM | 平台检测中的 URL 字符串操作\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nfunction detectPlatform(url: string): Platform {\n  if (url.includes('open.feishu.cn') || url.includes('open.larksuite.com')) return 'feishu'\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 使用 string.includes() 进行域名检测容易被 URL 注入欺骗\n- 例如 `https://my-open.feishu.cn.attacker.com` 会被误认为是飞书\n- 应该解析 URL 并检查 hostname\n\n**建议修复：**\n```typescript\nfunction detectPlatform(url: string): Platform {\n  try {\n    const parsed = new URL(url)\n    const host = parsed.hostname\n    if (host.includes('open.feishu.cn') || host.includes('open.larksuite.com')) return 'feishu'\n    if (host.includes('api.telegram.org')) return 'telegram'\n    // ...\n  } catch {\n    return 'generic'\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### 3.3 graph.ts:154-159 | MEDIUM | 对象属性赋值中的类型不匹配\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nvar sn = { id: n.id, label: n.label, type: n.type, client: n.client, url: n.url,\n  x: W/2 + (Math.random()-0.5)*W*0.7, y: H/2 + (Math.random()-0.5)*H*0.7, vx: 0, vy: 0 };\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- n.client 是 string | undefined，但被直接赋给 sn.client\n- sn 对象中没有类型定义，TypeScript 会推断 client?: string\n- 这在 JavaScript 中可以工作，但在严格类型检查下有问题\n\n---\n\n### 4. 边界情况和空值处理\n\n#### 4.1 build.ts:277-280 | MEDIUM | 清洁路径可能为 null 的潜在问题\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nconst cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path\n  ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path)\n  : m.global_clean_path\nif (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 当 m.repo_clean_path 为空但 m.global_clean_path 存在时，直接赋值\n- 但 m.global_clean_path 可能是绝对路径或相对路径，与 repo_clean_path 的处理不一致\n- 如果 m.global_clean_path 是相对路径，它可能找不到文件\n\n**建议修复：**\n```typescript\nlet cleanPath: string | null = null\nif (m.repo_clean_path) {\n  cleanPath = join(root, m.repo_clean_path)\n} else if (m.global_clean_path) {\n  cleanPath = m.global_clean_path.startsWith('/') ? m.global_clean_path : join(root, m.global_clean_path)\n}\n```\n\n#### 4.2 transcript-list.ts:48 | LOW | summaries 可能缺少某些 session_id\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nconst summary = summaries?.[m.session_id] ?? ''\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 如果某个 manifest 的转录未被渲染（例如出错），summaries 中不会有该 session_id\n- 这是正常的，但 UI 应该有清晰的空白状态指示\n\n---\n\n### 5. 代码质量问题\n\n#### 5.1 github-pages.ts:88-96 | MEDIUM | makeRelative() 函数不够健壮\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nfunction makeRelative(base: string, target: string): string {\n  const b = base.replace(/\\\\/g, '/').replace(/\\/$/, '')\n  const t = target.replace(/\\\\/g, '/').replace(/\\/$/, '')\n  if (t.startsWith(b + '/')) {\n    return t.slice(b.length + 1)\n  }\n  return t\n}\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 这是一个简化的相对路径计算，如果 base 和 target 没有公共前缀会返回完整的 target\n- 应该使用 Node.js 的 path.relative() 或更健壮的逻辑\n- 虽然在实际场景中 output 一定在 root 内，但这是脆弱的假设\n\n**建议修复：**\n```typescript\nimport { relative } from 'node:path'\n// 直接使用 relative() 函数\n```\n\n#### 5.2 layout.ts:43-121 | MEDIUM | 内联 JavaScript 代码维护性差\n\n**问题描述：**\nSIDEBAR_INLINE_JS 是一个巨大的内联 JavaScript 字符串，包含 77 行代码\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 难以调试、测试和维护\n- 没有 TypeScript 类型检查\n- 语法错误不会被编译期发现\n\n#### 5.3 graph.ts:122-361 | MEDIUM | 内联 JavaScript 代码极难维护\n\n**问题描述：**\ngraph.ts 内联了 240 行的 JavaScript，包括力导向图算法\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 高度耦合，难以修改\n- 没有单元测试\n- 浏览器兼容性问题无法早期发现\n- 算法参数（CHARGE = -120, LINK_DIST = 80 等）是魔法数字\n\n---\n\n### 6. 测试覆盖问题\n\n#### 6.1 github-pages.test.ts | MEDIUM | 测试覆盖不完整\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 没有测试当 worktree 操作失败时的清理行为\n- 没有测试当 git push 失败时的恢复机制\n- 没有测试相对路径计算的边界情况\n- 没有测试 CNAME 文件内容的验证\n\n#### 6.2 webhook.test.ts | HIGH | SSRF 测试不足\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 没有测试 IPv4 地址的所有范围（172.16.0.0/12 范围）\n- 没有测试域名欺骗攻击（subdomain.attacker.com.trusted.com）\n- 没有测试国际化域名 (IDN) 的欺骗\n- 没有测试空主机名的情况\n\n#### 6.3 webhook.test.ts:152-157 | MEDIUM | 测试中缺少超时验证\n\n**缺陷：**\n```typescript\nexpect(mockRequest.write.mock.calls[0]?.[0] as string)\n```\n- 没有验证 setTimeout(5000) 是否被正确调用\n- 没有测试超时触发时的行为\n\n---\n\n### 7. HTML 和 JavaScript 安全问题\n\n#### 7.1 layout.ts:79-98 | MEDIUM | popover 内容的 XSS 风险\n\n**问题描述：**\n```javascript\nvar summary = el.getAttribute('data-summary') || '';\n// ...\nsumDiv.textContent = summary;\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 虽然 data-summary 使用了 escHtml()，但如果有边界情况漏过，textContent 是安全的\n- **实际上这里是安全的**（使用了 textContent 而非 innerHTML）\n\n#### 7.2 graph.ts:268 | LOW | 标签文本可能被截断导致混淆\n\n**问题描述：**\n```javascript\nctx.fillText(hoverNode.label.slice(0, 30), hpos.x + 8, hpos.y - 4);\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 30 字符限制可能导致中文标题严重截断\n- 应该根据文本宽度动态计算\n\n---\n\n### 8. 文件 I/O 和编码问题\n\n#### 8.1 build.ts:256-257 | MEDIUM | 清单 JSON 解析未进行类型验证\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\nconst raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')\nconst parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as ManifestEntry\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 强制类型转换，不做验证\n- 如果 JSON 文件损坏或格式错误，会导致运行时错误\n- 应该使用 schema 验证或类型守护\n\n**建议修复：**\n```typescript\nconst parsed = JSON.parse(raw)\nif (!parsed.session_id || !parsed.client) {\n  // Skip invalid manifest\n  continue\n}\n```\n\n#### 8.2 build.ts:367-392 | MEDIUM | 原始转录文件解析中的错误处理过宽松\n\n**问题描述：**\n```typescript\n} catch {\n  // Skip malformed lines\n}\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 所有错误都被吞掉，包括文件权限错误\n- 应该区分\"这一行是坏的\"和\"文件读取失败\"\n\n---\n\n### 9. CSS 特定问题\n\n#### 9.1 css.ts:489 | LOW | mark 元素样式可能不适配所有背景\n\n**问题描述：**\n```css\n.search-result mark { background: var(--code-bg); color: var(--warning); border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 0.1em; }\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 在 light 主题中，code-bg 是 #f6f8fa，warning 是 #d29922\n- 对比度可能不足（WCAG AA 标准需要 4.5:1）\n- 应该为 light 主题添加特定的 mark 样式\n\n#### 9.2 css.ts:413-414 | LOW | 消息角色颜色在两个主题间的对比度\n\n**问题描述：**\n```css\n.message-user .message-role { color: var(--accent); }\n.message-assistant .message-role { color: var(--text-muted); }\n```\n\n**缺陷：**\n- 在 light 主题中，accent (#0969da) 和 text-muted (#636c76) 的对比度需要验证\n- assistant 的 text-muted 颜色可能过浅\n\n---\n\n## 总体质量评分\n\n| 方面 | 评分 | 备注 |\n|------|------|------|\n| 安全性 | 6/10 | SSRF 防护不完整，平台检测易欺骗，有 XSS 隐患 |\n| 逻辑正确性 | 7/10 | 异步错误处理有缺陷，边界情况不足 |\n| TypeScript 类型安全 | 7/10 | 有部分类型推断问题和强制转换 |\n| 测试覆盖 | 6/10 | 缺少边界情况和失败场景测试 |\n| 代码质量 | 6/10 | 内联代码过多，缺少模块化 |\n| 可维护性 | 5/10 | 内联 JS 和 CSS 维护困难 |\n\n---\n\n## 建议优先级修复\n\n### P0 (立即修复)\n1. **webhook.ts:22-27** - 完善 SSRF 防护，使用 URL.hostname 而非字符串 includes\n2. **build.ts:116-131** - 添加 manifest 和 session_id 的防御性检查\n3. **webhook.test.ts** - 添加更全面的 SSRF 和超时测试\n\n### P1 (本周内修复)\n4. **graph.ts:336, layout.ts:336** - 添加 URL 有效性检查\n5. **build.ts:256-257** - 添加 JSON 类型验证\n6. **github-pages.ts:88-96** - 用 path.relative() 替换 makeRelative()\n\n### P2 (下周修复)\n7. **layout.ts:43-121** - 重构内联 JS 为可维护的模块\n8. **graph.ts:122-361** - 提取内联算法为单独文件\n9. **增加测试覆盖** - 边界情况、失败场景、网络超时\n\n### P3 (优化)\n10. CSS 对比度审计，国际化支持改进，图表参数配置化\n\n---\n\n## 总体结论\n\n**整体质量评估：中等水平，有几处需要立即修复的安全问题**\n\n这个代码库有以下特点：\n- **优点**：设计思路清晰，错误处理有 try-catch，日志完整\n- **缺点**：安全防御不够深入，过度依赖内联代码，测试不够全面\n\n**关键建议**：\n1. 加强 URL/主机名验证的安全性\n2. 提取内联代码到可测试的模块\n3. 完善异步错误处理和类型验证\n4. 扩展测试覆盖率，特别是失败路径",

    "text": "Perfect. Now I have all the information needed. Let me compile a comprehensive code review report.\n\n---\n\n# 代码审查报告（第二轮）\n\n## 文件清单\n1. `github-pages.ts` (部署模块)\n2. `webhook.ts` (通知模块)\n3. `layout.ts` (HTML 模板)\n4. `graph.ts` (图表渲染)\n5. `transcript-list.ts` (会话列表)\n6. `build.ts` (编排核心)\n7. `github-pages.test.ts` (部署测试)\n8. `webhook.test.ts` (通知测试)\n\n---\n\n## 详细问题列表\n\n### 架构设计问题\n\n| 文件 | 行 | 严重性 | 问题描述 | 建议修复 |\n|------|-----|--------|---------|----------|\n| `build.ts` | 45-229 | HIGH | 耦合度过高：buildReport 处理了太多职责（编排、读取、解析、渲染、部署）。应拆分为更小的函数模块 | 提取独立函数：orchestrateBuild()、loadAllData()、renderAllPages()、deployAndNotify()，每个职责单一 |\n| `build.ts` | 81-136 | HIGH | 并发控制不当：summaryPromises 数组可能无限增长，没有并发限制。当 manifests 数量很大时会导致内存问题 | 使用 Semaphore（已在 summarize.ts 中实现）或 Promise.all() 的批处理方案，限制同时处理的 manifests 数量 |\n| `webhook.ts` | 22-28 | MEDIUM | 字符串硬编码 URL 匹配容易出现 false positive。平台检测依赖字符串包含而不是 URL 结构化解析 | 改为解析 URL 后查询 hostname，或建立显式的平台 → URL pattern 映射表 |\n| `layout.ts` | 43-121 | MEDIUM | 大量内联 JavaScript 代码（79 行），增加维护复杂度。与 graph.ts 中的类似 JavaScript 片段重复问题 | 考虑提取为外部 .js 文件或建立 JS 代码片段库，避免重复 |\n\n### 可维护性问题\n\n| 文件 | 行 | 严重性 | 问题描述 | 建议修复 |\n|------|-----|--------|---------|----------|\n| `graph.ts` | 12 | MEDIUM | 魔法数字 `MAX_NODES = 500` 没有说明原因。为什么是 500？内存/性能限制？ | 添加常量定义说明及注释：`// Limit to prevent canvas performance degradation`；考虑使其可配置 |\n| `graph.ts` | 166-172 | MEDIUM | 模拟器参数都是魔法数字（ALPHA, CHARGE, LINK_DIST 等）。无注释说明这些参数的物理意义或调优依据 | 将参数提取为有意义的常量，添加物理或算法解释注释 |\n| `webhook.ts` | 109-110 | MEDIUM | PRIVATE_HOSTNAME_RE 正则表达式复杂且容易出错。IPv6 匹配模式 `fc[0-9a-f]{2}:` 和 `fd[0-9a-f]{2}:` 不完整（缺少完整地址结构） | 使用更明确的正则或 IP 库（如 `ip-in-subnet`）；IPv6 FC00::/7 和 FD00::/8 需要完整检查 |\n| `layout.ts` | 160 | LOW | themeLabel 是常量 `'☀ Light'`，但在 JavaScript 代码中又有类似逻辑。应统一这个值的定义 | 将主题标签常量化或从配置读取 |\n| `transcript-list.ts` | 44-46 | LOW | 日期时间提取用魔法索引 `slice(0, 10)` 和 `slice(11, 16)`，假设 ISO 8601 格式 | 使用 `Date` 对象解析或添加注释说明格式依赖 |\n| `build.ts` | 39 | LOW | DEFAULT_MODEL 硬编码为 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'，应配置化或从 options 继承 | 从 BuildReportOptions 添加 defaultModel 字段，或从环境变量读取 |\n\n### 性能问题\n\n| 文件 | 行 | 严重性 | 问题描述 | 建议修复 |\n|------|-----|--------|---------|----------|\n| `build.ts` | 113-136 | HIGH | 闭包捕获 `manifest` 和 `msgs` 导致不必要的内存持有。即使 Promise 完成后这些数据也未立即释放 | 使用 IIFE 或立即调用的 async 函数，确保引用及时释放；考虑流式处理 |\n| `graph.ts` | 35-86 | MEDIUM | `buildGraphData()` 使用 `Set<string>` 来去重，但每次调用都重新构建。如果频繁调用应考虑缓存 | 添加缓存层或 memoization；确认调用频率 |\n| `graph.ts` | 186-226 | MEDIUM | JavaScript 中的物理模拟双重循环 O(n²) 计算斥力（line 192-202）。当 MAX_NODES = 500 时，每帧 ~250k 次计算，可能导致帧率下降 | 考虑使用四叉树或空间分割加速；或增加 ALPHA_MIN 来提前停止 |\n| `webhook.ts` | 160-187 | MEDIUM | Promise 构造中混合使用 callback 和 Promise，未正确处理 backpressure。若 body 很大，write() 返回 false 时不处理 | 检查 req.write() 返回值，根据 false 时等待 drain 事件 |\n| `build.ts` | 244-269 | LOW | `loadManifestsRecursive` 同步递归读取，深度目录可能阻塞事件循环 | 考虑使用异步版本或并发控制 |\n\n### 测试质量问题\n\n| 文件 | 行 | 严重性 | 问题描述 | 建议修复 |\n|------|-----|--------|---------|----------|\n| `github-pages.test.ts` | 47-62 | HIGH | Mock 顺序不清晰：mockImplementationOnce → mockReturnValue，顺序依赖易出错。测试脆弱性高 | 使用 mockReturnValueOnce / mockImplementationOnce 序列，或显式设置每个 call 的返回值 |\n| `webhook.test.ts` | 40-45 | MEDIUM | mockSuccess 函数有隐式行为：创建 mock response 对象但缺少必要字段（如 destroy() 方法），可能在实际调用时出现隐藏错误 | 完整定义 IncomingMessage 和 ClientRequest 的所有必要方法；使用 Partial 但补充注释 |\n| `webhook.test.ts` | 206-212 | MEDIUM | 测试只验证 hostname，未验证 Content-Type、Content-Length 等关键请求头 | 添加测试验证所有关键请求头（Content-Type、Content-Length） |\n| `github-pages.test.ts` | 117-140 | MEDIUM | 测试通过 mock.calls 数组的不稳定索引查找特定调用（line 133）。若其他测试修改 mock 结果，会导致索引混乱 | 使用 expect().toHaveBeenCalledWith() 直接验证参数，或为每个场景创建新的 mock 实例 |\n| `github-pages.test.ts` | 44-62 | MEDIUM | 没有测试 worktree 创建和清理的边界情况（如 cleanup 失败、权限问题） | 添加测试：worktree 创建失败、清理失败时的恢复能力 |\n| `webhook.test.ts` | 173-185 | LOW | Feishu payload 测试只验证 msg_type，未验证 card 结构完整性（card.header、card.elements） | 添加深层验证 Feishu card 对象结构 |\n| `build.ts` | - | MEDIUM | 没有单元测试覆盖 parseMessagesFromMarkdown、extractToolSummariesFromRaw 等核心解析逻辑 | 添加解析边界情况的单元测试（空输入、畸形 markdown、JSONL 等） |\n\n### 风格一致性问题\n\n| 文件 | 行 | 严重性 | 问题描述 | 建议修复 |\n|------|-----|--------|---------|----------|\n| `webhook.ts` | 132-142 | MEDIUM | 使用 `let parsedUrl: URL` 后立即尝试验证，但验证异常被捕获并返回，违反\"fail fast\"原则。应在参数进入函数前验证 | 重构为：参数验证 → 解析 → 处理，避免嵌套 try-catch |\n| `layout.ts` | 15-22 | LOW | escHtml() 使用正则替换，但没有考虑 null/undefined 情况。虽然 TypeScript 签名要求 string，但防御性编程应检查 | 添加 `?? ''` 或 `toString()` 处理，即使 TS 保证也要添加注释 |\n| `build.ts` | 257-259 | MEDIUM | JSON.parse() 没有 as 类型断言验证。假设 JSON 结构正确，但当 manifest 字段缺失时不会被发现 | 使用类型守卫函数验证 ManifestEntry 必需字段：`isValidManifest(parsed)` |\n| `graph.ts` | 88-90 | LOW | slugify() 与 layout.ts 的 slugifyName() 重复。应提取到公共工具模块 | 将 slugify 移到 `utils/slugify.ts` 或 layout.ts，统一导出 |\n| `transcript-list.ts` | 50-56 | MEDIUM | HTML 属性中混合 escHtml() 和无转义值。style 属性未转义，data-meta 属性内部有 HTML 实体但未编码 | 对所有属性值都使用 escHtml()；或使用模板库避免手动转义 |\n\n### 类型安全问题\n\n| 文件 | 行 | 严重性 | 问题描述 | 建议修复 |\n|------|-----|--------|---------|----------|\n| `build.ts` | 367, 376-377 | HIGH | 使用 `as Record<string, unknown> | undefined` 进行类型断言，但未验证结构。`content2` 可能是 null/undefined，代码未守卫 | 添加类型守卫：`if (!Array.isArray(content2))` before accessing elements |\n| `graph.ts` | 70 | MEDIUM | `transcriptUrlFromRoot(m)` 调用中，m 可能缺少必需字段导致返回错误 URL | 确保 ManifestEntry 类型有 repo_clean_path 和 global_clean_path 为可选但有默认 fallback |\n| `webhook.ts` | 146-154 | LOW | Platform 类型中没有显式验证 detectPlatform 返回的平台在 payloadMap 中存在 | 使用 const assertion `as const` 和编译期检查或运行时 exhaustiveness check |\n\n### 边界情况与错误处理\n\n| 文件 | 行 | 严重性 | 问题描述 | 建议修复 |\n|------|-----|--------|---------|----------|\n| `build.ts` | 107-108 | MEDIUM | 搜索片段截取前 300 个字符（slice(0, 300)），但多字节 UTF-8 字符可能被截断。未考虑字符长度 vs 字节长度 | 使用 grapheme splitter 或按字符计数，确保不截断多字节字符 |\n| `github-pages.ts` | 58 | MEDIUM | worktree 路径中使用 Date.now() 生成唯一标识，但 tmpdir 可能被其他进程并发访问造成冲突 | 使用 crypto.randomUUID() 或 mkdtempSync 来创建唯一目录 |\n| `webhook.ts` | 184 | MEDIUM | timeout 后调用 req.destroy()，但 req.end() 此时可能未调用。destroy 可能阻止 end 执行导致 body 未发送 | 重新安排事件顺序：先 write() → end()，timeout 仅在未完成时销毁 |\n| `layout.ts` | 202-212 | LOW | transcriptUrlFromTranscript 假设调用者在 transcripts/{client}/ 目录中。如果从不同深度调用会生成错误 URL | 添加 depth 参数或在返回前验证 URL 相对性 |\n\n### 安全问题\n\n| 文件 | 行 | 严重性 | 问题描述 | 建议修复 |\n|------|-----|--------|---------|----------|\n| `webhook.ts` | 119-120 | MEDIUM | HTTPS 检查后未验证 URL 是否被重定向。302 重定向可能将请求引向 HTTP 或私有 IP | 禁用 HTTP redirect 或在 redirect 时重新验证 URL 安全性 |\n| `layout.ts` | 71-120 | MEDIUM | 内联 JavaScript 代码直接操作 DOM，没有 CSP（内容安全策略）保护。如果 HTML 被 XSS 注入，JS 无防御 | 添加 CSP 头部；或将 JS 提取为外部文件并添加 nonce |\n| `graph.ts` | 117-120 | MEDIUM | JSON.stringify() 的转义处理（replace /<\\//）不完整。仅处理了 </ 和 unicode 线分隔符，未处理其他 HTML 特殊序列 | 使用 JSON.stringify(data, (k, v) => escapeJsonString(v)) 或专用库 |\n\n---\n\n## 总体质量评估\n\n### 强项\n- **模块职责分离**：部署（github-pages）、通知（webhook）、渲染（layout、graph 等）模块划分清晰\n- **容错设计**：大部分异步操作都包含 try-catch，无故障传播（never throw pattern）\n- **安全考量**：webhook 有 SSRF 防护、URL 验证、branch 名称正则验证等\n- **测试覆盖**：28 个测试文件，关键路径有测试\n\n### 弱项\n- **耦合度**：build.ts 超过 230 行，多项职责混合，难以单独测试\n- **并发控制**：summaryPromises 数组可能无限增长，性能隐患\n- **代码重复**：slugify、JavaScript 片段、URL 处理在多个文件中出现\n- **边界情况**：字符串切片、JSONL 解析、worktree 清理等边界情况考虑不周\n- **类型安全**：存在多个 `as Record<string, unknown>` 断言，缺少运行时验证\n- **文档**：魔法数字（MAX_NODES、ALPHA 等）缺少注释说明\n\n### 整体风格一致性评估\n- **ESM 导入**：符合 NodeNext，所有导入都带 .js 扩展 ✓\n- **noUncheckedIndexedAccess**：存在违规（build.ts 308, 333, 450）\n- **exactOptionalPropertyTypes**：整体符合，但 PARTIAL 类型使用不一致\n\n---\n\n## 优先级修复清单\n\n### 立即修复（CRITICAL）\n1. `build.ts` 行 81-136：并发控制机制，防止 Promise 数组无限增长\n2. `build.ts` 行 367、376：添加类型守卫检查，不使用未验证的 as 断言\n3. `webhook.ts` 行 184：修复 timeout 和 end() 的事件顺序\n\n### 近期修复（HIGH）\n1. `build.ts` 行 45-229：拆分为更小的编排函数\n2. `github-pages.test.ts` 行 47-62：修复 Mock 顺序依赖问题\n3. `build.ts` 行 113-136：处理闭包内存泄漏\n\n### 后续改进（MEDIUM）\n1. 提取重复的 slugify 逻辑到公共工具模块\n2. 提取内联 JavaScript 到外部文件\n3. 将魔法数字转换为有注释的常量\n4. 增强 parseMessagesFromMarkdown 和 extractToolSummariesFromRaw 的单元测试\n\n---\n\n最终评分：**6.5/10** — 核心功能完整且有基本安全考虑，但架构复杂度、性能隐患和测试覆盖面需要改进。建议在生产化前解决 CRITICAL 问题。",
    "type": "text"
  },

Expand full message

两轮审查完成，以下是综合结果。

---

## Review 汇总

### 仍存在的问题（按优先级）

HIGH — 建议修复

| # | 文件 | 问题 | 两轮共识 |
|---|------|------|----------|
| 1 | webhook.ts:22 | detectPlatform() 用 url.includes() 而非 hostname 判断，https://my-open.feishu.cn.attacker.com 可欺骗 | ✓✓ |
| 2 | webhook.ts:109 | PRIVATE_HOSTNAME_RE 中 IPv6 ULA 地址（fc00::/7、fd00::/8）匹配不完整，可绕过 SSRF 防护 | ✓✓ |
| 3 | build.ts:81 | summaryPromises 无并发上限，大量 manifests 时可能内存溢出 | ✓ |
| 4 | github-pages.ts:58 | worktree 路径用 Date.now()，并发时存在冲突风险；应改用随机字符串 | ✓ |
| 5 | github-pages.ts:80 | makeRelative() 自制实现不健壮，应直接用 path.relative() | ✓ |

MEDIUM

| # | 文件 | 问题 |
|---|------|------|
| 6 | build.ts:257 | JSON.parse(raw) as ManifestEntry 无运行时类型守卫，结构破损时静默失效 |
| 7 | transcript-list.ts:50 | style 属性值未经 escHtml()（虽实际安全但不一致） |
| 8 | graph.ts:88 | slugify() 与 layout.ts:slugifyName() 重复，应复用 |
| 9 | webhook.test.ts | 未验证 Content-Type / Content-Length 请求头；未测试超时触发行为 |
| 10 | github-pages.test.ts | mock 顺序依赖脆弱，建议用 toHaveBeenCalledWith() 直接断言参数 |

LOW / INFO

| # | 问题 |
|---|------|
| 11 | graph.ts 物理模拟参数（CHARGE, LINK_DIST 等）均为魔法数字，无注释 |
| 12 | build.ts:39 DEFAULT_MODEL 硬编码，应配置化 |
| 13 | light 主题下 mark 背景 --code-bg（#f6f8fa）与 --warning 对比度可能不足 WCAG AA |

---

### 两轮共同结论

已解决的 P0/P1 问题均已正确修复（shell injection、XSS、nav depth、data-summary、rAF loop、SSRF 基础防护），代码质量相比修复前有明显提升。

剩余最值得关注的是 detectPlatform hostname 欺骗（HIGH）和 IPv6 SSRF 漏洞（HIGH）——这两个属于安全缺口，其余均为质量优化项。

需要现在就修这两个 HIGH 安全问题，还是先记录留待下一阶段？
