1→# Plan: MemoryTree Report v2 — Quartz 对标全功能升级
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→当前 `memorytree report` 已实现基础静态 HTML 报告，但缺少现代化体验。
     6→用户确认目标：功能对标 Quartz（jackyzha0），面向全球用户，支持 GitHub Pages 部署。
     7→
     8→---
     9→
    10→## 已有基础（不需要重建）
    11→
    12→| 文件 | 已有能力 |
    13→|------|---------|
    14→| `src/report/render/css.ts` | CSS 变量已定义（--bg, --text, --accent 等） |
    15→| `src/report/render/layout.ts` | escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, clientBadge, slugifyName |
    16→| `src/report/render/links.ts` | LinkGraph 已构建（backlinks + forwardLinks） |
    17→| `src/report/render/search.ts` | 全文搜索 + 内联 JS 已实现 |
    18→| `src/report/render/charts.ts` | 所有 SVG 图表已实现 |
    19→| `src/report/build.ts` | 完整构建流程已实现 |
    20→| `src/types/transcript.ts` | ManifestEntry 有 cwd / client / session_id / title 等 |
    21→
    22→---
    23→
    24→## 一期实现范围（本次 PR）
    25→
    26→### 新增文件
    27→
    28→```
    29→src/report/
    30→  i18n/
    31→    index.ts          ← loadLocale(locale) → Translations 对象
    32→    en.ts             ← 英文字符串（~80 条）
    33→    zh-CN.ts          ← 中文字符串
    34→  render/
    35→    graph.ts          ← 知识图谱页面（内联 force-directed JS）
    36→    projects.ts       ← 按项目分类页面
    37→    todos.ts          ← Memory/02_todos/ 页面
    38→    archive.ts        ← Memory/05_archive/ 页面
    39→  deploy/
    40→    github-pages.ts   ← gh-pages 分支推送逻辑
    41→    webhook.ts        ← HTTP POST 通知（飞书/Telegram/Discord）
    42→```
    43→
    44→### 修改文件
    45→
    46→| 文件 | 变更 |
    47→|------|------|
    48→| `src/report/render/css.ts` | 加亮色主题变量 + 侧边栏布局 + 响应式断点 |
    49→| `src/report/render/layout.ts` | htmlShell 注入 i18n/主题 toggle JS；renderNav 改为侧边栏 |
    50→| `src/report/render/dashboard.ts` | 传入 Translations |
    51→| `src/report/render/transcript-list.ts` | 加 Client tab 筛选（纯 JS）；传入 Translations |
    52→| `src/report/render/transcript.ts` | 传入 Translations；加 popover 预览 JS |
    53→| `src/report/render/knowledge.ts` | 传入 Translations |
    54→| `src/report/render/goals.ts` | 传入 Translations |
    55→| `src/report/build.ts` | 加 todos/archive/projects/graph 页生成；调用 deploy+webhook |
    56→| `src/types/report.ts` | 扩展 BuildReportOptions（locale, ghPagesBranch, cname, webhookUrl） |
    57→| `src/heartbeat/config.ts` | 加 locale/gh_pages_branch/cname/webhook_url 字段 |
    58→| `src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts` | 传新 config 字段给 buildReport() |
    59→
    60→---
    61→
    62→## 详细实现规格
    63→
    64→### 1. i18n 系统（方案 A：构建时指定语言）
    65→
    66→```typescript
    67→// src/report/i18n/index.ts
    68→export interface Translations {
    69→  nav: { dashboard: string; sessions: string; projects: string; graph: string
    70→         goals: string; todos: string; knowledge: string; archive: string; search: string }
    71→  dashboard: { title: string; subtitle: string; sessions: string; messages: string
    72→               toolEvents: string; activeDays: string; recentSessions: string }
    73→  sessions: { title: string; noSessions: string; client: string; date: string
    74→              id: string; msgs: string; tools: string; all: string }
    75→  transcript: { aiSummary: string; referencedBy: string; messages: string
    76→                noMessages: string; client: string; sessionId: string
    77→                branch: string; workingDir: string; sha256: string; toolEvents: string }
    78→  graph: { title: string; subtitle: string; noData: string }
    79→  projects: { title: string; noProjects: string; sessions: string }
    80→  search: { title: string; placeholder: string; results: string; noResults: string }
    81→  common: { loading: string; unknown: string }
    82→}
    83→export function loadLocale(locale: string): Translations
    84→// 支持: 'en'（默认）、'zh-CN'
    85→// 未知 locale → 回退到 'en'
    86→```
    87→
    88→**config.toml：**
    89→```toml
    90→locale = "zh-CN"   # 用户设置一次，构建时生效
    91→```
    92→
    93→---
    94→
    95→### 2. 侧边栏导航 + 响应式
    96→
    97→**布局结构（替换 top nav）：**
    98→```
    99→┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
   100→│ [☰] MemoryTree          [☀/☾] [搜索]   │  ← 移动端顶栏
   101→├──────────┬──────────────────────────────┤
   102→│  Main    │                              │
   103→│  Dashboard│     主内容区                 │
   104→│  Sessions │     max-width: 900px        │
   105→│  Projects │                             │
   106→│  Graph   │                              │
   107→│          │                              │
   108→│  Memory  │                              │
   109→│  Goals   │                              │
   110→│  Todos   │                              │
   111→│  Knowledge│                             │
   112→│  Archive │                              │
   113→│          │                              │
   114→│  Tools   │                              │
   115→│  Search  │                              │
   116→│  ────    │                              │
   117→│  ☀ Light │                              │
   118→└──────────┴──────────────────────────────┘
   119→```
   120→
   121→**响应式断点：**
   122→- `> 1024px`：侧边栏固定 240px，主内容自动左移
   123→- `< 768px`：侧边栏隐藏，hamburger `☰`，点击从左侧滑出 + 遮罩层
   124→
   125→**JS（内联，约 40 行）：**
   126→- hamburger click → sidebar.classList.toggle('open')
   127→- overlay click → 关闭 sidebar
   128→- theme toggle → `data-theme` 切换 + `localStorage.setItem('mt-theme', ...)`
   129→- 初始化读取 `localStorage.getItem('mt-theme')` 默认 dark
   130→
   131→---
   132→
   133→### 3. 暗色 / 亮色切换
   134→
   135→```css
   136→/* 亮色主题覆盖（加入 css.ts） */
   137→[data-theme="light"] {
   138→  --bg: #ffffff;
   139→  --bg-secondary: #f6f8fa;
   140→  --bg-card: #ffffff;
   141→  --border: #d0d7de;
   142→  --text: #1f2328;
   143→  --text-muted: #636c76;
   144→  --accent: #0969da;
   145→  --accent-hover: #0550ae;
   146→  --user-bg: #ddf4ff;
   147→  --user-border: #54aeff44;
   148→  --assistant-bg: #f6f8fa;
   149→  --assistant-border: #d0d7de;
   150→  --code-bg: #f6f8fa;
   151→}
   152→```
   153→
   154→---
   155→
   156→### 4. 知识图谱（graph.html）
   157→
   158→**数据源：** LinkGraph（已有）+ ManifestEntry[] + MarkdownFile[]
   159→
   160→**节点类型：**
   161→- `session`   → 圆形，按 client 着色（蓝/紫/绿）
   162→- `knowledge` → 菱形，黄色
   163→- `goal`      → 六边形，橙色
   164→
   165→**渲染：** `<canvas>` + 内联 vanilla JS force simulation（~250 行，无 CDN）
   166→
   167→```javascript
   168→// force simulation 核心逻辑（内联）
   169→const GRAPH_DATA = { nodes: [...], edges: [...] }
   170→// 每帧：斥力（所有节点对）+ 引力（有连线的节点对）+ 中心引力 + 阻尼
   171→// 交互：hover 高亮 + tooltip；click 跳转；scroll zoom；drag pan
   172→```
   173→
   174→**节点上限：** 超过 500 个时取最近 500 个（按 started_at）
   175→
   176→---
   177→
   178→### 5. 按 Client 分类（Sessions 页 tab 筛选）
   179→
   180→`transcripts/index.html` 顶部加 tab bar，纯 JS 筛选（`data-client` 属性）：
   181→
   182→```
   183→[ All (84) ]  [ Claude (42) ]  [ Codex (31) ]  [ Gemini (11) ]
   184→```
   185→
   186→---
   187→
   188→### 6. 按 Project 分类（projects/index.html）
   189→
   190→```typescript
   191→// src/report/render/projects.ts
   192→function extractProject(cwd: string): string {
   193→  return cwd.split(/[/\\]/).filter(Boolean).at(-1) ?? 'unknown'
   194→}
   195→// 按项目分组 manifests → 卡片列表（项目名、session 数、最后活跃、使用的 clients）
   196→```
   197→
   198→---
   199→
   200→### 7. 新增 Memory 分类页面
   201→
   202→- `Memory/02_todos/` → `todos/index.html`（复用 goals.ts 模式）
   203→- `Memory/05_archive/` → `archive/index.html`（复用 goals.ts 模式）
   204→- `Memory/03_chat_logs/`→ 有内容则加入导航，否则隐藏
   205→
   206→---
   207→
   208→### 8. Popover 预览
   209→
   210→session 链接 hover 时显示摘要卡片（summary 数据嵌在 `data-*` 属性，无需 HTTP 请求）：
   211→
   212→```html
   213→<a href="..." data-summary="..." data-meta="Claude · 2026-03-16 · 18 msgs">Session Title</a>
   214→```
   215→
   216→JS 监听 mouseover → 创建/定位 `.popover` div → mouseleave 隐藏
   217→
   218→---
   219→
   220→### 9. GitHub Pages 部署
   221→
   222→**config.toml 新字段：**
   223→```toml
   224→gh_pages_branch = "gh-pages"    # 留空则不部署
   225→cname = "memory.yourdomain.com" # 留空则不生成 CNAME 文件
   226→```
   227→
   228→**src/report/deploy/github-pages.ts：**
   229→```typescript
   230→// 步骤：
   231→// 1. 如果 cname 非空 → 写 outputDir/CNAME
   232→// 2. git subtree push --prefix Memory/07_reports origin {branch}
   233→//    （branch 不存在则先 git checkout --orphan {branch} 并推空提交）
   234→// 3. 失败 → logger.warn，不抛出
   235→```
   236→
   237→---
   238→
   239→### 10. Webhook 通知
   240→
   241→**config.toml 新字段：**
   242→```toml
   243→webhook_url = "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/bot/v2/hook/xxx"
   244→```
   245→
   246→**src/report/deploy/webhook.ts：**
   247→```typescript
   248→// 平台自动识别（通过 URL 特征）：
   249→//   feishu / telegram / discord / slack / generic
   250→// 飞书：发卡片消息（标题 + 会话数 + 跳转按钮）
   251→// Telegram：sendMessage API
   252→// Discord/Slack：{ content: "..." }
   253→// 失败 → warn，不抛出
   254→```
   255→
   256→---
   257→
   258→### 11. 新增 Config 字段
   259→
   260→```typescript
   261→// src/heartbeat/config.ts
   262→readonly locale: string              // 默认: 'en'
   263→readonly gh_pages_branch: string     // 默认: ''（不部署）
   264→readonly cname: string               // 默认: ''
   265→readonly webhook_url: string         // 默认: ''
   266→```
   267→
   268→### 12. 扩展 BuildReportOptions
   269→
   270→```typescript
   271→// src/types/report.ts
   272→locale?: string           // 默认 'en'
   273→ghPagesBranch?: string    // 默认 ''
   274→cname?: string            // 默认 ''
   275→webhookUrl?: string       // 默认 ''
   276→newSessionIds?: string[]  // 本次新增的 session（webhook 用）
   277→```
   278→
   279→---
   280→
   281→## 输出目录结构（更新后）
   282→

   284→Memory/07_reports/
   285→  index.html              ← Dashboard（更新布局）
   286→  graph.html              ← 知识图谱（新增）
   287→  projects/
   288→    index.html            ← 项目列表（新增）
   289→  transcripts/

   293→    gemini/...

   297→  archive/index.html      ← 新增

   301→
   302→---

让我仔细逐项分析二期的 13 个功能，找出潜在问题。

---

## 二期计划 Review

### P0 — 阻塞性问题（必须先修计划）

① Mermaid 图表渲染 — 架构决策缺失

计划只写了"Mermaid 图表渲染"，但没有解决核心矛盾：
- Mermaid.js 完整包约 2MB+，不能内联（会让每个页面体积爆炸）
- 用 CDN 又违反"no CDN dependencies"原则
- Server-side 渲染需要 puppeteer/headless，依赖太重

需要先决定方案：CDN + SRI 完整性校验（推荐），还是另选轻量方案？

---

② SPA 客户端路由 — 完全未设计

计划只有一行描述，但实现细节极其复杂：
- GitHub Pages 静态托管不支持 URL rewrite，需要 404.html 重定向 hack
- 或者改用 fetch 替换 <a> 跳转 + history.pushState，但需要重构所有链接
- 现有页面都是独立 HTML 文件，改为 SPA 意味着 完全重构渲染层

需要先明确边界：只做"页内无刷新"（tab 切换/折叠），还是真正的跨页 SPA？

---

③ 方案 B i18n（多语言并存）— 与现有方案冲突

一期实现的是构建时单语言。方案 B "多语言并存"意味着：
- 所有 HTML 文本不能直接写字符串，要改成 data-i18n="nav.dashboard" 属性
- JS 运行时根据 navigator.language 选择翻译
- 现有所有渲染函数都要大改，相当于重做 i18n 层

这与一期实现有根本冲突，需要明确：是替换一期方案，还是叠加？

---

### P1 — 重要缺失（影响功能正确性）

④ RSS Feed + Social Preview Cards — 都需要绝对 URL

RSS <link> 和 OG og:url 都必须是绝对 URL（https://...），但计划里没有 report_base_url 这个 config 字段。

当前有 cname，但不等于完整 URL（没有 protocol/path）。建议新增：

report_base_url = "https://memory.example.com"  # RSS/OG 用

---

⑤ 会话 Tag 系统 — 三个细节未设计

- 缓存策略：tag 提取需要 AI 调用，应复用 summarize.ts 的 sha256 缓存机制，否则每次构建都重新调用 API
- noAi=true 回退：AI 禁用时 tag 应为空还是跳过展示？
- 类型扩展：ManifestEntry 和 SearchIndexEntry 都需要新增 tags: string[] 字段，目前计划没提

---

⑥ 搜索 client/project 过滤 — 类型未更新

当前 SearchIndexEntry（src/types/report.ts）里没有 client 和 project 字段，过滤逻辑无法实现。需要在计划中明确扩展这个类型。

---

### P2 — 小瑕疵（实现时易踩坑）

⑦ TOC — 未指定 heading 层级
只说"锚点"，没说只取 ## h2 还是 ## h2 + ### h3。重复标题也没说怎么处理（slugify 时加序号）。

⑧ Breadcrumbs — 未设计各页面路径结构
Dashboard 没有面包屑，transcript 是 3 层（Home > Sessions > 文件名），需要每种页面类型单独定义。

⑨ 侧边栏图标模式 — 图标来源未定
768–1024px 窄版只显示图标，但当前 nav 没有图标数据。是用 emoji？Unicode 符号？还是内联 SVG？

---

## 总结

| 级别 | 项 | 结论 |
|------|-----|------|
| P0 | Mermaid CDN 决策 | 需先选方案再实现 |
| P0 | SPA 路由边界 | 需先明确范围 |
| P0 | 方案 B i18n | 需明确是替换还是叠加 |
| P1 | RSS/OG 需要 base URL | 补充 report_base_url config 字段 |
| P1 | Tag 系统缺缓存/noAi/类型设计 | 补充这三项 |
| P1 | 搜索过滤缺类型扩展 | 补充 SearchIndexEntry 字段 |
| P2 | TOC heading 层级 | 明确 h2+h3，重复加序号 |
| P2 | Breadcrumbs 各页结构 | 逐页定义 |
| P2 | 侧边栏图标来源 | 明确用 emoji 还是 SVG |

你想怎么处理这些问题？逐一讨论决策，还是我直接给出推荐方案更新计划？

  "content": "# Plan: MemoryTree Report v2 — Quartz 对标全功能升级\n\n## Context\n\n当前 `memorytree report` 已实现基础静态 HTML 报告，但缺少现代化体验。\n用户确认目标：功能对标 Quartz（jackyzha0），面向全球用户，支持 GitHub Pages 部署。\n\n---\n\n## 已有基础（不需要重建）\n\n| 文件 | 已有能力 |\n|------|---------|\n| `src/report/render/css.ts` | CSS 变量已定义（--bg, --text, --accent 等） |\n| `src/report/render/layout.ts` | escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, clientBadge, slugifyName |\n| `src/report/render/links.ts` | LinkGraph 已构建（backlinks + forwardLinks） |\n| `src/report/render/search.ts` | 全文搜索 + 内联 JS 已实现 |\n| `src/report/render/charts.ts` | 所有 SVG 图表已实现 |\n| `src/report/render/markdown.ts` | markdownToHtml()：heading/bold/italic/code/list/link |\n| `src/report/build.ts` | 完整构建流程已实现 |\n| `src/types/transcript.ts` | ManifestEntry 有 cwd / client / project / session_id / title 等 |\n\n---\n\n## 一期实现范围（已完成，PR #15）\n\n### 新增文件\n\n```\nsrc/report/\n  i18n/\n    index.ts          ← loadLocale(locale) → Translations 对象\n    en.ts             ← 英文字符串（~80 条）\n    zh-CN.ts          ← 中文字符串\n  render/\n    graph.ts          ← 知识图谱页面（内联 force-directed JS）\n    projects.ts       ← 按项目分类页面\n    todos.ts          ← Memory/02_todos/ 页面\n    archive.ts        ← Memory/05_archive/ 页面\n  deploy/\n    github-pages.ts   ← gh-pages 分支推送逻辑\n    webhook.ts        ← HTTP POST 通知（飞书/Telegram/Discord）\n```\n\n### 修改文件\n\n| 文件 | 变更 |\n|------|------|\n| `src/report/render/css.ts` | 加亮色主题变量 + 侧边栏布局 + 响应式断点 |\n| `src/report/render/layout.ts` | htmlShell 注入 i18n/主题 toggle JS；renderNav 改为侧边栏 |\n| `src/report/render/dashboard.ts` | 传入 Translations |\n| `src/report/render/transcript-list.ts` | 加 Client tab 筛选（纯 JS）；传入 Translations |\n| `src/report/render/transcript.ts` | 传入 Translations；加 popover 预览 JS |\n| `src/report/render/knowledge.ts` | 传入 Translations |\n| `src/report/render/goals.ts` | 传入 Translations |\n| `src/report/build.ts` | 加 todos/archive/projects/graph 页生成；调用 deploy+webhook |\n| `src/types/report.ts` | 扩展 BuildReportOptions（locale, ghPagesBranch, cname, webhookUrl） |\n| `src/heartbeat/config.ts` | 加 locale/gh_pages_branch/cname/webhook_url 字段 |\n| `src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts` | 传新 config 字段给 buildReport() |\n\n---\n\n## 二期实现范围（待实现）\n\n### 设计决策（已审查修正）\n\n#### D1. Mermaid — CDN + SRI（不内联）\n\nMermaid.js 完整包 ~2MB，内联会让每页体积爆炸。最佳实践：\n\n```html\n<!-- 仅在含 mermaid 代码块的页面注入，使用 SRI 锁定版本 -->\n<script type=\"module\"\n  src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@11/dist/mermaid.esm.min.mjs\"\n  integrity=\"sha384-{hash}\"\n  crossorigin=\"anonymous\"></script>\n<script>\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () =>\n    window.mermaid?.initialize({ startOnLoad: true, theme: 'dark' })\n  )\n</script>\n```\n\n构建时扫描 markdown 内容：含 ` ```mermaid ` 块则注入 CDN script + 初始化；否则不注入。\nJS 禁用时优雅降级：代码块保持原样显示。\n\n#### D2. SPA 路由 — 改为 View Transitions API（渐进增强）\n\n真正的 SPA 路由需要 404.html hack + 完全重构渲染层，对静态报告站点过度工程化。\n\n最佳实践：**View Transitions API**（现代浏览器原生支持，不支持的浏览器自动忽略）\n\n```css\n/* 全页淡入淡出过渡，约 3 行 CSS */\n@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) {\n  ::view-transition-old(root) { animation: 90ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,1,1) both fade-out; }\n  ::view-transition-new(root) { animation: 210ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1) both fade-in; }\n}\n```\n\n```javascript\n// layout.ts 内联 JS 中添加（约 5 行）\ndocument.addEventListener('click', e => {\n  const a = e.target.closest('a[href]:not([target]):not([download])')\n  if (!a || !document.startViewTransition) return\n  // 浏览器自动处理过渡，无需 fetch 页面内容\n})\n```\n\n零 JS 框架，零路由逻辑，效果是跨页淡入淡出动画。\n\n#### D3. 方案 B i18n — 降级为 `--locale` CLI 参数\n\n运行时多语言（data-i18n 属性 + JS 切换）会要求重构所有渲染函数，与构建时方案根本冲突。\n\n最佳实践：**保持构建时单语言**，仅新增 CLI 参数：\n\n```bash\nmemorytree report build --locale zh-CN  # 覆盖 config.toml 的 locale\n```\n\nconfig.toml 设置一次，CLI 可临时覆盖。简单、可预测、无 JS 依赖。\n\n#### D4. RSS Feed + Social Preview Cards — 新增 `report_base_url` 字段\n\n两者都需要绝对 URL。新增配置字段，不配置则优雅降级：\n\n```toml\n# config.toml 新增\nreport_base_url = \"https://memory.example.com\"  # RSS/OG 用，留空则跳过\n```\n\nRSS：`report_base_url` 为空时生成 feed.xml 但省略 `<link>` 元素。\nOG：`report_base_url` 为空时省略 `og:url`，其余 meta 正常生成。\n\n#### D5. 会话 Tag 系统 — 三层设计\n\n- **缓存**：`.report-cache/tags/{raw_sha256}.json → { tags: string[] }`，与 summary 相同的 sha256 缓存机制\n- **noAi=true**：跳过 AI 调用，tags = []，不展示 tag UI\n- **类型**：`ManifestEntry` 中 `tags` 为可选字段（向后兼容）：\n  ```typescript\n  // src/types/transcript.ts 追加\n  tags?: string[]\n  ```\n- **AI Prompt**：`\"Extract 3-5 short keyword tags from this session. Respond with JSON array only: [\\\"tag1\\\",\\\"tag2\\\"]\"`\n- **展示**：session 卡片上的 pill badge，可点击过滤\n\n#### D6. 搜索过滤 — 扩展 SearchIndexEntry + 下拉筛选 UI\n\n```typescript\n// src/types/report.ts — SearchIndexEntry 追加 project 字段\n// (client 字段已存在)\nexport interface SearchIndexEntry {\n  url: string\n  title: string\n  client: string\n  project: string  // ← 新增（来自 ManifestEntry.project）\n  date: string\n  snippet: string\n}\n```\n\n搜索页 UI：文本框上方增加两个 `<select>` 下拉：\n```\n[All Clients ▼]  [All Projects ▼]\n[🔍 Search sessions...          ]\n```\n纯 JS 筛选，与现有搜索逻辑组合（text AND client AND project）。\n\n#### D7. TOC — h2 + h3，重复标题加序号\n\n```typescript\n// src/report/render/markdown.ts 扩展\nfunction extractToc(md: string): { level: 2 | 3; text: string; id: string }[]\n// - 扫描 ## 和 ### 开头的行\n// - id = slugifyName(text)，重复则追加 -1, -2（维护 seen Map）\n// - 生成嵌套 <ul> 结构，点击平滑滚动\n// - 注入在页面标题下方的 .toc-container（折叠/展开）\n```\n\n适用页面：Knowledge、Goals、todos、archive 的每个 markdown 文件展开视图。\n\n#### D8. Breadcrumbs — 各页面路径结构\n\n| 页面 | 面包屑 |\n|------|--------|\n| Dashboard | (无) |\n| Sessions 列表 | Sessions |\n| Transcript 详情 | Sessions › {client} › {title} |\n| Projects | Projects |\n| Graph | Graph |\n| Goals | Memory › Goals |\n| Todos | Memory › Todos |\n| Knowledge | Memory › Knowledge |\n| Archive | Memory › Archive |\n| Search | Search |\n\n面包屑通过 `renderBreadcrumb(items: {label: string; url?: string}[])` 生成，加入 `htmlShell` 参数。\n\n#### D9. 侧边栏图标模式 — Emoji（768–1024px）\n\nEmoji 方案：无需额外资源，无需 SVG 管理，跨平台显示一致。\n\n| Nav 项 | Emoji |\n|--------|-------|\n| Dashboard | 📊 |\n| Sessions | 💬 |\n| Projects | 📁 |\n| Graph | 🕸️ |\n| Goals | 🎯 |\n| Todos | ✅ |\n| Knowledge | 📚 |\n| Archive | 🗄️ |\n| Search | 🔍 |\n\n768–1024px 媒体查询：`--sidebar-width: 52px`，文字标签 `display: none`，仅显示 emoji，hover 显示 `title` tooltip。\n\n---\n\n### 新增文件\n\n```\nsrc/report/\n  render/\n    toc.ts            ← extractToc() + renderToc()\n    breadcrumb.ts     ← renderBreadcrumb()\n    rss.ts            ← renderRssFeed()\n    callouts.ts       ← callout 语法解析（集成到 markdown.ts）\n  tags.ts             ← extractTags() with sha256 cache\n```\n\n### 修改文件\n\n| 文件 | 变更 |\n|------|------|\n| `src/types/report.ts` | SearchIndexEntry 加 project 字段；BuildReportOptions 加 reportBaseUrl |\n| `src/types/transcript.ts` | ManifestEntry 加 tags?: string[] |\n| `src/heartbeat/config.ts` | 加 report_base_url 字段 |\n| `src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts` | 传 reportBaseUrl 给 buildReport() |\n| `src/report/render/css.ts` | TOC 样式；Breadcrumb 样式；Callout 样式；Reader Mode 样式；侧边栏图标模式；View Transitions |\n| `src/report/render/layout.ts` | htmlShell 加 breadcrumb/OG meta 参数；侧边栏 emoji；Reader Mode toggle |\n| `src/report/render/markdown.ts` | 集成 callout 解析；Mermaid CDN 注入标记 |\n| `src/report/render/knowledge.ts` | 集成 TOC |\n| `src/report/render/goals.ts` | 集成 TOC |\n| `src/report/render/search.ts` | buildSearchIndex 加 project；renderSearchPage 加过滤 UI |\n| `src/report/render/transcript-list.ts` | session 卡片加 tag badges |\n| `src/report/build.ts` | 调用 tags.ts；生成 feed.xml；传 reportBaseUrl |\n\n---\n\n### 详细实现规格\n\n#### 1. TOC 生成（toc.ts）\n\n```typescript\nexport interface TocEntry { level: 2 | 3; text: string; id: string }\n\nexport function extractToc(md: string): TocEntry[]\n// 扫描 ^## text 和 ^### text\n// id = slugifyName(text)，重复追加 -N\n\nexport function renderToc(entries: TocEntry[]): string\n// 生成 <nav class=\"toc\"> 折叠/展开，平滑滚动\n// h3 缩进 16px，h2 不缩进\n// 空 entries → 返回空字符串\n```\n\n#### 2. Breadcrumb（breadcrumb.ts）\n\n```typescript\nexport interface BreadcrumbItem { label: string; url?: string }\n\nexport function renderBreadcrumb(items: BreadcrumbItem[]): string\n// items[0] = Home，最后一项无链接（当前页）\n// 渲染为 <nav aria-label=\"breadcrumb\"> Home / Sessions / ...\n// items 为空 → 返回空字符串\n```\n\n#### 3. RSS Feed（rss.ts）\n\n```typescript\nexport function renderRssFeed(\n  manifests: ManifestEntry[],\n  summaries: Record<string, string>,\n  baseUrl: string,  // 空字符串时 item link 用相对路径\n): string\n// RSS 2.0 格式\n// XML 内容全部 xmlEscape()（&amp; &lt; &gt; &quot;）\n// <pubDate> 格式：RFC 2822（new Date(started_at).toUTCString()）\n// 最多输出最近 100 条\n```\n\n#### 4. Social Preview Cards（OG meta）\n\n注入到 `htmlShell` 的 `<head>` 中：\n\n```html\n<meta property=\"og:title\" content=\"{title}\">\n<meta property=\"og:description\" content=\"{summary.slice(0,200)}\">\n<meta property=\"og:type\" content=\"article\">\n<!-- 仅当 baseUrl 非空时注入 -->\n<meta property=\"og:url\" content=\"{baseUrl}/{pageUrl}\">\n```\n\n#### 5. Callouts（集成到 markdown.ts）\n\n支持 GitHub Flavored Callout 语法：\n\n```markdown\n> [!note]\n> This is a note.\n```\n\n解析规则：`blockquote` 首行匹配 `\\[!(note|tip|important|warning|caution|info|success|error)\\]`，转换为：\n\n```html\n<div class=\"callout callout-note\">\n  <div class=\"callout-title\">📝 Note</div>\n  <div class=\"callout-body\">...</div>\n</div>\n```\n\nCSS：左边框颜色按类型区分（note=蓝, tip=绿, warning=黄, caution/error=红）。\n\n#### 6. Reader Mode（layout.ts 内联 JS + CSS）\n\n```javascript\n// 内联 JS（约 10 行）\ndocument.getElementById('reader-toggle')?.addEventListener('click', () => {\n  const on = document.body.classList.toggle('reader-mode')\n  localStorage.setItem('mt-reader', on ? '1' : '0')\n})\nif (localStorage.getItem('mt-reader') === '1')\n  document.body.classList.add('reader-mode')\n```\n\n```css\n.reader-mode .sidebar,\n.reader-mode .topbar,\n.reader-mode .breadcrumb,\n.reader-mode .meta-table,\n.reader-mode .backlinks { display: none !important; }\n.reader-mode .main-content { margin-left: 0; }\n.reader-mode .container { max-width: 720px; }\n```\n\n按钮放在 `.page-header` 右侧（`📖 Reader`）。\n\n#### 7. View Transitions（css.ts + layout.ts）\n\n```css\n/* css.ts 追加 */\n@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) {\n  ::view-transition-old(root) {\n    animation: 90ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1) both fade-out;\n  }\n  ::view-transition-new(root) {\n    animation: 210ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) both fade-in;\n  }\n}\n@keyframes fade-out { to { opacity: 0; } }\n@keyframes fade-in { from { opacity: 0; } }\n```\n\nlayout.ts htmlShell 尾部注入：\n```javascript\n// View Transitions API — progressive enhancement\nif (document.startViewTransition) {\n  document.addEventListener('click', e => {\n    const a = e.target.closest('a[href]:not([target]):not([download])')\n    if (!a) return\n    const href = a.getAttribute('href')\n    if (!href || href.startsWith('#') || href.startsWith('http')) return\n    e.preventDefault()\n    document.startViewTransition(() => { window.location.href = href })\n  })\n}\n```\n\n#### 8. Tag 系统（tags.ts）\n\n```typescript\nexport async function getTags(\n  sha256: string,\n  summary: string,\n  options: { cacheDir: string; noAi: boolean; model: string }\n): Promise<string[]>\n// noAi=true → return []\n// 缓存：.report-cache/tags/{sha256}.json\n// AI prompt：提取 3-5 个关键词标签，返回 JSON 数组\n// 失败 → return []（不抛出）\n\nexport function renderTagBadges(tags: string[]): string\n// 生成 <span class=\"tag\">...</span> 列表\n// 标签 slugify 后作为 data-tag 用于 JS 过滤\n```\n\n#### 9. 侧边栏折叠记忆（layout.ts 内联 JS）\n\n```javascript\n// 侧边栏折叠\nconst sb = document.querySelector('.sidebar')\nconst collapseBtn = document.getElementById('sidebar-collapse')\nconst COLLAPSED = localStorage.getItem('mt-sidebar') === 'collapsed'\nif (COLLAPSED) document.body.classList.add('sidebar-collapsed')\ncollapseBtn?.addEventListener('click', () => {\n  const now = document.body.classList.toggle('sidebar-collapsed')\n  localStorage.setItem('mt-sidebar', now ? 'collapsed' : 'expanded')\n})\n```\n\n```css\n.sidebar-collapsed .sidebar { width: 52px; }\n.sidebar-collapsed .nav-link span { display: none; }\n.sidebar-collapsed .main-content { margin-left: 52px; }\n```\n\n#### 10. 侧边栏图标模式（768–1024px CSS）\n\n```css\n/* 侧边栏图标模式：768–1024px */\n@media (max-width: 1024px) and (min-width: 769px) {\n  :root { --sidebar-width: 52px; }\n  .nav-link .nav-label { display: none; }\n  .nav-link { justify-content: center; padding: 0.45rem; }\n  .nav-section-label { display: none; }\n  .sidebar-brand { display: none; }\n  .sidebar-footer .theme-label { display: none; }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 测试计划\n\n| 测试文件 | 覆盖内容 |\n|---------|---------|\n| `tests/report/render/toc.test.ts` | extractToc h2/h3；重复标题 ID；空内容；renderToc 嵌套结构 |\n| `tests/report/render/breadcrumb.test.ts` | 单层/多层；最后项无链接；空 items |\n| `tests/report/render/rss.test.ts` | XML 特殊字符转义；baseUrl 空时无 link；最多100条；RFC2822日期 |\n| `tests/report/render/callouts.test.ts` | 各 callout 类型；普通 blockquote 不受影响；嵌套内容 |\n| `tests/report/tags.test.ts` | noAi=true 返回 []；缓存命中不调 AI；失败返回 [] |\n| `tests/report/render/search.test.ts` | SearchIndexEntry 含 project；过滤 HTML 包含 select |\n| `tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts` | report_base_url 默认值/读取/round-trip |\n\n---\n\n### 实现顺序\n\n1. **类型扩展**：`SearchIndexEntry.project`；`ManifestEntry.tags?`；`BuildReportOptions.reportBaseUrl`；`config.ts report_base_url`\n2. **TOC**：`toc.ts` + 测试 → 集成到 knowledge.ts / goals.ts\n3. **Breadcrumb**：`breadcrumb.ts` + 测试 → 集成到 htmlShell\n4. **Callouts**：`markdown.ts` 扩展 + 测试\n5. **CSS 增量**：callout 样式；TOC 样式；reader mode；view transitions；侧边栏图标+折叠\n6. **Reader Mode**：layout.ts JS + CSS + 按钮\n7. **View Transitions**：CSS + layout.ts JS（5行）\n8. **侧边栏图标 + 折叠**：CSS + JS\n9. **RSS Feed**：`rss.ts` + 测试 → build.ts 输出 feed.xml\n10. **OG Meta**：htmlShell 加 meta 参数 → 各页面传入\n11. **搜索过滤**：SearchIndexEntry 加 project → buildSearchIndex 更新 → renderSearchPage 加 UI\n12. **Tag 系统**：`tags.ts` + 测试 → build.ts 并行调用 → transcript-list.ts 展示\n13. **Mermaid**：markdown.ts 扫描 mermaid 块 → htmlShell 条件注入 CDN script\n14. **--locale CLI flag**：cmd-report.ts 加 --locale 参数\n15. **全量构建 + 测试**\n\n---\n\n## 输出目录结构（最终）\n\n```\nMemory/07_reports/\n  index.html              ← Dashboard\n  graph.html              ← 知识图谱\n  feed.xml                ← RSS Feed（新增）\n  CNAME                   ← if cname 配置\n  transcripts/\n    index.html            ← Sessions（Client tab + tag 过滤）\n    claude/...\n    codex/...\n    gemini/...\n  goals/index.html        ← Goals（含 TOC）\n  todos/index.html        ← Todos（含 TOC）\n  knowledge/index.html    ← Knowledge（含 TOC）\n  archive/index.html      ← Archive（含 TOC）\n  projects/index.html     ← Projects\n  search.html             ← Search（含 client/project 过滤）\n```\n\n---\n\n## 验证步骤\n\n```bash\ncd C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow\n\n# 1. 构建\nnpm run build\n\n# 2. 全量测试（目标 620+ 通过，0 失败）\nnpm test\n\n# 3. 生成报告\nnode dist/cli.js report build --root D:/demo1/openmnemo --no-ai --locale zh-CN\n\n# 4. 启动预览\nnode dist/cli.js report serve --dir D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/07_reports --port 4321\n\n# 5. 验证清单\n# ✅ Knowledge/Goals 页面 → TOC 正确嵌套，平滑滚动\n# ✅ 每个页面 → 面包屑显示正确层级\n# ✅ 含 [!note] 的页面 → callout 样式正确\n# ✅ 含 ```mermaid 的页面 → 图表渲染（其余页面无 CDN 注入）\n# ✅ 📖 Reader 按钮 → 侧边栏消失，内容居中，刷新保留\n# ✅ 页面跳转 → 淡入淡出过渡（Chrome/Edge）\n# ✅ 768–1024px → 侧边栏只显示 emoji，hover 显示 tooltip\n# ✅ << 折叠按钮 → 侧边栏收起，刷新保留\n# ✅ /feed.xml → 有效 RSS，<pubDate> 格式正确\n# ✅ view-source: → OG meta 标签存在（if baseUrl 配置）\n# ✅ 搜索页 → client/project 下拉组合过滤正常\n```\n"
}

assistant #644 15:20:08

计划已更新。以下是 9 个问题的最终决策汇总：

---

### P0 — 三项架构决策

| 问题 | 决策 | 理由 |
|------|------|------|
| Mermaid | CDN + SRI 完整性校验，构建时按需注入（只有含 mermaid 块的页面才加载） | 2MB 不能内联；SRI hash 锁定版本防劫持 |
| SPA 路由 | View Transitions API（渐进增强，~5 行 CSS + 5 行 JS） | 真 SPA 要完全重构渲染层，性价比极低；VTA 效果一样，代码为零 |
| 方案 B i18n | 降级为 --locale CLI 参数，保持构建时单语言 | 运行时多语言要求全部 HTML 改用 data-i18n 属性，推倒一期重来 |

### P1 — 三项补充设计

| 问题 | 决策 |
|------|------|
| RSS + OG | 新增 report_base_url 配置字段，空则优雅降级（RSS 省略 link，OG 省略 og:url） |
| Tag 系统 | sha256 缓存 + noAi=true 返回空 + ManifestEntry.tags?: string[] 可选字段 |
| 搜索过滤 | SearchIndexEntry 新增 project 字段 + 搜索页两个 <select> 下拉组合过滤 |

### P2 — 三项细节明确

- TOC：h2 + h3，重复标题 ID 自动追加 -1 / -2
- Breadcrumbs：Dashboard 无，transcript 三层（Sessions › client › title），其余各页按层级定义
- 侧边栏图标：Emoji（📊💬📁🕸️🎯✅📚🗄️🔍），768–1024px CSS 窄版

---

共 15 个实现步骤，目标测试数 620+。可以开始实现了吗？

    13→  dayBuckets: Record<string, number>

1→/**
     2→ * Load, validate, and manage ~/.memorytree/config.toml.
     3→ * Port of scripts/_config_utils.py
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'
     7→import { homedir } from 'node:os'
     8→import { dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
     9→
    10→import { parse as parseToml } from 'smol-toml'
    11→
    12→import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    13→
    14→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    15→// Constants
    16→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17→
    18→const DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'
    19→const DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH = true
    20→const DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL = 'info'
    21→const DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT = false
    22→const DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
    23→const DEFAULT_LOCALE = 'en'
    24→const DEFAULT_GH_PAGES_BRANCH = ''
    25→const DEFAULT_CNAME = ''
    26→const DEFAULT_WEBHOOK_URL = ''
    27→const VALID_LOG_LEVELS: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['debug', 'info', 'warn', 'error'])
    28→
    29→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    30→// Types
    31→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    32→
    33→export interface ProjectEntry {
    34→  readonly path: string
    35→  readonly name: string
    36→}
    37→
    38→export interface Config {
    39→  readonly heartbeat_interval: string
    40→  readonly watch_dirs: readonly string[]
    41→  readonly projects: readonly ProjectEntry[]
    42→  readonly auto_push: boolean
    43→  readonly log_level: string
    44→  readonly generate_report: boolean
    45→  readonly ai_summary_model: string
    46→  readonly locale: string
    47→  readonly gh_pages_branch: string
    48→  readonly cname: string
    49→  readonly webhook_url: string
    50→}
    51→
    52→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    53→// Path helpers
    54→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    55→
    56→export function memorytreeRoot(): string {
    57→  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree')
    58→}
    59→
    60→export function configPath(): string {
    61→  return resolve(memorytreeRoot(), 'config.toml')
    62→}
    63→
    64→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    65→// Load / Save
    66→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    67→
    68→export function loadConfig(): Config {
    69→  const path = configPath()
    70→  if (!existsSync(path)) {
    71→    return defaultConfig()
    72→  }
    73→  let raw: Record<string, unknown>
    74→  try {
    75→    const text = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
    76→    raw = parseToml(text) as Record<string, unknown>
    77→  } catch {
    78→    return defaultConfig()
    79→  }
    80→  return parseRaw(raw)
    81→}
    82→
    83→export function saveConfig(cfg: Config): void {
    84→  const path = configPath()
    85→  mkdirSync(dirname(path), { recursive: true })
    86→
    87→  const lines: string[] = [
    88→    `heartbeat_interval = ${tomlString(cfg.heartbeat_interval)}`,
    89→    `auto_push = ${cfg.auto_push ? 'true' : 'false'}`,
    90→    `log_level = ${tomlString(cfg.log_level)}`,
    91→    `generate_report = ${cfg.generate_report ? 'true' : 'false'}`,
    92→    `ai_summary_model = ${tomlString(cfg.ai_summary_model)}`,
    93→    `locale = ${tomlString(cfg.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE)}`,
    94→    `gh_pages_branch = ${tomlString(cfg.gh_pages_branch ?? DEFAULT_GH_PAGES_BRANCH)}`,
    95→    `cname = ${tomlString(cfg.cname ?? DEFAULT_CNAME)}`,
    96→    `webhook_url = ${tomlString(cfg.webhook_url ?? DEFAULT_WEBHOOK_URL)}`,
    97→  ]
    98→
    99→  if (cfg.watch_dirs.length > 0) {
   100→    const items = cfg.watch_dirs.map(d => tomlString(d)).join(', ')
   101→    lines.push(`watch_dirs = [${items}]`)
   102→  } else {
   103→    lines.push('watch_dirs = []')
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  lines.push('')
   107→  for (const project of cfg.projects) {
   108→    lines.push('[[projects]]')
   109→    lines.push(`path = ${tomlString(project.path)}`)
   110→    if (project.name) {
   111→      lines.push(`name = ${tomlString(project.name)}`)
   112→    }
   113→    lines.push('')
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  writeFileSync(path, lines.join('\n') + '\n', 'utf-8')
   117→}
   118→
   119→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   120→// Interval parsing
   121→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   122→
   123→export function intervalToSeconds(interval: string): number {
   124→  const match = interval.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
   125→  if (!match) {
   126→    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
   127→  }
   128→  const value = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)
   129→  const unit = match[2]!
   130→  if (value <= 0) {
   131→    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
   132→  }
   133→  const multiplier: Record<string, number> = { s: 1, m: 60, h: 3600 }
   134→  return value * (multiplier[unit] ?? 60)
   135→}
   136→
   137→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   138→// Project registration
   139→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   140→
   141→export function registerProject(cfg: Config, repoPath: string): Config {
   142→  const resolved = toPosixPath(resolve(repoPath))
   143→  for (const entry of cfg.projects) {
   144→    if (toPosixPath(resolve(entry.path)) === resolved) {
   145→      return cfg
   146→    }
   147→  }
   148→  const name = resolved.split('/').pop() ?? ''
   149→  return {
   150→    ...cfg,
   151→    projects: [...cfg.projects, { path: resolved, name }],
   152→  }
   153→}
   154→
   155→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   156→// Internal helpers
   157→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   158→
   159→function defaultConfig(): Config {
   160→  return {
   161→    heartbeat_interval: DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL,
   162→    watch_dirs: [],
   163→    projects: [],
   164→    auto_push: DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH,
   165→    log_level: DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL,
   166→    generate_report: DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT,
   167→    ai_summary_model: DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL,
   168→    locale: DEFAULT_LOCALE,
   169→    gh_pages_branch: DEFAULT_GH_PAGES_BRANCH,
   170→    cname: DEFAULT_CNAME,
   171→    webhook_url: DEFAULT_WEBHOOK_URL,
   172→  }
   173→}
   174→
   175→function parseRaw(raw: Record<string, unknown>): Config {
   176→  let interval = raw['heartbeat_interval']
   177→  if (typeof interval !== 'string' || !isValidInterval(interval)) {
   178→    interval = DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL
   179→  }
   180→
   181→  let autoPush = raw['auto_push']
   182→  if (typeof autoPush !== 'boolean') {
   183→    autoPush = DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH
   184→  }
   185→
   186→  let logLevel = raw['log_level']
   187→  if (typeof logLevel !== 'string' || !VALID_LOG_LEVELS.has(logLevel.toLowerCase())) {
   188→    logLevel = DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL
   189→  }
   190→  logLevel = (logLevel as string).toLowerCase()
   191→
   192→  const watchDirs: string[] = []
   193→  const rawDirs = raw['watch_dirs']
   194→  if (Array.isArray(rawDirs)) {
   195→    for (const d of rawDirs) {
   196→      if (typeof d === 'string') watchDirs.push(d)
   197→    }
   198→  }
   199→
   200→  const projects: ProjectEntry[] = []
   201→  const rawProjects = raw['projects']
   202→  if (Array.isArray(rawProjects)) {
   203→    for (const entry of rawProjects) {
   204→      if (entry !== null && typeof entry === 'object' && !Array.isArray(entry)) {
   205→        const rec = entry as Record<string, unknown>
   206→        if (typeof rec['path'] === 'string') {
   207→          projects.push({
   208→            path: rec['path'] as string,
   209→            name: String(rec['name'] ?? ''),
   210→          })
   211→        }
   212→      }
   213→    }
   214→  }
   215→
   216→  let generateReport = raw['generate_report']
   217→  if (typeof generateReport !== 'boolean') {
   218→    generateReport = DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT
   219→  }
   220→
   221→  let aiSummaryModel = raw['ai_summary_model']
   222→  if (typeof aiSummaryModel !== 'string' || !aiSummaryModel) {
   223→    aiSummaryModel = DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL
   224→  }
   225→
   226→  let locale = raw['locale']
   227→  if (typeof locale !== 'string' || !locale) {
   228→    locale = DEFAULT_LOCALE
   229→  }
   230→
   231→  let ghPagesBranch = raw['gh_pages_branch']
   232→  if (typeof ghPagesBranch !== 'string') {
   233→    ghPagesBranch = DEFAULT_GH_PAGES_BRANCH
   234→  }
   235→
   236→  let cname = raw['cname']
   237→  if (typeof cname !== 'string') {
   238→    cname = DEFAULT_CNAME
   239→  }
   240→
   241→  let webhookUrl = raw['webhook_url']
   242→  if (typeof webhookUrl !== 'string') {
   243→    webhookUrl = DEFAULT_WEBHOOK_URL
   244→  }
   245→
   246→  return {
   247→    heartbeat_interval: interval as string,
   248→    watch_dirs: watchDirs,
   249→    projects,
   250→    auto_push: autoPush as boolean,
   251→    log_level: logLevel as string,
   252→    generate_report: generateReport as boolean,
   253→    ai_summary_model: aiSummaryModel as string,
   254→    locale: locale as string,
   255→    gh_pages_branch: ghPagesBranch as string,
   256→    cname: cname as string,
   257→    webhook_url: webhookUrl as string,
   258→  }
   259→}
   260→
   261→function isValidInterval(value: string): boolean {
   262→  const match = value.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
   263→  if (!match) return false
   264→  return parseInt(match[1]!, 10) > 0
   265→}
   266→
   267→function tomlString(value: string): string {
   268→  const escaped = value.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"')
   269→  return `"${escaped}"`
   270→}
   271→

    12→export interface TranscriptToolEvent {

    15→}
    16→
    17→export interface ParsedTranscript {

    19→  session_id: string
    20→  title: string
    21→  started_at: string
    22→  cwd: string

    42→  global_clean_path: string
    43→  global_manifest_path: string
    44→  repo_raw_path: string
    45→  repo_clean_path: string
    46→  repo_manifest_path: string
    47→  message_count: number
    48→  tool_event_count: number
    49→  cleaning_mode: string
    50→  repo_mirror_enabled: boolean
    51→}

Tool Result #668 Read toolu_01WfjcW4cu1WF4GPF9vphmY7 15:27:06
Read output=1→/** 2→ * MemoryTree heartbeat — single execution, stateless, idempotent. 3→ * Port of scripts/heartbeat.py 4→ */ 5→ 6→import type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcrip...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * MemoryTree heartbeat — single execution, stateless, idempotent.
     3→ * Port of scripts/heartbeat.py
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'
     7→import { discoverSourceFiles, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'
     8→import { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'
     9→import { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
    10→import { slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'
    11→import { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot } from '../transcript/discover.js'
    12→import type { Config } from './config.js'
    13→import { loadConfig } from './config.js'
    14→import { acquireLock, releaseLock } from './lock.js'
    15→import { resetFailureCount, writeAlert, writeAlertWithThreshold } from './alert.js'
    16→import type { LogLevel } from './log.js'
    17→import { getLogger, setupLogging } from './log.js'
    18→import { git } from '../utils/exec.js'
    19→import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    20→import { basename, join, resolve } from 'node:path'
    21→import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
    22→
    23→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    24→// Sensitive pattern detection
    25→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    26→
    27→const SENSITIVE_PATTERNS: readonly RegExp[] = [
    28→  /(?:api[_-]?key|apikey)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
    29→  /(?:password|passwd|pwd)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
    30→  /(?:secret|token)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
    31→  /(?:sk-|pk_live_|sk_live_|ghp_|gho_|glpat-)\S{10,}/,
    32→  /Bearer\s+\S{20,}/i,
    33→]
    34→
    35→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    36→// Main entry point
    37→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    38→
    39→export async function main(): Promise<number> {
    40→  const config = loadConfig()
    41→  setupLogging(config.log_level as LogLevel)
    42→  const logger = getLogger()
    43→
    44→  if (!acquireLock()) {
    45→    logger.info('Another heartbeat instance is running. Exiting.')
    46→    writeAlert('global', 'lock_held', 'Heartbeat exited: another instance held the lock.')
    47→    return 0
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  try {
    51→    return await runHeartbeat(config)
    52→  } finally {
    53→    releaseLock()
    54→  }
    55→}
    56→
    57→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    58→// Heartbeat orchestration
    59→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    60→
    61→export async function runHeartbeat(config: Config): Promise<number> {
    62→  const logger = getLogger()
    63→
    64→  if (config.projects.length === 0) {
    65→    logger.info('No projects registered in config.toml. Nothing to do.')
    66→    return 0
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  logger.info(`Heartbeat started. ${config.projects.length} project(s) registered.`)
    70→
    71→  for (const entry of config.projects) {
    72→    const projectPath = resolve(entry.path)
    73→    if (!existsSync(projectPath)) {
    74→      logger.warn(`Project path does not exist, skipping: ${projectPath}`)
    75→      continue
    76→    }
    77→    try {
    78→      await processProject(config, projectPath, entry.name || basename(projectPath))
    79→    } catch (err: unknown) {
    80→      logger.exception(`Error processing project: ${projectPath}`, err)
    81→      writeAlertWithThreshold(
    82→        toPosixPath(projectPath),
    83→        'push_failed',
    84→        `Heartbeat error for project: ${basename(projectPath)}`,
    85→      )
    86→    }
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  logger.info('Heartbeat finished.')
    90→  return 0
    91→}
    92→
    93→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    94→// Per-project processing
    95→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    96→
    97→export async function processProject(config: Config, projectPath: string, projectName: string): Promise<void> {
    98→  const logger = getLogger()
    99→  const repoSlug = slugify(projectName, 'project')
   100→  const globalRoot = defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
   101→
   102→  const discovered = discoverSourceFiles()
   103→  let importedCount = 0
   104→
   105→  for (const [client, source] of discovered) {
   106→    let parsed: ParsedTranscript
   107→    try {
   108→      parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
   109→    } catch {
   110→      logger.debug(`Failed to parse ${source}, skipping.`)
   111→      continue
   112→    }
   113→
   114→    if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) continue
   115→    if (!transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, projectPath, repoSlug)) continue
   116→
   117→    scanSensitive(parsed, projectPath)
   118→
   119→    try {
   120→      await importTranscript(parsed, projectPath, globalRoot, repoSlug, 'not-set', true)
   121→      importedCount++
   122→    } catch {
   123→      logger.exception(`Failed to import transcript: ${source}`)
   124→    }
   125→  }
   126→
   127→  if (importedCount === 0) {
   128→    logger.info(`[${projectName}] No new transcripts to import.`)
   129→    return
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  logger.info(`[${projectName}] Imported ${importedCount} transcript(s).`)
   133→  gitCommitAndPush(config, projectPath, projectName, importedCount)
   134→
   135→  if (config.generate_report) {
   136→    try {
   137→      const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')
   138→      await buildReport({
   139→        root: projectPath,
   140→        output: join(projectPath, 'Memory', '07_reports'),
   141→        noAi: !process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'],
   142→        model: config.ai_summary_model,
   143→        locale: config.locale,
   144→        ghPagesBranch: config.gh_pages_branch,
   145→        cname: config.cname,
   146→        webhookUrl: config.webhook_url,
   147→      })
   148→      logger.info(`[${projectName}] Report generated.`)
   149→    } catch (err: unknown) {
   150→      logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Report generation failed: ${String(err)}`)
   151→      // Never propagate — report failure must not abort heartbeat cycle
   152→    }
   153→  }
   154→}
   155→
   156→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   157→// Sensitive pattern scanning
   158→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   159→
   160→export function scanSensitive(parsed: ParsedTranscript, projectPath: string): void {
   161→  const logger = getLogger()
   162→  for (const msg of parsed.messages) {
   163→    for (const pattern of SENSITIVE_PATTERNS) {
   164→      if (pattern.test(msg.text)) {
   165→        logger.warn(
   166→          `Sensitive pattern detected in transcript ${parsed.source_path} (project: ${basename(projectPath)}, role: ${msg.role})`,
   167→        )
   168→        writeAlert(
   169→          toPosixPath(projectPath),
   170→          'sensitive_match',
   171→          `Sensitive pattern in transcript: ${basename(parsed.source_path)}`,
   172→        )
   173→        return
   174→      }
   175→    }
   176→  }
   177→}
   178→
   179→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   180→// Git operations
   181→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   182→
   183→export function gitCommitAndPush(config: Config, projectPath: string, projectName: string, count: number): void {
   184→  const logger = getLogger()
   185→
   186→  const status = git(projectPath, 'status', '--porcelain', 'Memory/')
   187→  if (!status.trim()) {
   188→    logger.info(`[${projectName}] No git changes in Memory/.`)
   189→    return
   190→  }
   191→
   192→  git(projectPath, 'add', 'Memory/')
   193→  git(projectPath, 'commit', '-m', `memorytree(transcripts): import ${count} transcript(s)`)
   194→  logger.info(`[${projectName}] Committed ${count} transcript import(s).`)
   195→
   196→  if (!config.auto_push) {
   197→    logger.info(`[${projectName}] auto_push disabled, skipping push.`)
   198→    return
   199→  }
   200→
   201→  const remotes = git(projectPath, 'remote')
   202→  if (!remotes.trim()) {
   203→    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] No git remote configured, skipping push.`)
   204→    writeAlert(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'no_remote', 'Push skipped: no Git remote configured.')
   205→    return
   206→  }
   207→
   208→  if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
   209→    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Push failed, retrying once...`)
   210→    if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
   211→      logger.error(`[${projectName}] Push failed after retry.`)
   212→      writeAlertWithThreshold(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed', 'Push failed after retry.')
   213→      return
   214→    }
   215→  }
   216→
   217→  resetFailureCount(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed')
   218→}
   219→
   220→export function tryPush(projectPath: string, projectName: string): boolean {
   221→  try {
   222→    git(projectPath, 'push')
   223→    getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Pushed successfully.`)
   224→    return true
   225→  } catch {
   226→    return false
   227→  }
   228→}
   229→

1→/**
     2→ * HTML layout helpers: shell, navigation, and HTML escaping.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import { basename } from 'node:path'
     6→
     7→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
     8→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     9→import { REPORT_CSS } from './css.js'
    10→
    11→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    12→// HTML escaping
    13→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    14→
    15→export function escHtml(text: string): string {
    16→  return text
    17→    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
    18→    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
    19→    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
    20→    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
    21→    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;')
    22→}
    23→
    24→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    25→// Navigation page IDs
    26→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    27→
    28→export type NavPage =
    29→  | 'dashboard'
    30→  | 'transcripts'
    31→  | 'projects'
    32→  | 'graph'
    33→  | 'goals'
    34→  | 'todos'
    35→  | 'knowledge'
    36→  | 'archive'
    37→  | 'search'
    38→
    39→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    40→// Sidebar navigation
    41→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    42→
    43→const SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS = `
    44→<script>
    45→(function() {
    46→  // Theme
    47→  var saved = localStorage.getItem('mt-theme') || 'dark';
    48→  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', saved);
    49→  function updateThemeBtn() {
    50→    var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
    51→    if (btn) btn.textContent = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? '☀ Light' : '☾ Dark';
    52→  }
    53→  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    54→    updateThemeBtn();
    55→    var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
    56→    if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    57→      var next = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
    58→      document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
    59→      localStorage.setItem('mt-theme', next);
    60→      updateThemeBtn();

Tool Result #700 Read toolu_018W4xJ47ubBWjvSzXac9SGS 15:28:50
Read output=1→/** 2→ * Knowledge page: renders markdown files from Memory/04_knowledge/. 3→ */ 4→ 5→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js' 6→import { escHtml, htmlShell, rende...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Knowledge page: renders markdown files from Memory/04_knowledge/.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     6→import { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js'
     7→import type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'
     8→import { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'
     9→
    10→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    11→// Knowledge page
    12→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    13→
    14→export type KnowledgeFile = MarkdownFile
    15→
    16→export function renderKnowledge(files: KnowledgeFile[], t?: Translations): string {
    17→  const nav = renderNav('knowledge', 1, t)
    18→  const title = t?.nav.knowledge ?? 'Knowledge'
    19→
    20→  if (files.length === 0) {
    21→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
    22→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
    23→  <p class="subtitle">No knowledge files found in Memory/04_knowledge/.</p>
    24→</div>`
    25→    return htmlShell(title, content, nav)
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  const sections = files
    29→    .map(f => {
    30→      const htmlContent = markdownToHtml(f.content)
    31→      return `<div class="card" id="${escHtml(slugifyName(f.filename))}">
    32→  <h2>${escHtml(f.title)}</h2>
    33→  <p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1rem">${escHtml(f.filename)}</p>
    34→  <div class="markdown-body">${htmlContent}</div>
    35→</div>`
    36→    })
    37→    .join('\n')
    38→
    39→  const content = `<div class="page-header">
    40→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
    41→  <p class="subtitle">${files.length} knowledge file(s)</p>
    42→</div>
    43→${sections}`
    44→
    45→  return htmlShell(title, content, nav)
    46→}
    47→

60→      updateThemeBtn();
    61→    });
    62→    // Mobile hamburger
    63→    var hb = document.getElementById('hamburger');
    64→    var sb = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    65→    var ov = document.getElementById('sidebar-overlay');
    66→    function closeSidebar() {
    67→      if (sb) sb.classList.remove('open');
    68→      if (ov) ov.classList.remove('open');
    69→    }
    70→    if (hb) hb.addEventListener('click', function() {
    71→      if (sb) sb.classList.toggle('open');
    72→      if (ov) ov.classList.toggle('open');
    73→    });
    74→    if (ov) ov.addEventListener('click', closeSidebar);
    75→    // Popover preview
    76→    var popover = null;
    77→    document.querySelectorAll('a[data-summary]').forEach(function(el) {
    78→      el.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(e) {
    79→        var summary = el.getAttribute('data-summary') || '';
    80→        var meta = el.getAttribute('data-meta') || '';
    81→        if (!summary && !meta) return;
    82→        if (!popover) {
    83→          popover = document.createElement('div');
    84→          popover.className = 'popover';
    85→          document.body.appendChild(popover);
    86→        }
    87→        popover.innerHTML = '';
    88→        if (meta) {
    89→          var metaDiv = document.createElement('div');
    90→          metaDiv.className = 'popover-meta';
    91→          metaDiv.textContent = meta;
    92→          popover.appendChild(metaDiv);
    93→        }
    94→        if (summary) {
    95→          var sumDiv = document.createElement('div');
    96→          sumDiv.className = 'popover-summary';
    97→          sumDiv.textContent = summary;
    98→          popover.appendChild(sumDiv);
    99→        }
   100→        popover.style.display = 'block';
   101→        positionPopover(e);
   102→      });
   103→      el.addEventListener('mousemove', positionPopover);
   104→      el.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
   105→        if (popover) popover.style.display = 'none';
   106→      });
   107→    });
   108→    function positionPopover(e) {
   109→      if (!popover) return;
   110→      var x = e.clientX + 12;
   111→      var y = e.clientY + 12;
   112→      var pw = popover.offsetWidth || 320;
   113→      var ph = popover.offsetHeight || 80;
   114→      if (x + pw > window.innerWidth - 8) x = e.clientX - pw - 12;
   115→      if (y + ph > window.innerHeight - 8) y = e.clientY - ph - 12;
   116→      popover.style.left = x + 'px';
   117→      popover.style.top = y + 'px';
   118→    }
   119→  });
   120→})();
   121→</script>`
   122→
   123→interface NavItem {
   124→  id: NavPage
   125→  icon: string
   126→  labelKey: keyof Translations['nav']
   127→  href: string
   128→}
   129→
   130→function buildNavItems(depth: 0 | 1 | 2): NavItem[] {
   131→  const p = '../'.repeat(depth)
   132→  return [
   133→    { id: 'dashboard', icon: '◈', labelKey: 'dashboard', href: `${p}index.html` },
   134→    { id: 'transcripts', icon: '💬', labelKey: 'sessions', href: `${p}transcripts/index.html` },
   135→    { id: 'projects', icon: '📁', labelKey: 'projects', href: `${p}projects/index.html` },
   136→    { id: 'graph', icon: '⬡', labelKey: 'graph', href: `${p}graph.html` },
   137→    { id: 'goals', icon: '🎯', labelKey: 'goals', href: `${p}goals/index.html` },
   138→    { id: 'todos', icon: '✓', labelKey: 'todos', href: `${p}todos/index.html` },
   139→    { id: 'knowledge', icon: '📚', labelKey: 'knowledge', href: `${p}knowledge/index.html` },
   140→    { id: 'archive', icon: '🗄', labelKey: 'archive', href: `${p}archive/index.html` },
   141→    { id: 'search', icon: '🔍', labelKey: 'search', href: `${p}search.html` },
   142→  ]
   143→}
   144→
   145→export function renderNav(current: NavPage, depth: 0 | 1 | 2, t?: Translations): string {
   146→  const items = buildNavItems(depth)
   147→
   148→  // Labels for each nav item
   149→  const label = (item: NavItem): string => {
   150→    if (t) return t.nav[item.labelKey]
   151→    // Fallback English labels
   152→    const defaults: Record<string, string> = {
   153→      dashboard: 'Dashboard', sessions: 'Sessions', projects: 'Projects',
   154→      graph: 'Graph', goals: 'Goals', todos: 'Todos',
   155→      knowledge: 'Knowledge', archive: 'Archive', search: 'Search',
   156→    }
   157→    return defaults[item.labelKey] ?? item.labelKey
   158→  }
   159→
   160→  const themeLabel = '☀ Light'
   161→
   162→  const navLinks = items.map(item => {
   163→    const cls = item.id === current ? 'nav-link active' : 'nav-link'
   164→    return `<a href="${escHtml(item.href)}" class="${cls}">${escHtml(item.icon)} ${escHtml(label(item))}</a>`
   165→  }).join('\n      ')
   166→
   167→  return `<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
   168→  <div class="sidebar-header">
   169→    <span class="sidebar-brand">MemoryTree</span>
   170→  </div>
   171→  <nav class="sidebar-nav">
   172→    ${navLinks}
   173→  </nav>
   174→  <div class="sidebar-footer">
   175→    <button class="theme-toggle-btn" id="theme-toggle" type="button">${escHtml(themeLabel)}</button>
   176→  </div>
   177→</aside>
   178→<div class="sidebar-overlay" id="sidebar-overlay"></div>`
   179→}
   180→
   181→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   182→// HTML shell
   183→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   184→
   185→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   186→// Transcript URL helpers (single canonical implementation)
   187→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   188→
   189→/**
   190→ * Compute the stem (filename without .md) for a manifest's clean path.
   191→ * Falls back to session_id.
   192→ */
   193→export function manifestStem(m: ManifestEntry): string {
   194→  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
   195→  return cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
   196→}
   197→
   198→/**
   199→ * URL to a transcript page relative to the **root** of the report output dir.
   200→ * Use this from index.html and transcripts/index.html.
   201→ */
   202→export function transcriptUrlFromRoot(m: ManifestEntry): string {
   203→  return `transcripts/${m.client}/${manifestStem(m)}.html`
   204→}
   205→
   206→/**
   207→ * URL to a transcript page relative to **another transcript** page.
   208→ * Use this from individual transcript pages.
   209→ */
   210→export function transcriptUrlFromTranscript(m: ManifestEntry): string {
   211→  return `../${m.client}/${manifestStem(m)}.html`
   212→}
   213→
   214→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   215→// Client badge (allowlisted CSS class)
   216→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   217→
   218→const KNOWN_CLIENTS = new Set(['codex', 'claude', 'gemini'])
   219→

Show output payload 
218→const KNOWN_CLIENTS = new Set(['codex', 'claude', 'gemini'])
   219→
   220→/** Render a coloured client badge. CSS class is allowlisted to prevent injection. */
   221→export function clientBadge(client: string): string {
   222→  const safeClass = KNOWN_CLIENTS.has(client) ? client : 'unknown'
   223→  return `<span class="badge badge-${safeClass}">${escHtml(client)}</span>`
   224→}
   225→
   226→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   227→// Shared MarkdownFile type and slug helper
   228→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   229→
   230→export interface MarkdownFile {
   231→  filename: string
   232→  title: string
   233→  content: string
   234→}
   235→
   236→export function slugifyName(name: string): string {
   237→  return name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
   238→}
   239→
   240→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   241→// HTML shell
   242→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   243→
   244→export function htmlShell(title: string, content: string, nav: string, extraHead = '', lang = 'en'): string {
   245→  const topbar = `<header class="topbar" id="topbar">
   246→  <span class="topbar-brand">MemoryTree</span>
   247→  <div class="topbar-actions">
   248→    <button class="theme-toggle-btn" id="theme-toggle-mobile" type="button">☀</button>
   249→    <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" type="button">☰</button>
   250→  </div>
   251→</header>`
   252→
   253→  return `<!DOCTYPE html>
   254→<html lang="${escHtml(lang)}" data-theme="dark">
   255→<head>
   256→<meta charset="UTF-8">
   257→<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   258→<title>${escHtml(title)} — MemoryTree</title>
   259→<style>${REPORT_CSS}</style>
   260→${extraHead}
   261→${SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS}
   262→</head>
   263→<body>
   264→${topbar}
   265→${nav}
   266→<div class="main-content">
   267→  <div class="container">
   268→${content}
   269→  </div>
   270→</div>
   271→</body>
   272→</html>`
   273→}

1→/**
     2→ * Goals page: renders markdown files from Memory/01_goals/.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
     6→import { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav, slugifyName } from './layout.js'
     7→import type { MarkdownFile } from './layout.js'
     8→import { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'
     9→
    10→export type GoalFile = MarkdownFile
    11→
    12→export function renderGoals(files: GoalFile[], t?: Translations): string {
    13→  const nav = renderNav('goals', 1, t)
    14→  const title = t?.nav.goals ?? 'Goals'
    15→
    16→  if (files.length === 0) {
    17→    const content = `<div class="page-header">
    18→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
    19→  <p class="subtitle">No goal files found in Memory/01_goals/.</p>
    20→</div>`
    21→    return htmlShell(title, content, nav)
    22→  }
    23→
    24→  const sections = files
    25→    .map(f => {
    26→      const htmlContent = markdownToHtml(f.content)
    27→      return `<div class="card" id="${escHtml(slugifyName(f.filename))}">
    28→  <h2>${escHtml(f.title)}</h2>
    29→  <p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1rem">${escHtml(f.filename)}</p>
    30→  <div class="markdown-body">${htmlContent}</div>
    31→</div>`
    32→    })
    33→    .join('\n')
    34→
    35→  const content = `<div class="page-header">
    36→  <h1>${escHtml(title)}</h1>
    37→  <p class="subtitle">${files.length} goal file(s)</p>
    38→</div>
    39→${sections}`
    40→
    41→  return htmlShell(title, content, nav)
    42→}
    43→

Write input={"content":"/**\n * Table of contents extraction and rendering.\n * Extracts h2/h3 headings from raw markdown and generates a sticky TOC nav.\n */\n\nimport { escHtml } from './...
Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "C:\\Users\\ai\\.codex\\skills\\memorytree-workflow\\src\\report\\render\\toc.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Table of contents extraction and rendering.\n * Extracts h2/h3 headings from raw markdown and generates a sticky TOC nav.\n */\n\nimport { escHtml } from './layout.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Types\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface TocEntry {\n  level: 2 | 3\n  text: string\n  /** URL-safe anchor id, duplicate-free (suffixed -1, -2, …) */\n  id: string\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Extract TOC from raw markdown\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Parse h2 and h3 headings from markdown source.\n * Duplicate heading text gets a numeric suffix: `-1`, `-2`, …\n */\nexport function extractToc(md: string): TocEntry[] {\n  const entries: TocEntry[] = []\n  const seen = new Map<string, number>()\n\n  for (const line of md.split('\\n')) {\n    const h2 = line.match(/^## (.+)$/)\n    const h3 = line.match(/^### (.+)$/)\n    const match = h2 ?? h3\n    if (!match) continue\n\n    const level: 2 | 3 = h2 ? 2 : 3\n    const text = (match[1] ?? '').trim()\n    const base = slugifyHeading(text)\n\n    const count = seen.get(base) ?? 0\n    const id = count === 0 ? base : `${base}-${count}`\n    seen.set(base, count + 1)\n\n    entries.push({ level, text, id })\n  }\n\n  return entries\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Render TOC HTML\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Render a collapsible TOC nav from extracted entries.\n * Returns empty string when entries is empty.\n */\nexport function renderToc(entries: TocEntry[]): string {\n  if (entries.length === 0) return ''\n\n  const items = entries\n    .map(e => {\n      const indent = e.level === 3 ? ' style=\"padding-left:1.25rem\"' : ''\n      return `<li${indent}><a href=\"#${escHtml(e.id)}\">${escHtml(e.text)}</a></li>`\n    })\n    .join('\\n      ')\n\n  return `<nav class=\"toc\" id=\"toc\">\n  <button class=\"toc-toggle\" id=\"toc-toggle\" type=\"button\" aria-expanded=\"true\">\n    Contents <span class=\"toc-arrow\">▾</span>\n  </button>\n  <ul class=\"toc-list\" id=\"toc-list\">\n    ${items}\n  </ul>\n</nav>`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Heading anchor injection\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Post-process rendered HTML to add id attributes to heading tags so\n * TOC anchor links resolve correctly.\n * Only modifies <h2> and <h3> tags without existing id attributes.\n */\nexport function injectHeadingIds(html: string, entries: TocEntry[]): string {\n  if (entries.length === 0) return html\n\n  // Process entries in order so duplicates match correctly\n  const remaining = [...entries]\n  return html.replace(/<h([23])>([^<]*)<\\/h[23]>/g, (full, levelStr, innerHtml) => {\n    const level = parseInt(levelStr, 10) as 2 | 3\n    const idx = remaining.findIndex(e => e.level === level && escHtml(e.text) === innerHtml.trim())\n    if (idx === -1) return full\n    const entry = remaining.splice(idx, 1)[0]!\n    return `<h${level} id=\"${escHtml(entry.id)}\">${innerHtml}</h${level}>`\n  })\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Internal helpers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction slugifyHeading(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .toLowerCase()\n    .replace(/[^\\w\\s-]/g, '')   // remove non-word chars except hyphen\n    .trim()\n    .replace(/[\\s_]+/g, '-')   // spaces/underscores → hyphen\n    .replace(/-+/g, '-')       // collapse multiple hyphens\n}\n"
}

Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "C:\\Users\\ai\\.codex\\skills\\memorytree-workflow\\src\\report\\render\\breadcrumb.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Breadcrumb navigation helper.\n * Renders an accessible <nav aria-label=\"breadcrumb\"> from a list of items.\n */\n\nimport { escHtml } from './layout.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Types\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface BreadcrumbItem {\n  label: string\n  /** URL of this crumb. Omit for the current (last) item. */\n  url?: string\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Renderer\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Render a breadcrumb trail.\n * - Items with a `url` are rendered as links.\n * - The last item (current page) has no link and gets aria-current=\"page\".\n * - Returns empty string when items array is empty.\n */\nexport function renderBreadcrumb(items: BreadcrumbItem[]): string {\n  if (items.length === 0) return ''\n\n  const parts = items.map((item, i) => {\n    const isLast = i === items.length - 1\n    if (isLast || !item.url) {\n      return `<span class=\"breadcrumb-item\" ${isLast ? 'aria-current=\"page\"' : ''}>${escHtml(item.label)}</span>`\n    }\n    return `<a class=\"breadcrumb-item\" href=\"${escHtml(item.url)}\">${escHtml(item.label)}</a>`\n  })\n\n  return `<nav class=\"breadcrumb\" aria-label=\"breadcrumb\">${parts.join('<span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>')}</nav>`\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:\\Users\\ai\\.codex\\skills\\memorytree-workflow\\tests\\report\\render\\toc.test.ts",
  "content": "import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'\nimport { extractToc, renderToc, injectHeadingIds } from '../../../src/report/render/toc.js'\n\ndescribe('extractToc', () => {\n  it('extracts h2 and h3 headings', () => {\n    const md = `# Title\\n\\n## Section One\\n\\nSome text\\n\\n### Sub Section\\n\\n## Section Two`\n    const toc = extractToc(md)\n    expect(toc).toHaveLength(3)\n    expect(toc[0]).toEqual({ level: 2, text: 'Section One', id: 'section-one' })\n    expect(toc[1]).toEqual({ level: 3, text: 'Sub Section', id: 'sub-section' })\n    expect(toc[2]).toEqual({ level: 2, text: 'Section Two', id: 'section-two' })\n  })\n\n  it('ignores h1 headings', () => {\n    const md = `# Top Level\\n\\n## Only This`\n    const toc = extractToc(md)\n    expect(toc).toHaveLength(1)\n    expect(toc[0]!.level).toBe(2)\n  })\n\n  it('handles duplicate headings with -N suffix', () => {\n    const md = `## Intro\\n\\n## Intro\\n\\n## Intro`\n    const toc = extractToc(md)\n    expect(toc[0]!.id).toBe('intro')\n    expect(toc[1]!.id).toBe('intro-1')\n    expect(toc[2]!.id).toBe('intro-2')\n  })\n\n  it('returns empty array for content with no headings', () => {\n    expect(extractToc('Just some text\\n\\nNo headings here.')).toEqual([])\n  })\n\n  it('returns empty array for empty string', () => {\n    expect(extractToc('')).toEqual([])\n  })\n\n  it('slugifies special characters in heading text', () => {\n    const md = `## Hello, World! (2026)`\n    const toc = extractToc(md)\n    expect(toc[0]!.id).toBe('hello-world-2026')\n  })\n})\n\ndescribe('renderToc', () => {\n  it('returns empty string for empty entries', () => {\n    expect(renderToc([])).toBe('')\n  })\n\n  it('renders h2 items without indent', () => {\n    const entries = [{ level: 2 as const, text: 'Section', id: 'section' }]\n    const html = renderToc(entries)\n    expect(html).toContain('<a href=\"#section\">Section</a>')\n    expect(html).not.toContain('padding-left')\n  })\n\n  it('renders h3 items with indent style', () => {\n    const entries = [{ level: 3 as const, text: 'Sub', id: 'sub' }]\n    const html = renderToc(entries)\n    expect(html).toContain('padding-left')\n    expect(html).toContain('<a href=\"#sub\">Sub</a>')\n  })\n\n  it('escapes HTML in heading text', () => {\n    const entries = [{ level: 2 as const, text: '<script>alert(1)</script>', id: 'xss' }]\n    const html = renderToc(entries)\n    expect(html).not.toContain('<script>')\n    expect(html).toContain('&lt;script&gt;')\n  })\n\n  it('wraps in nav.toc with toggle button', () => {\n    const entries = [{ level: 2 as const, text: 'A', id: 'a' }]\n    const html = renderToc(entries)\n    expect(html).toContain('class=\"toc\"')\n    expect(html).toContain('toc-toggle')\n  })\n})\n\ndescribe('injectHeadingIds', () => {\n  it('injects id attributes into h2 and h3 tags', () => {\n    const html = '<h2>Section One</h2><p>text</p><h3>Sub Section</h3>'\n    const entries = [\n      { level: 2 as const, text: 'Section One', id: 'section-one' },\n      { level: 3 as const, text: 'Sub Section', id: 'sub-section' },\n    ]\n    const result = injectHeadingIds(html, entries)\n    expect(result).toContain('<h2 id=\"section-one\">Section One</h2>')\n    expect(result).toContain('<h3 id=\"sub-section\">Sub Section</h3>')\n  })\n\n  it('returns original html when entries is empty', () => {\n    const html = '<h2>Test</h2>'\n    expect(injectHeadingIds(html, [])).toBe(html)\n  })\n\n  it('leaves unmatched headings unchanged', () => {\n    const html = '<h2>Unknown Heading</h2>'\n    const entries = [{ level: 2 as const, text: 'Different', id: 'different' }]\n    const result = injectHeadingIds(html, entries)\n    expect(result).toBe('<h2>Unknown Heading</h2>')\n  })\n})\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:\\Users\\ai\\.codex\\skills\\memorytree-workflow\\tests\\report\\render\\breadcrumb.test.ts",
  "content": "import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'\nimport { renderBreadcrumb } from '../../../src/report/render/breadcrumb.js'\n\ndescribe('renderBreadcrumb', () => {\n  it('returns empty string for empty items', () => {\n    expect(renderBreadcrumb([])).toBe('')\n  })\n\n  it('renders single item as current page (no link)', () => {\n    const html = renderBreadcrumb([{ label: 'Dashboard' }])\n    expect(html).toContain('aria-current=\"page\"')\n    expect(html).toContain('Dashboard')\n    expect(html).not.toContain('<a ')\n  })\n\n  it('renders intermediate items as links', () => {\n    const html = renderBreadcrumb([\n      { label: 'Home', url: '../index.html' },\n      { label: 'Sessions', url: '../transcripts/index.html' },\n      { label: 'my-session' },\n    ])\n    expect(html).toContain('href=\"../index.html\"')\n    expect(html).toContain('href=\"../transcripts/index.html\"')\n    expect(html).toContain('aria-current=\"page\"')\n    expect(html).toContain('my-session')\n  })\n\n  it('last item has no link even if url is provided', () => {\n    const html = renderBreadcrumb([\n      { label: 'Home', url: 'index.html' },\n      { label: 'Current', url: 'current.html' },\n    ])\n    // last item should have aria-current, not be a link\n    expect(html).toContain('aria-current=\"page\"')\n    // 'Current' text should appear exactly once (no link)\n    expect((html.match(/href=\"current\\.html\"/g) ?? []).length).toBe(0)\n  })\n\n  it('escapes HTML in labels and URLs', () => {\n    const html = renderBreadcrumb([\n      { label: '<b>Bold</b>', url: 'page.html?a=1&b=2' },\n      { label: 'End' },\n    ])\n    expect(html).not.toContain('<b>')\n    expect(html).toContain('&lt;b&gt;')\n    expect(html).toContain('&amp;')\n  })\n\n  it('renders separator between items', () => {\n    const html = renderBreadcrumb([\n      { label: 'A', url: 'a.html' },\n      { label: 'B' },\n    ])\n    expect(html).toContain('›')\n  })\n\n  it('wraps in nav with aria-label', () => {\n    const html = renderBreadcrumb([{ label: 'X' }])\n    expect(html).toContain('<nav class=\"breadcrumb\"')\n    expect(html).toContain('aria-label=\"breadcrumb\"')\n  })\n})\n"
}
